name: Rep. Brandon Gill
subject: I’ll be frank
body:
I’m done playing nice

| | | | |
---
Friend, the Democrats and their Deep State allies are coming after me... HARD.
**They are doing this because I’m not just backing Trump’s America First agenda... I’m leading the charge in Congress.**
The Left has watched every move I’ve made these first 100 days and they know I’m not just a supporter of the President. **I’m a threat to everything they represent.**
But I’ve got news for them, I’m NOT backing down.
[STAND WITH BRANDON GILL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**In the first 100 days in Congress, I’ve already:**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Introduced the REMAIN in Mexico Act** , locking in one of President Trump’s strongest policies to secure the border and stop asylum abuse.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Filed articles of impeachment against Judge James Boasberg** \- a radical activist who has abused our judicial system to protect illegal immigrants and undermine President Trump’s executive powers.
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv3/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**Fought in the House DOGE Subcommittee****** to rein in the rogue fourth branch of government filled with bureaucrats who have been able to act without impunity against the American people.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Pushed to defund NPR and PBS.** Because the American people shouldn’t be forced to bankroll leftist propaganda.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Introduced the Land and National Defense Act** to keep our farmland out of China’s hands - and I’ve moved to **abolish the Fogarty Center** to stop funding anti-American research overseas.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**And I backed Trump’s use of the Alien Enemies Act** to stop the illegal invasion cold. I filed an amicus brief to make it crystal clear: President Trump and I stand with American citizens—not illegal alien murderers and rapists terrorizing our cities thanks to the Left’s open border.
**Now we need to keep pushing. **
**_[That’s why I’m calling on you to stand with me TODAY so I can keep fighting in Congress to put America First like I have done during the first 100 days](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[LET'S TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**But I need to be frank with you.**
Now that we’ve got the White House and a Republican Congress, a lot of folks are letting their guard down. That is exactly what the communist Democrats want.
This is not the time to take our foot off the gas. We MUST take advantage of this historic opportunity to hit the Left back where it hurts but _the Democrats_ , _the Deep State_ , _the FAKE news media_ , and _ALL their cronies_ have**painted a target on my back.**
They’re pulling every lever they’ve got to try and shut me down.
Fellow patriot, I can’t fight this battle alone. You’ve seen what I've been able to accomplish in the first 100 days but now I need to know you still have my back.
So if you’re with me - if you want to finish the job and take the fight to the radical Left - **_[I need you to chip in right now](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[STAND WITH ME](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Let’s Make Common Sense Great Again and take our country back once and for all.
_Thanks for standing strong_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Congressman Brandon Gill**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv2/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asv4/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NzEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=289713&trkid=673591888&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

"Be a good person."
We've all either given that advice to our kids or received it thousands of times. Most people might interpret it as "Be nice" or "Be kind to others."
Rutger Bregman is thinking a lot bigger than that. You might remember Rutger from his books _[Utopia for Realists](https://substack.com/redirect/60e2f8e0-7447-46bf-aa41-56adcbeb10ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ or _[Humankind](https://substack.com/redirect/cfed1f5b-c6c6-4c27-a029-70c93009c9a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ or his [TED Talk](https://substack.com/redirect/e2fa3460-4a95-432f-afec-6766def18911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Universal Basic Income. Now, he's out with a new book, _[Moral Ambition: Stop Wasting Your Talent and Start Making a Difference](https://substack.com/redirect/581bebc0-e69f-41e6-91b3-a45b4153f8de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. To his credit, he's put his money where his mouth is, starting a fellowship program, The School for Moral Ambition, and donating all proceeds from the book to the school. He's also moved to New York City from the Netherlands. I interviewed Rutger on the [podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/72878c2b-6a97-4864-880d-c3b8b67395f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this week.
"What we do with our jobs is one of the biggest decisions we make, as the average career consists of 2,000 workweeks," Rutger notes. "But millions of people are stuck in mind-numbing, pointless, or just plain harmful jobs. This is particularly true for some of the most educated, who wind up financiers or consultants."
If you've kept up with me for a while, this might sound familiar. I wrote a book in 2014 called _[Smart People Should Build Things](https://substack.com/redirect/6a12a6aa-5e6b-4233-a32d-0c067ef45596?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ that argued that too many American college grads were heading into finance, consulting and law and that more should head to startups that were solving problems in Detroit, Cleveland, Baltimore, New Orleans, Birmingham and other cities. I started a fellowship program, Venture of America that recruited recent graduates to pursue these paths.
My version of "be a good person" was "head to an emerging city and help build a company and create jobs." So what is Rutger's?
"We need more people solving the real problems of our time, like address climate change, prevent the next pandemic or fight Big Tobacco. There are smart people who have sat down and figured out what we could do that would do the most good across the planet. Those are the projects to which the School for Moral Ambition will be sending people. We call it 'Hogwarts for do-gooders.'"
His book opens with a quote from Leo Rosten, "I cannot believe that the purpose of life is to be 'happy.' I think the purpose of life is to be useful, to be responsible, to be honorable, to be compassionate. It is, above all, to matter: to count, to stand for something, to have it make some difference that you lived at all." It's hard to argue with that. He then goes through how various movements have taken root and grown in different societies.
I've liked Rutger for a long time, since meeting him at TED 8 years ago. I particularly admire Rutger rolling up his sleeves to try and build the school. I came at it from the other direction, where I was an entrepreneur who had started an org and then wrote a book to try and make the case and spread the word. Rutger has gone the other direction. "I was tired of just writing about these problems. I thought that I should walk the walk and start building the solution myself. It's been very energizing." I wish more authors took a similar plunge. It's a lot easier to commentate than to solve the problem.
That said, I think that a lot of the changes Rutger wants to see will eventually require government and politics to improve. There are massive problems that eventually require nation-scale resources to address. Take poverty, for example; philanthropy isn't big enough. That's how I went from fellowship founder to your friendly neighborhood presidential candidate and democracy reformer. If you want to solve some of these problems, you have to get government to become more rational and productive. It's daunting, but also necessary.
When I get asked what I do, I sometimes answer, "I'm an all-purpose do-gooder." For most people, trying to be a good person won't involve some massive life change but to be a little bit better where you are and in what you do. Work a little harder, contribute a little more, donate a little more, volunteer more, be more present, be a better friend or partner or parent.
One of the darkest elements of today's economy is that we want people to do the right thing while funneling resources to the opposite. The fastest way to riches today is to automate away millions of jobs via AI.
Rutger's books are about how people are good and utopia is more achievable than we believe. Is he right? His books sell better in Europe than in the U.S. We could definitely use more of his thinking here.
For my interview with Rutger, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/72878c2b-6a97-4864-880d-c3b8b67395f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For his book Moral Ambition click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/581bebc0-e69f-41e6-91b3-a45b4153f8de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To check out or apply to the School go to [moralambition.org](https://substack.com/redirect/d071bdc4-328c-4232-ae8d-1c36a4bc3bea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). clean_body: "Be a good person." We've all either given that advice to our kids or received it thousands of times. Most people might interpret it as "Be nice" or "Be kind to others." | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | ---|---|--- * | | | May 12 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- "Be a good person." We've all either given that advice to our kids or received it thousands of times. Most people might interpret it as "Be nice" or "Be kind to others." Rutger Bregman is thinking a lot bigger than that. You might remember Rutger from his books or or his on Universal Basic Income. Now, he's out with a new book, . To his credit, he's put his money where his mouth is, starting a fellowship program, The School for Moral Ambition, and donating all proceeds from the book to the school. He's also moved to New York City from the Netherlands. I interviewed Rutger on the this week. "What we do with our jobs is one of the biggest decisions we make, as the average career consists of 2,000 workweeks," Rutger notes. "But millions of people are stuck in mind-numbing, pointless, or just plain harmful jobs. This is particularly true for some of the most educated, who wind up financiers or consultants." If you've kept up with me for a while, this might sound familiar. I wrote a book in 2014 called that argued that too many American college grads were heading into finance, consulting and law and that more should head to startups that were solving problems in Detroit, Cleveland, Baltimore, New Orleans, Birmingham and other cities. I started a fellowship program, Venture of America that recruited recent graduates to pursue these paths. My version of "be a good person" was "head to an emerging city and help build a company and create jobs." So what is Rutger's? "We need more people solving the real problems of our time, like address climate change, prevent the next pandemic or fight Big Tobacco. There are smart people who have sat down and figured out what we could do that would do the most good across the planet. Those are the projects to which the School for Moral Ambition will be sending people. We call it 'Hogwarts for do-gooders.'" His book opens with a quote from Leo Rosten, "I cannot believe that the purpose of life is to be 'happy.' I think the purpose of life is to be useful, to be responsible, to be honorable, to be compassionate. It is, above all, to matter: to count, to stand for something, to have it make some difference that you lived at all." It's hard to argue with that. He then goes through how various movements have taken root and grown in different societies. I've liked Rutger for a long time, since meeting him at TED 8 years ago. I particularly admire Rutger rolling up his sleeves to try and build the school. I came at it from the other direction, where I was an entrepreneur who had started an org and then wrote a book to try and make the case and spread the word. Rutger has gone the other direction. "I was tired of just writing about these problems. I thought that I should walk the walk and start building the solution myself. It's been very energizing." I wish more authors took a similar plunge. It's a lot easier to commentate than to solve the problem. That said, I think that a lot of the changes Rutger wants to see will eventually require government and politics to improve. There are massive problems that eventually require nation-scale resources to address. Take poverty, for example; philanthropy isn't big enough. That's how I went from fellowship founder to your friendly neighborhood presidential candidate and democracy reformer. If you want to solve some of these problems, you have to get government to become more rational and productive. It's daunting, but also necessary. When I get asked what I do, I sometimes answer, "I'm an all-purpose do-gooder." For most people, trying to be a good person won't involve some massive life change but to be a little bit better where you are and in what you do. Work a little harder, contribute a little more, donate a little more, volunteer more, be more present, be a better friend or partner or parent. One of the darkest elements of today's economy is that we want people to do the right thing while funneling resources to the opposite. The fastest way to riches today is to automate away millions of jobs via AI. Rutger's books are about how people are good and utopia is more achievable than we believe. Is he right? His books sell better in Europe than in the U.S. We could definitely use more of his thinking here. For my interview with Rutger, click . For his book Moral Ambition click . To check out or apply to the School go to . To see what Forward is doing to reform politics in your state click - it's an ambitious undertaking. | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Andrew Yang 111 Sutter Street, 7th Floor, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising **_BIG TIME_** while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!_**
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. _If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short._ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. clean_body: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign | | | My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. "I’m not asking you to cut a big check, all I’m asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!" If you can't afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, "please keep me and my team in your prayers and add your endorsement today:" I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Breaking my silence . . .
body:
In the docuseries I’ll be releasing shortly, you’ll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court.

| [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhnkni5q4l8j2t7aluk0q44ttnlidobcnmifn8uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)
Dear Patriot,

The nightmare I could have never imagined has played out since February 2023, when my hand-selected board at Project Veritas **ousted me from the organization I founded** in a small room on top of a carriage house built by my grandfather.

As you know, Project Veritas sued me, and I counter-sued**. They are now on the run**.

**I 'm not seeking revenge or retribution . . . I'm seeking justice**, and [**I recently decided to tell the full, behind-the-scenes story**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm962be8vstgs239jensnh7vieigtuquhj4tt5i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs) of what has happened and is happening with Project Veritas and the board members behind the coup.

[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpapf73tg5dorgq9vsbf8ih1993ksgoo3ek76rb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)
[**In the docuseries I 'll be releasing shortly**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgrus1grkg302u993b5m92riepno623ql2mm11u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs), you'll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court. To get there, **[**I need your help to cover the climbing costs.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhavf4e1f9meov928snupj45ps5690v5a6iephqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)**

**[**Watch the teaser for my docuseries on Project Veritas here, and help me seek justice.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn8iv81cj2reblbrovl2032h1s921iqhjmnjhll0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)**

[**I sincerely need your help to keep fighting**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4equsmrmuer9h6sojntmhhndu251hlgu826lhk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)to expose the whole story and finally get my day in court. [**Will you donate today to help fund the remaining depositions?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo7joji9gtbhs90qvq96k8ol0mh5ojolchjkktng_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)

My attorney will be working incredible hours this month with five more LENGTHY depositions that will cost around $18k each. **I have $7k left in the retainer account, so I have to raise over $85,000 this month alone.[**Please, will you help?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfcn6vj3thqfihl9tsa7qqo49cs0fl9f2iptdlrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)**

Before you do, [**watch the teaser for the docuseries**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrut9o2id8kdmvaiheqdpt7qnade2d4vleq2bjtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs). Yes, it's cryptic, but for reasons that I can disclose later.

Stay tuned, and please, [**donate as much as you can to my legal defense fund hosted by Liberty Guard**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfo7j1r1g9525l8v3t9smpeklun7rrikuk6bmbe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs). The funds are vitally needed to close this chapter of my life and **serve justice by telling the truth**.

With Respect and Gratitude,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Save California from Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Not on my watch.

| | |
---
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkbbmto3ov9vmqebktlrmc49per40t0tbpih5sb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdcb2179va4r73qkgmu9i2d2uf7hh9s2cuf0u4g8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z88plr48n8g50cc3s4dm7kjjioa0gofhkd1n6a2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1il5mbm196j8t93srvtulqp2hocfgm34omkbj3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z055j8ciofhsrfhmbm0q63damh32re8juhgjd500_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)
---
P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. **[Chip in today and let’s end the one-party rule that’s destroying our beautiful Golden State.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj8lgaqgf0t63jddarfcipf2ilbm58cgb8u5psig_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1hmeob6c9h2bs)**

---
Friend - I've been in some really rough situations in the past, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb...

My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was _**RAKING IN**_ hundreds of thousands of dollars while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session! I'm not kidding - __**a Soros-backed group even dropped $500K on my head all in one shot, Friend!**__

**This is a _BAD_ situation that will spiral out of control if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I am coming to you with a heartfelt plea; [please send in any amount you can to help me and my team close the fundraising gap:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze6268vj89um2edko76eiuqnq4kodr65j6n85hv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm0p34cdh2bs)**

I'm doing _everything_ I can to win this race and keep logging conservative wins. But I know I can't do this all on my own; it's going to take all of us, __and I really mean**all of us**__ , to win.

If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - **all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's _LUDICROUS_ fundraising numbers! [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmd3565laemct0u7lb9qteg297dipd3a6uf3rbl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm0p34cdh2bs)**

[ DONATE $17 OR MORE RIGHT NOW >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrnd97331ghol2rv7nnrgjr94m0000dci0jh4en8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm0p34cdh2bs)
---
[ HELP WINSOME CATCH UP WITH HER DEMOCRAT OPPONENT >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt4l058d1ufo7oki2eg21j2b2ms37bv5mp7k2h9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm0p34cdh2bs)
---
Look, this race is **TIED**. There's _ONLY_ one thing holding me and my team back from winning right now; _my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. _

[**I know we can close the gap and win this race together, but we need to get to work RIGHT NOW!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3kd3vhck1hvpbrrr0e70434lp0khdccn1lijl6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm0p34cdh2bs)
---
[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi4pjv16lnudi67jrrs21rsfuj7vhq0snav68c58_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm0p34cdh2bs)
---
Thank you for being a crucial part of my team, Friend. I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support!

-Winsome Earle-Sears
_Mother_
_Marine_
_Lt. Governor of Virginia _

Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze2ensjr4l2ekmfva52mdp1jjl9rsaf7msdb7op8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm0p34cdh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Outrageous: Qatar gifting Trump $400 million luxury plane. Add your name, and demand this bribe be reversed
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Trump to get $400 million airplane from Qatar as "gift." Demand he reject this unconstitutional bribe](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfb5dc68-4c82-45fa-bde6-c2c88f797fb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8216bdb3-96ed-4fea-8d97-fa5f537ed42e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The ruling royal family of Qatar is gifting Donald Trump a super-luxury jet described as a "palace in the sky", and worth hundreds of millions of dollars. This is a blindingly obvious violation of the emoluments clause of the Constitution, which forbids such gifts, a naked attempt to curry favor with Trump, and there is no way he should be able to get away with this. [_**Demand that Trump reverse himself and reject this bribe NOW.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ab68476-849c-44a4-a77c-7171a62af511/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The plan calls for Trump to use this plane as Air Force One while president, and then take it with him when he leaves, as a "donation" to the Trump Library fund -- meaning he gets to keep it and use it for the rest of his life. This is a truly awful idea in so many ways. It violates the Constitution, the optics are terrible (every other country will wonder if they must also send supersized bribes to be treated equally), and it will cost the US government hundreds of millions more to take it apart to scan for surveillance devices, check the integrity of the plane, and upgrade the security to Air Force One standards. This is not normal, and we should not accept it as such. Trump gets a nearly half-billion dollar gift, the rest of us have to pay a fortune, and the Constitution is once again ripped to pieces by the man who took an oath to defend it. [_**Add your name: Demand that Trump reject this bribe NOW.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8fc0248-5a08-4edb-9b1e-c1712f0039f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc708906b-42df-4db9-8062-e7abfbbf887e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | The ruling royal family of Qatar is gifting Donald Trump a super-luxury jet described as a "palace in the sky", and worth hundreds of millions of dollars. This is a blindingly obvious violation of the emoluments clause of the Constitution, which forbids such gifts, a naked attempt to curry favor with Trump, and there is no way he should be able to get away with this. The plan calls for Trump to use this plane as Air Force One while president, and then take it with him when he leaves, as a "donation" to the Trump Library fund -- meaning he gets to keep it and use it for the rest of his life. This is a truly awful idea in so many ways. It violates the Constitution, the optics are terrible (every other country will wonder if they must also send supersized bribes to be treated equally), and it will cost the US government hundreds of millions more to take it apart to scan for surveillance devices, check the integrity of the plane, and upgrade the security to Air Force One standards. This is not normal, and we should not accept it as such. Trump gets a nearly half-billion dollar gift, the rest of us have to pay a fortune, and the Constitution is once again ripped to pieces by the man who took an oath to defend it. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on * Follow Us | | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

## Pope Leo XIV defends ‘gift of free speech’ in first press conference
THE new Pope has declared his Church’s solidarity with journalists who suffer for reporting the truth, while urging the world’s media to help counter “paradigms of war” across the world. “The suffering of imprisoned journalists challenges the conscience of nations and the international community, calling all of us to safeguard the precious gift of free [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/7SQzWYpeTyPsP59wozoIIKWIwSj14RYT9x-Ih9kONVvB1-1KgUeiwI-8r5xD2apc5xh8-yDRXCduzCerrhEm1NwckR0M4YbOIGbRe8zYpZulzDc1WO4uXdEHmzzrA7Rtr-tdisNwmAj3eBvpPvwwp56oy46MmTuEQNvzM8l7R1nmzS77l1yrlunUpNvH7UpUtMooOUeN6Azm58wi6IQhwg1CVSxmhwKnFf7IcCbprxdfrP38viFRkV2KQcw-TwTUJQ118WCrb5uECYf2zAupWSDG5_c3WEj0APVVCnjQ-UkhrmdbVazj5avpqFLjLqXFXZvbxEWUbDMmYCIzH-VxOryx1wvpOwkFBCpH_ylR/oZISJVsk8gvrP6IMguaSmlkNxsaKdqed/8)

## Mike Tyson, 58, reveals boxing star he would be ‘afraid’ to fight
Boxing legend Mike Tyson has heaped praise on newly-crowned WBC light-heavyweight champion David Benavidez, describing him as "underrated" and a formidable force in the division. Tyson, widely considered one of the most fearsome heavyweights in boxing history, made the comments in a recent interview with ESNEWS. The 58-year-old former undisputed heavyweight champion, who retired after [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/bKKqI8NwgBgFCzKYK1tiejGIlYYegnMi01d6xYzAx8HIJdwZ3EAZ9iIYBbGGnlBCFsHbtD5iRioJY-uv3EfGqV6XxwqjCyTJuFfUT7BnjdEGBLn4Tvq-jROxYaEPPc1Xkm7IeSn6lsvaTiSSqPmJn1hSA9QDj_vD9hNGWFugr1YadA8GAk74V0PK7vcVlIgOdZelNtJ4ESj4k3cJYeIDt8_eSFpOMRHrEePlptH-m0XskckQMw3DV4jMz-hnPihfnYUjmI5SUlHrGyYo1EOrunvlodTLWlTZDZBzGg4VFUUPj0kGL6GAVmHBU84eB_8Z_6iVGPGpUsVfJNU9QgxoNdL0b6wGXfgsvQ/GarchMc5UxOs3XACsv8RlIKVKsYRpRYP/8)

## “Alleged Discrimination at the University of Oregon School of Law,” by Prof. Ofer Raban
Ofer Raban, who is a professor at the University of Oregon School of Law (but who, even more clearly than usual for a law professor, is speaking on behalf of himself and not the law school), passed along this item. I have no direct personal knowledge of the matter, but I thought Prof. Raban's report [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/KL6aRv1tholpeJOQyTB71AdZ5oK-F2C5eG-IDf1E9I4JTzPTQ9QZBCAGhtOgHWv__dXxWwbv4nj92ijyNyjp4889PYpOyR3tnOFvR6IbvYc05AhhomdDKT8xXpt2OZ3oljIBFZWKx_4SW7djDfCeKIdaoM0ld9ZIfg3X2l6EdRE3A2hLEr3g7v3vF_6AOBwvntBVnVMMwbMivrZiKjp7OhBLY7efMAfIjar-gYP1RyMO9-Gqbk1Y6LUxy6Ol8KzPDEcdDTgcoQcXOnUqZBoYppw76j2SnZSL2xZqPQ-n9kP2_irM9aTLUSmKyBJ4iCdkI5yo9oNds5E3RyGOTxGglJz1UpEFu-OF7BACUegDbfhjxmQTf-j5A1JLR5OEaho/LMX38KW-xqSoDlFnXy7dDCAMXJJ7ZFFF/8)

## Here Are the Details on the China Trade Deal – RedState
We previously reported that the U.S. has reached a trade deal with China, after big talks in Geneva, Switzerland. News of the deal broke on Sunday, following hours of discussions involving Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer, and Chinese officials. READ MORE: White House Announces Trade [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/pum_gwNqUsu2AJUl0A8V6gGfsCd5krJbmEFLTepCQ1LNjT0RNe82bwauWL6kNqf4bnPiD9kQx-bKDQTQEggbxqyKI23SNRgnjXH7pCuk_klTFrgPWagpw57XLvXwLThdhNyoFrH7AB34caqEYMqvd-DD6qUpzyMP5OSIUrYQDnPDaYoOIOpzDT95JNVQw2_QPjevOlHzFJrvTL8v3bTneh8hgibDItMwstnbbpjQhJuI7dXl_Dosw34odbKBDtqq0afOPMdX0UqTI9Ut1KWdyWQeEj_hgjgu9nnxFT15dYhPFF1VEn04yVmDFzY665UYEssqUG8r4cajUin1P9VRL00/DT4r8aChOdh85fd61iD04e_BChqy8ZjJ/8)

## Anti-Trump Govs Briefed on National Guard Deployments
FIRST ON THE DAILY SIGNAL—A coalition of Democrat governors resisting the Trump administration scheduled at least two Zoom discussions focused on how to avoid assisting National Guard “protections” and “deployments,” according to email correspondence obtained by The Daily Signal. Executive order templates created for Democrat governors say the states “shall provide no time, money, facilities,” [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/uI_sz17VaP9vAbxWOH5hiJCLIwMBD9L-sQHpCXDLKd0fW1G8HQP6GPsYw_BlEGlB2o8YfY2Z7Vi7ehQJejP6-QbkwzrCww07N-IQ0dFtPbbnr-PKQEl-rSu5Q-5YY4LKY5gjEVATStv1exKyuWzSH0ybVsIkHQTDRe6nVysPMVv-Moh9bt1qevdsvE7pgmSfPF7GV_6Ggiagcu_iFylbmLWA9740TR-hD2S6YV1wBGW4G1i7WM7PmRfv6R-Fdw44-EhZFLdOSgsRnCt_OTX-Syjl2dbNEQMsGLEFBIX9QzaUPRQYR8wIE8Wu6oET6PTVsJipq3RGTa4HU5B7iKiPjyc/SoM_e98TKv4g4QgiExmM2mV6qt-r9iAr/8)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QiOoHnBHSpOr0IbgMTfAgdElq-xnkuONCgxFzQFh2js?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163393022)
* * *
Record-shattering heat in Minnesota this week had meteorologists scrambling. Peaking at 100°F (37.6°C) in Hallock -- just miles from the Canadian border -- the [record heat event](https://substack.com/redirect/27af345f-c441-4535-aca6-e2bfd5c30915?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is [expected to continue through Tuesday.](https://substack.com/redirect/1100e52c-4cc7-4b86-9f77-e0bf86fb1eb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Temperatures will be 30-40°F degrees above the historical average for May and shatter daily record highs by several degrees across the region.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8853fbf5-e787-4447-822a-402f300e1384?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hallock, Minnesota (red map marker) recorded a record-breaking 100°F (37.6°C) on Sunday, May 11, 2025.
As summer approaches, anxiety about the upcoming hurricane season grows, and the outlook isn't providing any comfort.
## **Atlantic Hurricane Season Outlook**
Three primary oceanic oscillations drive global hurricane activity.
_[Click here to read](https://substack.com/redirect/e184c83f-bbb2-446f-884b-86d54bcaaf88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) my detailed explanation of oceanic and atmospheric conditions affecting hurricane activity._
Right now, we're in an [ENSO-neutral phase](https://substack.com/redirect/4cf7f2fc-7c33-4ac8-b6d2-a31eafc9845c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and expected to maintain that through the summer.
The [PDO is still negative](https://substack.com/redirect/71ab4bf3-5ecf-4667-88a6-7e6477cb00ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the [AMO is still positive](https://substack.com/redirect/84e474a4-00af-4a6f-938b-31401e6c7f8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), creating the second-most dangerous possible conditions for Atlantic hurricane activity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7e369878-addf-4a27-8ad5-eb7cdff32b99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Climatologists expect us to maintain ENSO-neutral status through the summer, with a positive AMO and negative PDO (highlighted area).
Consistent with historical hurricane climatology, Colorado State's 2025 [hurricane activity forecast ](https://substack.com/redirect/529d73e6-33d9-4982-b4c6-f6a1eb917a3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)projects a higher-than-average season this year.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7aa6e3c9-c3c9-4337-8c67-0a27963e8a49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Still reeling from the impacts of the 2024 hurricane season -- which saw 18 named systems, 11 hurricanes and 5 major (Cat 3+) hurricanes, and was the third costliest season on record -- concerns are growing over how a greatly-diminished NOAA and FEMA can handle another potentially-devastating season.
One-third of FEMA's full-time staff (more than 2,000 people) [have been fired](https://substack.com/redirect/078244b4-eda0-4d33-b367-5c0802a11e99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as part of DOGE's targeted layoffs since January.
Yesterday,[ news broke](https://substack.com/redirect/ac94ad22-c4ef-4bc3-8b4b-15eeeb1d55f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that training programs for state and local response authorities were either dramatically reduced or eliminated entirely, just as state operations begin preparations for the coming hurricane season.
Organizers of April's National Hurricane Conference in New Orleans canceled several FEMA-led sessions - including one aimed at helping emergency managers make evacuation decisions during hurricanes - after FEMA staff dropped out due to a ban prohibiting non-deployment travel.
The United States hasn't been this ill-prepared for hurricane season since 2005.
I lived on the Mississippi Gulf Coast that year.
It's not something anyone should ever have to relive.

Peter, we know that the news is overwhelming.

From confusion over tariffs to attacks on LGBTQ+ people, to deportations, to threats to the Constitution itself, and more, Donald Trump’s time in office has left the country in chaos and fear.

We’re with you. It’s a lot to keep up with.

But this is our time to work harder than ever. This is our time to take that fear and anger and turn it into action. **From local elections to the state Supreme Court elections, we have a chance to put up roadblocks to Trump’s mission, but we have to put in the work.[Donate $10 here to help us put a stop to these miserable headlines and bring some good news to PA.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107543671/545020330/-1402533371?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250512_FR_Headlines_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDdiMTQ3Mi0zNjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0eVq9sSetadzxAevqFBHNsvflgk8s5ctYKKWiXT5Gs=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: | | Peter, we know that the news is overwhelming. From confusion over tariffs to attacks on LGBTQ+ people, to deportations, to threats to the Constitution itself, and more, Donald Trump’s time in office has left the country in chaos and fear. We’re with you. It’s a lot to keep up with. But this is our time to work harder than ever. This is our time to take that fear and anger and turn it into action. So let me get the MAGA playbook right: **we’re going to cut Medicaid and SNAP so we can pour hundreds of millions of taxpayer dollars into _*checks notes*_ Alcatraz?**
**My challenge to Donald Trump is this: find any Medicaid recipient who would prefer Alcatraz over their essential benefits. I’ll eat my hat.**
This is just a weird and bad idea.
In 1959, the remote island prison cost three times more to operate than ANY other prison in the country, not to mention what it would cost to get the decrepit 100-year-old facility up and running again.
Listen, we can’t let Trump get away with BS like this that funnels money out of critically important programs into useless pet projects for an ego boost.
[**I’m fighting hard to keep him and his extremist friends in check, but my MAGA opponents are raising a ton, and I need your help to get ahead. In 1959, the remote island prison cost three times more to operate than ANY other prison in the country, not to mention what it would cost to get the decrepit 100-year-old facility up and running again. Listen, we can’t let Trump get away with BS like this that funnels money out of critically important programs into useless pet projects for an ego boost. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks, \- Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. body:
We are pleased to invite you to a very special event you won’t want to miss!| | |
---

Hi Peter,

We are thrilled to announce that Her Bold Move will be co-hosting a virtual event with **WomenCount, EMILYs List, Virginia’s List, Elect Black Women, the Next 50, and Electing Women National Capital Region** – and we are especially excited to extend a special invitation to the Her Bold Move network.

**_You are invited_ to join us for the _Virginia Is for Women_ virtual event, which will give guests the chance to hear directly from 10 candidates for statewide and state legislative offices in Virginia.**

[**RSVP TODAY to join us on Zoom at 7:00 p.m. ET on Thursday, May 15. All eyes will be on Virginia this year as 100 House of Delegates districts are on the ballot, plus the Governor’s, Lieutenant Governor’s, and Attorney General’s offices, which are up for re-election in November.

This election year will give Virginia Democrats the opportunity to not only increase their majority and flip executive offices, but also to hand national Democrats a roadmap for making national gains in 2026. Not to mention, with abortion on the ballot, a Republican Governor who has said he’d like to pass an abortion ban, and a 1 vote margin in the VA State Legislature, _the stakes could not be higher._

**Here are the Her Bold Move candidates that this event will support:**

✅ Lt. Gov. candidate Ghazala Hashmi – Senator Hashmi helped draft the language for VA’s constitutional amendment protecting safe and legal abortion, and served as a Chief Co-Patron for the legislation. **She is the only woman in a seven-candidate primary, and is the most experienced legislator in the race.**

✅ Elizabeth Guzmán – A former Delegate who was redistricted out in 2023 and is running to reclaim a seat for pro-choice Democrats.

✅ May Nivar – Running for a seat that has been named the TOP pickup opportunity for Democrats in Virginia. Her GOP opponent was rated one of the least effective legislators in the entire state.

✅ Jessica Anderson – In 2023, Jessica lost to the current Republican incumbent by **only 1.9%** after being vastly outspent. She is already outperforming the incumbent this time around, and is very likely to win the rematch in November.

✅ Kimberly Pope Adams – Like Jessica, Kimberly fell short of flipping this district by **less than half a percentage point** in 2023. She knows exactly what she needs to do to finally win this seat and help VA unseat one more anti-choice vote in the General Assembly.

**Some of these candidates are facing competitive primaries on June 17 and are lagging behind their male opponents in fundraising. We need to ensure they have the support they need to WIN. We hope you can join us to hear what these candidates need, and their visions for Virginia’s future with an even bigger Democratic, pro-choice, female majority!**

[**Please RSVP TODAY to join us on May 15 at 7:00 p.m. ET for this very special _Virginia Is for Women_ virtual event to hear directly from these amazing women. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107545461/545026671/1919652656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ODM4YjY1LTM5MmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p8u4_FuTL3C9dTFskBJoTcqcrehlOpHeFXiBVb2_4Vw=&emci=21415837-192d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=74838b65-392f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=32015042)

We hope to see you there!

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Save California from Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Not on my watch.

| | |
---
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4rpb3dmp564m7nvbsupc67pkbn92n2ps9mivuig_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm8p76c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0ch2dosv16t95hfon7vm1t0029eler2s7rddql0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm8p76c5h2bs) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zijtdcn3id9igvod9vm7k3ebd3u82hesqqrb1lmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm8p76c5h2bs)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi62vttkcr6r8j5q1eqkt243f9s8mfr4pn253qn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm8p76c5h2bs) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdh73avskq4f25g746vpmq48ssnchd75le3s8lgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm8p76c5h2bs)
---
P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. **[Chip in today and let’s end the one-party rule that’s destroying our beautiful Golden State.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze3ef8im6qku1220tec2dsvvarboqj32kj52sbto_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm8p76c5h2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4vs9e22to03qe91a7h7cbt5fg0kkkc93kpak018_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm4o72c5h2bs)
---
| |
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za7qsruaqhhtjcp8bkqk5bjuu7074qqagaf6m32g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm4o72c5h2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbdcq4j2p2funlfasrotvh935ui5q56uvh8pb1b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jm4o72c5h2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Stand with Bernie to Save Public Media via Our Revolution
subject: "If Trump cannot take criticism, he should get out of politics"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21084?t=1062&refcode=email-20250512_v&akid=8440%2E5885482%2Ep--9uP ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump’s attacks on our independent media have reached chilling new heights
– he signed an Executive Order to defund NPR and PBS and has declared war
on ANY media he doesn’t like.

Bernie and Our Revolution are fighting back:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25233?source=email-20250512&t=1112&akid=8440%2E5885482%2Ep--9uP ]Bernie tweet stating that freedom of the press is what sets us apart
from dictatorships

The good news is Congress still has the power to stop him, but they won't
act unless we come together to OVERWHELM them with calls to save our
public media.

undermine independent journalism and silence voices that hold power
accountable. Trump has long hated factual reporting, labeling reporters
“enemies of the people” and targeting public media as part of a wider
assault on truth and transparency.

name: Leader Scalise
subject: I was worried before. But now I’m terrified.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Every arm of the Democrat Machine is coming straight for the heart of our MAGA movement:

| |
---
| | | _I hate coming to you like this. But at this point, I 'm desperate._

I was worried about how this election cycle started. But now I'm terrified of how it may end. Every arm of the Democrat Machine is coming straight for the heart of our MAGA movement. This is what I mean:

---

\- A radical House Democrat just filed _Articles of Impeachment_ against President Trump - The Liberal Media is salivating at the prospect of _removing_ him from office

\- AOC and Bernie Sanders are whipping up _35,000+ person crowds_ across the country

- A Liberal _" Shadow Cabinet"_ is actively working to sabotage President Trump's Agenda \- The DNC's _network of paid protestors_ is igniting outrage against your President and attacking Conservatives with impunity
---

And that's not all...

The latest reports indicate they've stockpiled 37 MILLION DOLLARS to obliterate Conservatives in every swing district on the map. That's over one million dollars to unload into each of their GOP target districts!

The ONLY THING standing in the way of Democrats seizing control of the House - and stonewalling every part of Trump's agenda - is just a few competitive seats.

_That 's it._

I don't tell you this lightly and I know that's not what you want to see happen to our country.

**If we don't act NOW, the Democrats will steamroll us in the 2026 Midterms, impeach President Trump immediately, and unleash a torrent of Witch Hunts against Conservatives nationwide. This is a nightmare scenario.**

As Majority Leader, it is my responsibility to defend our MAGA House Majority. And that comes with the responsibility of knowing when it's time to ask for help.

**[That's why I'm rushing to you asking for your help to raise a game-changing one million dollars to hold the line. Can I count on you to respond?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4ng1r56lmt1a2hi3u6n3d2i8boromg89f327gl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jmcpr4clh2bs "That’s why I’m rushing to you asking for your help to raise a game-changing one million dollars to hold the line. Can I count on you to respond?") **
---
| | | [PLEASE: DO YOUR PART!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zit7p5it3neu51nubhoj53u9n5mksi353me6ao1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jmcpr4clh2bs "PLEASE: DO YOUR PART!")
---
I know what you're thinking...

This is a lot to ask at a moment's notice. It would be much easier to call it a day and not even try.

But if this is what it takes to win, I'm willing to chase down every lead. If all you can spare is ten or twenty bucks, that would be incredible. If you can afford more, that's even better. I only ask that everyone give SOMETHING.
**[Can you do that for me?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zuifl42osgjes94ckk72slujek8gqb64eaar7400_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jmcpr4clh2bs "Can you do that for me?")**
---
| | | [PLEASE: DO YOUR PART!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zteojmd605pu7u6r170c4p0nhc3a1s4sbd110pl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jmcpr4clh2bs "PLEASE: DO YOUR PART!")
---
Thanks for all you do.
- Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_

---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zuhdkc0n31fjg6jm2lkru659c6u1ea5gi7sbd518_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jmcpr4clh2bs "Liberal Trump Resistance")
---

If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**
---
| | | [DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zicuc1bbm4s21p0lopk011kcatta50u1uqieq99o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c1jmcpr4clh2bs "DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW")
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Survival Food Kit
subject: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21512/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/17a760813fb9f9c9b9333e6560a4d586f12b1380). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21512/6374453/25e77bba955c7c645dd6aee9f15933cd925f0014/17a760813fb9f9c9b9333e6560a4d586f12b1380?message_id=IjMwYjY2NmMwLTExOGUtMDEzZS01ODVjLTI2MDM0ZWZkNzI1NUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21512/6374453/ed1056bdd72b65f48b54b157b3aed065f64650c4/17a760813fb9f9c9b9333e6560a4d586f12b1380)
---
---
|
---
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis**
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21512/6374453/ed1056bdd72b65f48b54b157b3aed065f64650c4/17a760813fb9f9c9b9333e6560a4d586f12b1380)
---
**This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21512/6374453/fce66f667a2254d90c7065824041fef425b06178/17a760813fb9f9c9b9333e6560a4d586f12b1380). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21512/6374453/fce66f667a2254d90c7065824041fef425b06178/17a760813fb9f9c9b9333e6560a4d586f12b1380) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21512/6374453/fce66f667a2254d90c7065824041fef425b06178/17a760813fb9f9c9b9333e6560a4d586f12b1380) on these survival food kits while you can. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21512/6374453/fce66f667a2254d90c7065824041fef425b06178/17a760813fb9f9c9b9333e6560a4d586f12b1380)

clean_body: Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... | | | Unsubscribe . We'll miss you - so will great opportunities. To view this email as a webpage, click =. | | | The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: “Food shortages are coming.” Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. clean_body: We can make BIG changes in Virginia — starting right now | = Peter, we have a BIG update from Virginia: The Cook Political Report just moved Virginia's governor race rating from TOSS-UP to LEAN DEMOCRAT! = The writing is on the wall: Virginians want change, and they want leaders who will PROTECT their rights, not destroy them. The movement is on our side, Peter, and we know EMILYs List champion Abigail Spanberger has what it takes to flip this seat. = | = All eyes are on Virginia, Peter. The outcome of this race in November will set the stage for 2026 and beyond. Here's why: If Winsome Earle-Sears becomes governor, the GOP will see this as a green light to continue with their extremist, undemocratic agenda. But if Abigail Spanberger becomes governor this year, her victory would send a BIG signal that Democrats are ready to fight back and win BIG in 2026. That's why we need to continue building on the strong foundation Abigail's campaign has built: mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and reaching voters across the Commonwealth. This new race rating is proof — our hard work is already paying off this cycle! = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. President Donald Trump unexpectedly **[invited his wife, First Lady Melania](https://substack.com/redirect/d38c558e-5ef2-494b-9027-fd114d19d16f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to the podium during a military mothers event at the white House.
**[What she says next](https://substack.com/redirect/d38c558e-5ef2-494b-9027-fd114d19d16f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** proves why she is the best First Lady America has ever had:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d38c558e-5ef2-494b-9027-fd114d19d16f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Trump started by congratulating his wife's efforts renovating the Rose Garden at the White House, "That is the most beautiful thing,... you did some job, thank you very much honey."
Trump invited Melania to the podium, guiding her to the microphone with care. "Thank you for your kind words," Melania thanked her husband before addressing the military mothers in the room.
"Motherhood, the life changing event that makes women invincible and exposed at the same time," she started. "All mothers understand this feeling. Nothing against fathers of course, but in my opinion, and I'm sure everyone in this room agrees, only a mother can grasp this particular point..."
**[Watch Melania's incredibly moving speech](https://substack.com/redirect/d38c558e-5ef2-494b-9027-fd114d19d16f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that will make you view motherhood in a new way.

# **Kash Patel OUTSMARTS smug Democrat who tries to humiliate him in front of the nation**
FBI Director Kash Patel had **[a tense exchange with Democrat Sen. Patty Murray](https://substack.com/redirect/5af5d402-9543-4449-ab82-facaa3982552?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about the alleged weaponization of the FBI against Trump's opponents.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5af5d402-9543-4449-ab82-facaa3982552?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You committed that there would be no weaponization of the FBI under your leadership," Murray told Patel. "You've reportedly placed FBI employees responsible for investigating the January 6 cases on leave, is that keeping up your promise of no politicization, no retribution?"
Patel sighed in annoyance by the senator's question, "It is because that's wildly inaccurate! Let me tell yu what the FBI has done since I got there, 8,276 federal arrests, 820 KG seized of fentanyl, that's enough to kill a quarter of a million people, over 3,000 firearms seized, 350 gang cases,..."
Murray began to cut Patel off, trying to steer the conversation back to her line of questioning.
"Well you asked if I was weaponizing the FBI and I am not, I'm giving you the hard, concrete examples of the men and women putting handcuffs on bad people doin harm to our children and innocent Americans!" Patel fired back.

name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: May 15 Zoom with VA State + House candidates
body:
In Virginia, 2025 is the prelude to the 2026 midterms
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
Victories in state elections this year will be the most potent signal Democrats can send against Donald Trump's dismantling of our democracy. And his administration will have a front-row seat to the most-watched elections this year, just south of DC in Virginia.
All 100 delegates districts plus the governor's, lieutenant governor's and attorney general's offices are up for re-election this year, giving Virginia Democrats the opportunity not only to increase their majority and flip executive offices, but also hand national Democrats a roadmap for making national gains in 2026.
That's why we're teaming up with WomenCount and the Electing Women Alliance for a May 15 digital fundraising event benefiting 10 candidates for statewide and state legislative office in Virginia.
[Donate now to RSVP and join us at 7 PM ET on Thursday, May 15 on Zoom in support of these candidates.](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017oeCWp1ccoFhUm5kT5kGASG4b4mftPfgMakWVr9pGXYO2HBVjOVORpWfAn2ieyJys1uAwINrVxnvLzq795WoDKlpH4JRGfT7WoJ-VgiY2geDdze0KxKgpwifNF2L2fTUdZD6dt_awidc8GX87TnJt3qmJ_qUvogy5LIKPyqmtoaOayzwjRnbN8PhtN4UBIWZNEw3Jgs5vjo=&c=xWGWhyk6DQ_zKojmWqT4J7F84iGWU60otm-gbvnHplJk82M3AbKwtQ==&ch=Zhbq7ygj-4gyjUVA0jUuaEM2DoZZ0jI6xFUyOB-ZnDXkWXAlfpy1pA==)
Donations will be divided evenly among the candidates below. You can also customize your contribution. Zoom information will be provided in your donation receipt.
The candidates:

* District 22 candidate Elizabeth Guzman, a former Delegate who was redistricted out in 2023 and is looking to reclaim a seat.

* District 41 candidate Lily Franklin, who ran last cycle and lost to the incumbent Republican by only 183 votes.

* District 57 candidate May Nivar, who is in a two-person primary for this district that local leaders rate a top pickup opportunity.

* District 71 candidate Jessica Anderson, who lost in 2023 to the current Republican incumbent by only 1.9 percent after being vastly outspent.

* District 73 candidate Leslie Mehta, a medical charity founder who carries an endorsement from Abigail Spanberger.

* District 75 candidate Lindsey Dougherty, who's mounting a rematch in a district she barely lost to the current incumbent in 2019.

* District 82 candidate Kimberly Pope Adams, who fell short of flipping this district by less than half a percentage point in 2023.

* District 89 candidate Karen Robins Carnegie, a lawyer who's taking on the only open, competitive House seat.

Many of these candidates are facing competitive primaries on June 17, and need our support to make sure gains for Democrats in Virginia are also gains for women--because right now, these women are losing the money race:

* Of the top 10 House of Delegates raisers, only three are Democratic women running in competitive races.

[Please donate now to RSVP and save your spot for our May 15 joint Zoom event benefiting Virginia candidates](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017oeCWp1ccoFhUm5kT5kGASG4b4mftPfgMakWVr9pGXYO2HBVjOVORpWfAn2ieyJys1uAwINrVxnvLzq795WoDKlpH4JRGfT7WoJ-VgiY2geDdze0KxKgpwifNF2L2fTUdZD6dt_awidc8GX87TnJt3qmJ_qUvogy5LIKPyqmtoaOayzwjRnbN6B9g6MNzZcyqd9j6R4VpWI=&c=xWGWhyk6DQ_zKojmWqT4J7F84iGWU60otm-gbvnHplJk82M3AbKwtQ==&ch=Zhbq7ygj-4gyjUVA0jUuaEM2DoZZ0jI6xFUyOB-ZnDXkWXAlfpy1pA==)

clean_body: In Virginia, 2025 is the prelude to the 2026 midterms | | | | | | Friends- Victories in state elections this year will be the most potent signal Democrats can send against Donald Trump's dismantling of our democracy. And his administration will have a front-row seat to the most-watched elections this year, just south of DC in Virginia. All 100 delegates districts plus the governor's, lieutenant governor's and attorney general's offices are up for re-election this year, giving Virginia Democrats the opportunity not only to increase their majority and flip executive offices, but also hand national Democrats a roadmap for making national gains in 2026. That's why we're teaming up with WomenCount and the Electing Women Alliance for a May 15 digital fundraising event benefiting 10 candidates for statewide and state legislative office in Virginia. == Donations will be divided evenly among the candidates below. You can also customize your contribution. Zoom information will be provided in your donation receipt. The candidates: District 22 candidate Elizabeth Guzman, a former Delegate who was redistricted out in 2023 and is looking to reclaim a seat. District 41 candidate Lily Franklin, who ran last cycle and lost to the incumbent Republican by only 183 votes. District 57 candidate May Nivar, who is in a two-person primary for this district that local leaders rate a top pickup opportunity. District 71 candidate Jessica Anderson, who lost in 2023 to the current Republican incumbent by only 1.9 percent after being vastly outspent. District 73 candidate Leslie Mehta, a medical charity founder who carries an endorsement from Abigail Spanberger. District 75 candidate Lindsey Dougherty, who's mounting a rematch in a district she barely lost to the current incumbent in 2019. District 82 candidate Kimberly Pope Adams, who fell short of flipping this district by less than half a percentage point in 2023. District 89 candidate Karen Robins Carnegie, a lawyer who's taking on the only open, competitive House seat. Many of these candidates are facing competitive primaries on June 17, and need our support to make sure gains for Democrats in Virginia are also gains for women--because right now, these women are losing the money race: * Of the top 10 House of Delegates raisers, only three are Democratic women running in competitive races. == | | | | Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US | | | | | | |
