name: Devan
subject: Introducing myself!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there team, I'm Devan, and I'm the Executive Director of the DSCC.

Over the next two years, it'll be my job to develop our winning strategy to put Democrats in the _strongest_ position possible to flip the Senate blue. But I can't do that without insights from supporters like you, so one of my first priorities as Executive Director is to build a team of Democrats to inform my advisors.

**They told me that you were in our top ten percent of supporters last year -- so it's clear that I can rely on _you._ That's why I'm asking you to take my new strategy survey:**

[**Please, click here to enter my official Democratic strategy survey >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21654?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250512-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250512-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20235%2E9716520%2Emtr5F0)

| | [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21654?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250512-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250512-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20235%2E9716520%2Emtr5F0)
---

With competitive elections all over the map and _even more_ MAGA loyalists up for re-election, we have a golden opportunity here. **We have the chance to unseat far-right Republicans AND replace Trump's worst enablers with strong Democrats who will fight for our rights.**

But in order to lock in our victory, I need to gather critical data immediately from motivated supporters like you. **I'm _100% confident_ your insights will sharpen our strategy.**

[**So please, will you accept the invitation to join my strategy survey before the midnight deadline? name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Update: Democrats just won an important fight
body:
---
Derek, FIRST: North Carolina Republicans spent months filing baseless lawsuit after baseless lawsuit, attempting to overturn the results of the state’s Supreme Court race. THEN: Democrats fought back. The DNC fought alongside Democrat Allison Riggs’ campaign and the North Carolina Democratic Party to help ensure every North Carolinian’s ballot counted. NOW: _We’ve won that fight._ A federal judge recently ordered the certification of Justice Riggs’ election, and her Republican opponent finally conceded. [When you pitch in to the DNC, you’re supporting work like this to make sure that people decide elections — not politicians. name: John Padora
subject: My family fled authoritarianism for a better life — now I’m fighting to protect it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/GVDTFkBTaZW-7al5uGXS_0Hl3dm0mG3LXgGj4V9JqsWBMT5ycClXIUvki9czbVqZoI4ogYBfAciBqlcwSz8FJNjxKXPTFMAmpnzTjZUOrISjYyWaHqPptXgL9R_EVrMtAteHaNxO6cTphyYcYrHfpbNLrv7D3yNpUwYQV5bx-lJ6uErQGQ8Cmryegu42kCkCXZa9DesQWkaAKKwuM8UgpanOqhC0zmDzioX2tQzmgSTFX-8qROFhTcUgAZfJfkr7Wo6vk6iAXVqSxUYV6B2BIQZLW6s--L8sSaE8IvvAvwHIdxNZgGY_qI7PpJDOSsXc9u1vwxHzG4uyhsRTjpbpbZctUmoUSI-3YFkKzuLP95qEh4cJrkIBa3paYzRiviOxWMNUMeGwvaAFLslwvJ18EVEku_rlKcHwFrAdL5G1B76QIxHppgMSIK8UFd7XyIOzO_dKTH7w4kRwy43qM3I/3_1RdKvSHT28RPY361E2EHq0kNIUmNE2/8) Friend, My name is John Padora. I’m a manufacturing engineer, a husband, and a father — and I come from a long line of working-class fighters who believed in this country before it believed in them. I’m not a politician. I’m a working man who’s fed up with the lies, the corruption, and how our “leaders” look down on families like mine. That's why I'm running for Congress. **[Will you join me by pitching in $5, $10, or more to help start my campaign off strong?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/E9Fc_Xg19httxI265nmtsOlUZbTF2z_mGDZxO5-jf-Giaj9HTqwN2MTqMPQ63We6VVT2ZcuFcloGJBORqxjgUnuLgAzJf7Qd3ISfUIgqlvTg6ozKAOh94PiSqwieK4d7aCm05erpFD_TLeU_N8HagUSFWipWScEw2-HWhfeRZwhOKBm9i8tVVOYuaVL4YLr3oyD0cc25F7HCtW0P967-68pLWDsEbBOxbYD0pkHw-pDMHkt-s17hVA-kBoQNCcNEANlzytKa19Dj3FUeIJk302JbjgnpTMlSyMKeF_LmVZHWTyvfCuTZaTRz1gZQKCGBVu8l12mu1Kotrwgu1I5IoIXG-wRmjuDYEosXaUpswH85fLE1TidTNpgh8a9Gj01PD_-PnSwYZ9kAqXj008wBP83Jq8C-0TBzzmDeRqMh35MQsf6M_ZiWA9fIdmA_wCN7-zIMSLlAhSZjYiedbLg/S6qEJYOxwADYvI0aUh72V7BS4kBs-slx/8)** A hundred years ago, my great-grandparents boarded a boat from Southern Italy with nothing but hope in their pockets. They were fleeing authoritarian rule and economic despair, chasing a dream — the promise that if you worked hard, you could build a better future for your children. That dream carried through the generations. **My family helped build this country** — in the coal mines, in the fields, and with their hands. My grandfather farmed the land. My mother became a nurse and a caretaker. My father was a carpenter who taught me that hard work wasn’t something to avoid — it was something to be proud of. He gave me a hammer, nails, and an unrelenting work ethic, and told me to never quit, no matter how tough it got. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/p6Zk-NFSRya2y2SEgsfxO0jea_iMUA9O7ZkJXAXAcEG288MLAK9oheS3szGwiqPh1_KJw5nhN_1oXRD2oS1kb0lFoBYvfdv1uTFmXYx6gewk2GTji5ChL05F4a0vQ8oLJjXaAO8YbBv-foVgUd8HVWA8DDNyCsvsi4LoTmgSLf3S2nFjoPfMZEZn6MoUhhdCJz0bkiCx850JcX2xONux7PEDP95q7rbogomgjnsjDztq_u_5_R7dE6MtaRDqrAhTIcOg5csI2Y87wwjN40pezWIXlNJRWc77qS2eXYtITedY6aNiVN_u3_2xkId9zkoW2f6LyCp01WevtnhZYQSIQ90lgNuUtQI_GxQzu5HiKXf-bCHrWYLcjc1h7_r9X74aBGvUocXE2ykWI0X8xGLMpHqYK5zS9_ptP512cU1NSpsn7fxfk7rGjAKtefF_MfdHBnB4v6noecH-vksuk_Q/1nDFkScM1rdeoZzrWV8e2-2qgWwCWv-i/8) I grew up in a blue-collar town where people made things with their hands — homes, bridges, machined parts, futures. We weren’t rich, but we were proud. We believed in dignity, in honesty, in community. And now? _I look around and wonder what my great-grandparents would think of what America has become._ While working families are drowning in debt, MAGA Republicans like Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert push tax cuts for billionaires and call it “freedom.” They look to gut Medicare, Medicaid, veterans’ benefits, and Social Security to pay for it — all while the rich buy their fifth yachts and vacation homes. The cost of groceries is out of control. Healthcare is more expensive and more inaccessible than ever. And manufacturing — the backbone of this country — is teetering on the edge thanks to reckless trade wars and corporate greed. They say this is patriotism. **But it’s a lie.** Trump and Boebert don’t care about the American Dream. They care about power. They care about keeping working families like mine divided and distracted while they loot our future. That’s why I’m running for Congress — because we have one shot to stop this madness, and it runs right through Colorado’s 4th District. They moved Lauren Boebert here because they thought she’d be safe. They thought we’d be too quiet. Too tired. Too disconnected. We’re building a movement of working people — factory workers, nurses, farmers, teachers, caregivers, veterans, and parents — who are sick of being treated like we don’t matter. We’re talking to independents. We’re meeting with moderate Republicans. We’re focusing on kitchen table issues that actually affect people’s lives. **[Will you pitch in today — $10, $25, whatever you can — to help us build the momentum to take back this district?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/xbpYdPjxWPlNExdOQ9OmKsjjkYyd80cPlJxznJUSpWc4eMDVHNWzVbUhdZd-JG6FjYWj3k97yCzagVPxNZ-ls_7GDrC9ppoPgF5KBpsNhV-jQFvrBHVzlA0DjLkKj8ZxLuzx4SWAU6KeFFa9US1skL36YXjcTKaywY_KKWEcwjGBFcd-KPhCuru2Df9xhSGzYe80n3CzHrIIp7P7Q_FoXPtKB-2Bw-HAt8gSSS2Jrxa5Mlb53-dwxQbZf_TnjbW8Lc2uLAsPPBtLMKtD7-M2Fa4uf-Z2i7ZrLGlWVaPqiSBIElJ1NglDmQt14uxraFLDLKdh_pPkZoYlotmzqB-bQlXWwh0oylI2w6t6EVPCa_b7BpVp-n5RlcPoBvXPeLDOK9g9I-_Img0gXA26uvyJNayviNe36jLbDcasQfeTuxE0pEp6JJT7_ka6ub9jzgwD81WOni0CiAbXXlXi0Zc/6gA-nMO5dvo7vTZtdW7Le_KGp2B_c1lJ/8)** Let’s remind them what real patriotism looks like.
It’s standing with your neighbors, not turning on them. It’s lifting each other up, not tearing each other down. It’s fighting for a future where our kids can afford to go to the doctor, where they can dream without being buried in debt, and where no one is too poor to live with dignity.
That’s the America my family came here to find. It's the America I still believe in. It's the America I'm willing to fight for.
I'm grateful to have you on my team,
John Padora

While working families are drowning in debt, MAGA Republicans like Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert push tax cuts for billionaires and call it “freedom.” They look to gut Medicare, Medicaid, veterans’ benefits, and Social Security to pay for it — all while the rich buy their fifth yachts and vacation homes. The cost of groceries is out of control. Healthcare is more expensive and more inaccessible than ever. And manufacturing — the backbone of this country — is teetering on the edge thanks to reckless trade wars and corporate greed. They say this is patriotism. But it’s a lie. Trump and Boebert don’t care about the American Dream. They care about power. They care about keeping working families like mine divided and distracted while they loot our future. That’s why I’m running for Congress — because we have one shot to stop this madness, and it runs right through Colorado’s 4th District. They moved Lauren Boebert here because they thought she’d be safe. They thought we’d be too quiet. Too tired. Too disconnected. We’re building a movement of working people — factory workers, nurses, farmers, teachers, caregivers, veterans, and parents — who are sick of being treated like we don’t matter. We’re talking to independents. We’re meeting with moderate Republicans. We’re focusing on kitchen table issues that actually affect people’s lives. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Let’s remind them what real patriotism looks like. It’s standing with your neighbors, not turning on them. It’s lifting each other up, not tearing each other down. It’s fighting for a future where our kids can afford to go to the doctor, where they can dream without being buried in debt, and where no one is too poor to live with dignity. That’s the America my family came here to find. It's the America I still believe in. It's the America I'm willing to fight for. I'm grateful to have you on my team, John Padora Paid for by Padora for Colorado

clean_body: | | | Peter – Andy Barr pretends to be a conservative, but don’t be fooled. He’s a Mitch McConnell protégé, bankrolled by Liz Cheney, and he’s voted alongside Nancy Pelosi more times than we can count. Now he wants a promotion to the U.S. Senate so he can keep betraying President Trump and selling out Kentucky conservatives. Club for Growth Action is fighting back. That’s why we to expose the truth about Andy Barr — and we’re running it across every corner of the Bluegrass State. | | We need to keep this ad running and ramp up pressure before Barr officially enters the race. ⬇️ | | Let’s make sure Kentucky voters know exactly who Andy Barr really is. For Freedom, David McIntoshPresident, Club for Growth Action | | The Club for Growth Action is committed to electing the best pro-growth, limited government candidates around. name: Team Sharice
subject: Our nation is moving backwards
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Prices aren’t getting any lower. Health care isn’t any more affordable. And Kansans’ fundamental freedoms are getting weaker, not stronger

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107555590/545055304/-945052836?refcode=email_051225_Reflector&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmY3NDZjMy00ODJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4h0PQACt17jnEX_r3Gej9xHvK7bP66nL7h2S74-uMm0=) It’s been a little over 100 days since Donald Trump began his second term — and what exactly has he “accomplished” for the people of Kansas in that time? He’s imposed a series of reckless tariffs, which could raise household costs by $3,800 a year and devastate Kansas farmers and consumers alike. He’s thrown his full weight behind a National Republican budget that could kick thousands of Kansans off Medicaid and jeopardize people’s retirement security. And he’s given Elon Musk free rein to fire cancer researchers and threaten our Social Security payments — all while Elon’s companies receive **$38 billion** in government contracts, loans, subsidies, and tax credits. **But most importantly, we should focus on what Trump _hasn’t_ accomplished. Prices aren’t getting any lower. Health care isn’t any more affordable. And Kansans’ fundamental freedoms are getting _weaker_ , not stronger.** [_**But Sharice is working to change that. No matter how many attacks or distractions are thrown her way, she’ll keep pushing to deliver results and relief to families all across Kansas — but she can’t do it alone. Please, chip in today to help Sharice keep fighting for us in Congress and protect this competitive district from National Republicans.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107555591/545055305/-945052836?refcode=email_051225_Reflector&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmY3NDZjMy00ODJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4h0PQACt17jnEX_r3Gej9xHvK7bP66nL7h2S74-uMm0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107555592/545055306/-945052836?refcode=email_051225_Reflector&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmY3NDZjMy00ODJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4h0PQACt17jnEX_r3Gej9xHvK7bP66nL7h2S74-uMm0=)

And Kansans’ fundamental freedoms are getting weaker, not stronger = It’s been a little over 100 days since Donald Trump began his second term — and what exactly has he “accomplished” for the people of Kansas in that time? He’s imposed a series of reckless tariffs, which could raise household costs by $3,800 a year and devastate Kansas farmers and consumers alike. He’s thrown his full weight behind a National Republican budget that could kick thousands of Kansans off Medicaid and jeopardize people’s retirement security. And he’s given Elon Musk free rein to fire cancer researchers and threaten our Social Security payments — all while Elon’s companies receive $38 billion in government contracts, loans, subsidies, and tax credits. But most importantly, we should focus on what Trump hasn’t accomplished. Prices aren’t getting any lower. Health care isn’t any more affordable. # **Governor Braun Signs Bill Requiring Non-Profit Hospitals To Lower Prices Or Lose Status**
---
| | WANE 15 Marin Murphy
May 9, 2025 [hhttps://www.wane.com/top-stories/gov-braun-signs-bill-requiring-non-profit-hospitals-to-lower-prices-or-lose-status/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/c6NLO1XnpN52EZ02h6yB1DPoa3IsHVUgxP5rpRyN4uJ10b7Fyv7_t52IdhYMAP04PI2JS-h8-FZC-4H4UrjxAVmAeIHcsOvPI5KFOxaQr8K7GnIBpPemVAAcIQormkmmGFwr2MRmrqDMh4HWXpioeBaIBlNHSYVmncg6iqFg-SHHJAigvcrOM7W1TN4pDJdqdHAJUy0YytscUTAisXfselP0PKYhjKe24uE_Krwy0ZGMH8t7ILkdhT4fLhayImwD9QUDhEaEb4AA0gfLZCcy0AtSBwSP9cPIvj4rQ0cKrHbJhBVezqsdLxWLnH9e8iBbk6kKcgeL9feoHDhgiUXPm6XjAXoBrBxoPiDlbdIeyFc9/bngxFv3DlxIJ4NysXx0tXjnKEYXjISJ6/8) Indiana Governor Mike Braun signed into law Tuesday a bill that requires hospitals to lower prices or lose their non-profit status. House Bill 1004 requires Indiana’s non-profit hospital systems to submit audited financial statements and work to lower inpatient and outpatient prices to the statewide average. The bill passed through the Senate on April 29 and was signed into law by the Governor, who gave hospitals currently in nonprofit status until June 2029 to abide by the requirements or face losing nonprofit status.

When the bill was first introduced in January, Devin Anderson, with the advocacy group Hoosiers for Affordable Healthcare, applauded the bill, calling it the most significant piece of legislation in Indiana in recent years to curb hospital prices, which he said are the ninth highest in the country. His group provided numbers that demonstrated what the bill’s passage could mean:
* Ascension St. Vincent: Reduce prices by 40.5%
* Parkview Health: Reduce prices by 40.8%
* Community Health Network: Reduce prices by 34%
* Deaconess Health System: Reduce prices by 23%
* Franciscan Health: Reduce prices by 30%
* IU Health: Reduce prices by 40.6%

According to the bill, by June 30, 2029, it requires an “Indiana nonprofit hospital system’s aggregate average inpatient and outpatient hospital prices to be at least equal to or less than the statewide average. States that a violation by the Indiana nonprofit hospital system results in a forfeiture of its nonprofit status.” WANE 15 previously spoke with Beth Lock, Director of Government and Legislative Affairs at Parkview Health, who said, “We look forward to working with the Indiana General Assembly to evaluate the impact this bill may have on non-profit hospitals and find meaningful solutions to lower the cost of healthcare.”
[To Read The Full Story Click Here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/C-4mRA-DpcKeKuKIfPXu10GD03AUs_vPhaxQTh2n262F3i1S4dh3S5JUxry6Gz1rii6dVVriq85qVk1lGMmcZUf8WE9tnsvGplSkQ19X_hI8zA1r5dSRFMVVkSj-nOlpV4oBnrShPPEbecNVXO34ZKpqOYwS0BjsPhPo9TWfUlVFtjj-QADeEwgpa93HHofnwkQd0AxgXV7sqBsqxKl9eGiKsGHI6TaKvdTgFDM99bvNK1IrWdXpsde3B3hz2bqJHCjjzoFYFMXPZvBSDeaT7KloowV_THv2XJW1KpXCl_vYWp3XHwOhfSmCPJ1VmuZqq_av--DxL1FPaiywTIAS128SZjqhTwvUvRCQ_A4rYkdH2rc_nXMIfZESeYYcj-U/0mNf5EBvhB1BM2VSZjxQuNwVPh3Mb-wo/8)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Brace yourself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

subject: First Trump. Then Miller. Now Alex Jones.

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107558597/545066540/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1936-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA2YTkzZS00YzJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9shVIjXcwMl3cB2A0ogUaEr1KttqqgxblneJ9WUMXI=)
---
First it was Donald Trump.

Then Stephen Miller.

Now Alex Jones – a notorious conspiracy theorist – has joined the smear campaign, spreading even more lies in a desperate attempt to discredit our work.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107558598/545066544/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1936-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA2YTkzZS00YzJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9shVIjXcwMl3cB2A0ogUaEr1KttqqgxblneJ9WUMXI=)
Let’s be clear: This isn’t about right and wrong or good policy vs. bad.

It’s a coordinated smear campaign. They’re trying to intimidate me, discredit my office's work, and silence anyone who dares to hold them accountable.
Why? Because I’ve stood up to Trump in court. Because I’ve protected medical research funding and free speech. Because I’ve fought back against extremist policies targeting immigrants and vulnerable communities.
And I'm just getting started, Peter. **But I need your help to keep fighting back. | | Peter, it’s time to bring the fight. I know I won’t stand by and watch as rights and freedoms are stripped from my fellow Pennsylvanians. I won’t stand by and watch as oppressive tariffs hurt our economy and raise costs of living. I won’t pretend things are okay when they’re not. **We need to know what it means to fight, because we’re going to have to fight hard in the face of Trump’s administration. ** To fight means to speak truth to power when leadership is failing to protect the people, and standing up to unelected billionaires who aim to cut Social Security and Medicaid. It means working every day to lift working families out of poverty by advocating for policies that benefit everyday Pennsylvanians, not just the ultra-rich. It means investing in public education against budget cuts and threats to dissolve the DoEd, because our kids and grandkids shouldn’t have to lose access to quality education because of a reckless federal government. **To fight means to not lose sight of what matters – _the people._** People like my working-class parents, a hairdresser and a union bus driver, who juggled careers and raising our family. Who work as hard as they’re able and still are forced to struggle. [**Will you join me in bringing the fight? We need you on our team if we’re going to send the message that Pennsylvanians are fired up »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107558633/545066744/15868926?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_051225_TOFIGHT_ATO_D1_S1_RES1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDZkMDY2NC00YzJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZUQcrbS8Ma4w1mFMOLaBZh3UglA0n7pUXZqPXNbHRw=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s time to bring the fight. I know I won’t stand by and watch as rights and freedoms are stripped from my fellow Pennsylvanians. I won’t stand by and watch as oppressive tariffs hurt our economy and raise costs of living. I won’t pretend things are okay when they’re not. We need to know what it means to fight, because we’re going to have to fight hard in the face of Trump’s administration. To fight means to speak truth to power when leadership is failing to protect the people, and standing up to unelected billionaires who aim to cut Social Security and Medicaid. It means working every day to lift working families out of poverty by advocating for policies that benefit everyday Pennsylvanians, not just the ultra-rich. It means investing in public education against budget cuts and threats to dissolve the DoEd, because our kids and grandkids shouldn’t have to lose access to quality education because of a reckless federal government. To fight means to not lose sight of what matters – the people. People like my working-class parents, a hairdresser and a union bus driver, who juggled careers and raising our family. Who work as hard as they’re able and still are forced to struggle. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Austin Davis * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. Can you chip in today to help? | = = Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis Friends of Austin Davis PO Box 304 McKeesport, PA 15134 United States If you need to unsubscribe,

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: A true progressive champion for Detroit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter, it’s Alex.

We launched Donavan McKinney’s campaign two weeks ago. Today, we’ve got
big news: Rashida Tlaib just endorsed him.

She’s standing with Donavan — a lifelong Detroiter, public servant, and
Justice Democrat — because she knows how much it matters to have real
allies in Congress.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-1?refcode=em20250512-36667&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36667_1203867_LlYxCk&akid=36667%2E1203867%2ELlYxCk ]And now we need you to stand with him too. Will you rush a split
contribution to support Donavan’s grassroots campaign and Justice
Democrats right now?

This is the first endorsement any member of Congress has given to any
Democratic primary challenger this cycle.

This endorsement is a huge moment. Rashida has been censured for calling
for a ceasefire, smeared for standing up to AIPAC, and relentlessly
targeted for speaking truth to power. She knows exactly what it takes and
the kind of fight Donavan is stepping into.

Rashida represents the Congressional district directly next door to MI-13.
She knows better than anyone that Shri Thanedar needs to go because this
district needs a real fighter who will stand up to Trump, and Rashida
needs another ally in Congress to fight by her side.

We’re building Donavan’s campaign from the ground up, and we know what
could be coming: a flood of AIPAC and other special interest money,
establishment opposition, and attacks on his values.

But there’s a clear path to victory — and it starts with all of us showing
up early and sending a message that this movement is strong, united, and
growing.

The more we raise in these early weeks, the more powerfully we can show
that Donavan has momentum and a grassroots movement behind him — and that
Rashida won’t be alone. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-1?refcode=em20250512-36667&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36667_1203867_LlYxCk&akid=36667%2E1203867%2ELlYxCk ]Rush $5 now to fuel our fight →

Donavan is a lifelong Detroiter from a working-class family who’s spent
his career in public service and community organizing, dedicated to
helping students, workers, and our environment.

I can’t stress enough the importance of electing more leaders from the
community they represent who will stay committed to their working-class
and progressive values once they’re in the halls of power.

Donavan is exactly that kind of leader, which is why he’s the first 2026
candidate to be endorsed by Justice Democrats and our first new primary
endorsement in years.

He’s also an anti-war candidate who is committed to rejecting campaign
contributions from AIPAC in exchange for votes to enable the ongoing
genocide of Palestinians — something we desperately need more of in
Congress.

Justice Democrats and its grassroots movement of people like you stood
with our leaders like Rashida when she first ran in 2018 and when she was
up for re-election in 2020, 2022, and 2024, and then stood by her side
when House colleagues censured her for leading the call for a ceasefire
and lasting peace in Palestine as the only Palestinian-American member of
Congress.

This is exactly why we need to grow the Squad. Leaders like Rashida need
more allies alongside them when they’re fighting for working-class people
and standing up to the billionaires and wealthy elites who control our
system. The more true progressives we send to Congress, the more we can
ensure our communities are represented — not just the interests of the
powerful, but the actual needs of everyday people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-1?refcode=em20250512-36667&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36667_1203867_LlYxCk&akid=36667%2E1203867%2ELlYxCk ]The work to make Donavan the next Justice Democrat in Congress starts
NOW. Please pitch in anything you can to build momentum for his campaign!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-1?refcode=em20250512-36667&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36667_1203867_LlYxCk&akid=36667%2E1203867%2ELlYxCk ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250512-36667-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36667_1203867_LlYxCk&akid=36667%2E1203867%2ELlYxCk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36667%2E1203867%2ELlYxCk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204o6yiyo287ts2fh83axw1c62ng53zhzklg5mqkc4465l6lhhkjhpb31f06be6c4fgfuwfbnfo986l2ip0&__stmp=sw5pik&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhctt3rgjc6pp87lxwva01em51x5aengm8boj6htsfuxyy0v7o29pi4vn46aep73zrc6v49092d9pymdh2teabicqcagk82p803a79loubdsv5ddiuqw0qqenm4dree6f0n88vofm0kuaxu8fj3wni6g4g7k22zsx2kkjrsokrau4skgx1yllrzvp7eqnfb6vrllk51jslc55zt1xft65uykvzuwzo5jaaoc250hjqo357fr656ispnt4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY – but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhczm7kqaukkhfu3dwpeq09c8zj5zcof204litsjefji0c40gsrnve8dcoe5efymbg7xbe3h7hx74zusmyerm8dqlsb89803xfppcvrbrwgn8lcuflydsrwqfpz4dklxr6pyezezi9pj3z3y0vb0kso4e4kh48wfba4gu2njladiz65ulnmy1or66p6uclk27zp506uh9a9b3p5os9th6tcvoydt0kr263azfuqldfvs9f5hlq6yitzjw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h)**
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhcf3oskrndwqqe7jw7idkd6om95yapdfdwyhe2q4gp6qg7utwepbap05xpyfm1te8b0irkc6ar4hac4c731hdy3w6bxw7jflyz39ei2orj5kfb9dsgkisc1nt5u45701os1oe8uutfnuaal76mtx0trrrbe6qu6g9mc2b7v0jhn5ho7pwk8396eluwz666jhgcm27lf2of912fzmbuw7sg45y0pqwa6zv0xwhf3y8cfqquoez6poy0p8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h) [**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhckislu64w5j02o3w215j8yrix5xyqcxv09h2zgsgesekn04b5rhwt8wfl3fcsagz6s33fx5t92ybjf5dpatmse4ibkh7hwprief2or9n00aza0ak36othzfwzhsnqqzuuriiap4c8bjcmopehk7wyc2csb8wrvkgsxzo3426kbawuhdgxg55krezkdxorfw23r49sch1oeketk55v98rjakx99e6jn4kovo977szk6ulgfxi63ecof7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhd4bxu1ijodrxos9vi5vhc2vuj5wwrbpmrigp9meh7d72qtdfuu1sxt02wwg6hhj1zh9das4m30pd5txnan2fnsbyco67fmd96uonee662hqtydyrnpev1mna68etxf9awgt147cka4odhbwrtqg4e0c17ymcoj3ryt7kkb3s2479bw649s72c2xfoi0uab89sw6mjazbioiu68lxvk9r19dwu65f6rypat3yxnn35vzx7mr55g8gb9z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h)
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhdmuc0xzc5ok6ywrvc9jg7uz595vusa51hvfzgd4hz1x6tlqjhw7obbrn61gzn2ls5msrvn32ik4ep60hkjao65mocbt7d152s7hx95315c4nxuvivx8w6ifday4zf7hgz915w2p73udft2d22hsajnpnkvoimm80eoexgm4b5ubki8wpj28ltbqkd0rajwisfb8oqysqrig7gvg1wzmq4gwvd2vrrw3f0qgllr5uoie6vd8q5wal1bv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhdsngv5qujksdiaxvwqneakcdx5ustyifn6eks7si2nlmxt228yp8fjgvduh3cm1gybz3q61hchhfwgss9w9h0fh2d2e7aduhbjqgbtli8wg5w9tpdeaxovnh6lsg0yu0bzx9lilruj6h2rjaao392y0ybsr27zoxk8p8bh5k8j8a2ikzwami9o8454gh6swa6gmphw92lsdjugatxonp8rpulkj1aax8ooyppuljw9idi81z5n53q5n&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._**** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time.** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II – and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps – I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhdy4l1b5ncvlp6edvqubd6qgpj5tquxawcfe91zeitypqakb6xav4k69eolhw5t4944fd910awfygeui0w6hphureds37ytialyk45gidnrvlv0qh004yu5fkbof08146e25qrdxzknxizf4n9ebf7izjspt850t743jhxs77ondp9xoj8mof0l19v9m1ro8hvlorou1dv0bz75ujy1ooo06u8hmzjf2zampcdygodz1p8agi51x7cxz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h) [**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhddk3w8i4v5tksijv8z3bzgk095sovwso6sdvz44iiiduesomkcb12qb0ksi0wa6zxw0r3hltqdpi07nwgfsic70udfq7w8mu9otpy7fyqm9ftdoo87wzzeo27c56rrcogsbuhy7ipc0k96mjh9opp7n87mvq2pxe9luut18srcm2s9d6hiqbexgqjpb7a7j2j4qsfrgs2wzohsppycpnrwlttdam6jw308545cadl05kx5a54e1o31z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhdjd82eyjnd0vd13v2dta5n1yx5rmwv83y3cg8wsjo75yhjlrnegj6z49vjislh922l72kckm8b4j7hd55s2rwhx8e6b7tkanv20z2wctt4lzsu9fsr0afqg5c3toygouih9znsg4f4rlgvtwsbkjutkuk7xvlccprh35oy9bv4edyk5svusyw8zwnu4pj3xmm9sumpz4y4x2vd7fzrqmv5esca1is21uo5itvgv76pmvjytq4utsrtf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day – not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year – please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please – if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=2j207emmudedabwfzt7b1j5nm152osmyhe3woxopc4ov5159uihhyyd58j5q8xtlh1cc4g0ejdtvclryvah0fmhvu5qijr2nswqpcfxj32yhkrw6bs2zkrw5kew07rb24edviujzovlbtr97maysbl1o98sfug8kal9fddnsp8uh1ria726xtzexfb4zbj3gkxcze87mkyvnsfyvc74uvnhsbbyvw5l9tzquvdnrf5aue8229a4r9ycxrlwrub6uja3zgjkpypcr5m3mz48jwdjb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw5pik&__onlt=h)**_ Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY – but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II – and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps – I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day – not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year – please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: Ted Cruz
subject: ENOUGH IS ENOUGH of NPR’s shameless bias!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Let the left-wing megadonors keep this corrupt “news” outlet afloat.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9OUFItQmlhc2VkLUFnYWluc3QtQ29uc2VydmF0aXZlc18yMDI1MDUxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PU5QUi1CaWFzZWQtQWdhaW5zdC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/vf2fQFQUiiEFO_AuPNe8og)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Last week, President Trump took bold action via executive order. I applaud him for it.

_He has SHUT DOWN TAXPAYER FUNDING for the Corporation for Public Broadcasting_ - that's where our federal government has sent billions upon billions of dollars over the years to funnel to NPR, PBS, and local public radio and TV stations - citing their shameless bias.

I'm thrilled the day has finally come...

**We 've been paying for this trash my entire life and it's time for REAL ACCOUNTABILITY for these far-left propagandists posing as journalists!**

We can't let up in this fight. We must stand united against bias at public media entities. **** HELP END POLITICAL CENSORSHIP AND UPHOLD FREE SPEECH ****
---
[ **RUSH CRITICAL SUPPORT >>>** ](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9OUFItQmlhc2VkLUFnYWluc3QtQ29uc2VydmF0aXZlc18yMDI1MDUxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PU5QUi1CaWFzZWQtQWdhaW5zdC1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmVzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/uFjFDUnmwsMygHxPcOh2iQ)
---
The Communications Act requires public media outlets, like NPR and PBS, to strictly adhere to "objectivity and balance in all programs or series of programs on a controversial nature."

Last Congress, I put out a report detailing how NPR took millions in earmarked donations from left-wing megadonors for very specific coverage that mirrored their political agenda...

**Yet we have NPR CEO Katherine Maher desperately trying to convince lawmakers that NPR doesn 't have a serious story selection problem - _even when senior staff are resigning over this very issue_!**

Enough is enough the shameless bias against conservatives and conservative viewpoints we've seen from NPR and PBS. Let the leftist megadonors keep them afloat as more and more Americans tune out their woke nonsense.
For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---

subject: What Barack Obama said about Haley Stevens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Folks: Democratic Congresswoman Haley Stevens just announced she’s running for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat! [**(You can become a Founding Donor to her battleground campaign – which The Cook Political Report has already rated a “Toss Up” – by splitting a $20 donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton here.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107560078/545071957/698416938?refcode=250512_MFC_Stevens_ObamaVal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODY5YjNiYi00ZjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQYRvK4EfZi3bUtMgLiLHfy9MP_g34-JEt-7g2Sb5dM=) Rep. Stevens has a proven track record of fighting for Michiganders, the Michigan economy, and good union jobs. In fact, before her time in Congress, Rep. Stevens was chief of staff for the U.S. Auto Rescue Task Force under President Barack Obama, _**which saved over 200,000 Michigan jobs.**_ _**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107560079/545071958/698416938?refcode=250512_MFC_Stevens_ObamaVal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODY5YjNiYi00ZjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQYRvK4EfZi3bUtMgLiLHfy9MP_g34-JEt-7g2Sb5dM=)**_ Michigan has long been the backbone of the American economy, but right now, Donald Trump’s shoot-from-the-hip tariffs are causing chaos and uncertainty throughout the economy, especially in the auto industry. That’s why we need strong Democrats like Haley Stevens in the U.S. Senate to help take back our Senate majority and serve as the ultimate check on Trump’s reckless agenda. But with Michigan’s Senate race set to be one of the most expensive and competitive of the midterms, Haley needs a strong grassroots team to help her compete against Trump and the GOP, who are slated to shell out tens of millions of dollars to defeat her. **As her campaign gets underway, can we count on you to help us hit our $1 million launch goal? We’re counting on your grassroots support to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats.[Click here to become a Founding Donor and split a gift between Seth Moulton and our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107560080/545071959/698416938?refcode=250512_MFC_Stevens_ObamaVal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODY5YjNiYi00ZjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQYRvK4EfZi3bUtMgLiLHfy9MP_g34-JEt-7g2Sb5dM=)** Thank you, Team Haley

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The REVIEWS Are In....
body:
Last week was interesting... My FIRST book, "Chasing After The Wind" was released for pre-orders. I have been blown away by the response! Many have
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21265883.11464.1.d46c195d2ff2e4b482cf928d9cedf322) |
---
Last week was interesting... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21265883.11465.1.6b1bb309c095c2258fd53ed4d7bcdbe0) was released for pre-orders. **I have been blown away by the response!** Many have actually started reading the [eBook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21265883.11466.1.a6a1e0c9f9b5ecb20a5e867cb03c7ccb) before the hard copy arrives in the mail and the reviews have been _INCREDIBLE_! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** plus the **downloadable eBook** for tablets and phones as well as **theme song** as a bundled package here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21265883.11467.1.3fdc5ba4f8adfef457bbd0a274686d4b)_ A **BIG** shipment of books arrive this week for me to sign and then they will be sent out. I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21265883.11468.1.482a408efde6a5ed9d37a7462806478d) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21265883.11469.1.3245946a3d04d396a95f28526217561f)
---
You can get the **Special Edition Signed Copy** plus the **downloadable ebook** and **theme song** today by visiting: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21265883.11470.1.8080175bc907e9bd7fb0d30c4029f25f) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Read: CHASING AFTER THE WIND ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21265883.11471.1.3321289e412b8452767fbbd8ef7e0ac1)
---
---
---
©2025 Jackson Lahmeyer | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
---

name: Mark Warner
subject: Derek, I’m downright fed up with the level of corruption and chaos we’re seeing from the White House:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Trump administration has made it clear who they are fighting for – and let me tell you, it’s not the working Americans who voted for them.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107561352/545076127/964891317?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FedUp_250512_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjRiNzVjZS01MjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o6LgY1aCU-Dg-bKaAsuuowFttA3ppCVRWr6YaEGsf0g=) Derek –

I’m downright fed up with the level of corruption and chaos we’re seeing from the White House:
* Donald Trump is poised to accept a $400 million plane as a gift from Qatar.

* Elon Musk’s company is cutting lucrative deals with foreign governments while these same countries are trying to appease Elon to get trade deals from the administration.

* Republicans in Congress are writing a bill to cut taxes for the richest Americans.

_Meanwhile..._
* Republicans are backing massive cuts to Medicaid – which would rip access to health care from millions of Americans to pay for tax cuts for the wealthy.

* Elon’s DOGE bros are purposefully making it harder for Americans to access Social Security and Veterans’ benefits.

* Pete Hegseth still faces no accountability for playing fast and loose with classified information and endangering the lives of our servicemembers.

**The Trump administration has made it clear who they are fighting for – and let me tell you, it’s not the working Americans who voted for them.**

I am leading the fight against Trump, Elon, and their reckless administration – but I can’t be in this fight alone.

[_**My mid-month fundraising deadline is in 3 days, and I’m counting on your help to hit my $25,000 goal, protect this seat in the Senate, and keep up the critical work to hold this administration accountable. Can I count on your donation clean_body: The Trump administration has made it clear who they are fighting for – and let me tell you, it’s not the working Americans who voted for them. | | | = Derek – I’m downright fed up with the level of corruption and chaos we’re seeing from the White House: Donald Trump is poised to accept a $400 million plane as a gift from Qatar. Elon Musk’s company is cutting lucrative deals with foreign governments while these same countries are trying to appease Elon to get trade deals from the administration. Republicans in Congress are writing a bill to cut taxes for the richest Americans. Meanwhile... Republicans are backing massive cuts to Medicaid – which would rip access to health care from millions of Americans to pay for tax cuts for the wealthy. Elon’s DOGE bros are purposefully making it harder for Americans to access Social Security and Veterans’ benefits. Pete Hegseth still faces no accountability for playing fast and loose with classified information and endangering the lives of our servicemembers. The Trump administration has made it clear who they are fighting for – and let me tell you, it’s not the working Americans who voted for them. I am leading the fight against Trump, Elon, and their reckless administration – but I can’t be in this fight alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = ****=** **=** **=** **=** **=** The fight continues, Mark ****=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90075?t=6&akid=19834%2E878179%2EVHhy1J) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90075?t=7&akid=19834%2E878179%2EVHhy1J) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90075?t=8&akid=19834%2E878179%2EVHhy1J)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90075?t=9&akid=19834%2E878179%2EVHhy1J) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90075?t=10&akid=19834%2E878179%2EVHhy1J)

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19834%2E878179%2EVHhy1J). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19834%2E878179%2EVHhy1J).**

name: Dani Hupper, Evergreen
subject: Happening NOW: GOP gutting vital programs to fund billionaire’s tax cuts
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
What you need to know and how you can help
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3579924/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| House Republicans are trying to take billions of dollars in climate funding away from households, workers, disadvantaged communities, businesses, cities, and more. We can’t let this happen. [SEND A MESSAGE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3579925/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We need your help now, .

We’ve been raising the alarm about Republican plans to attack essential programs like Medicaid, food assistance, and climate, clean energy, and environmental justice programs.Last night, House Republicans made it official by releasing some of the actual text of their budget bill—**which means** **NOW is the time to act. **The GOP Energy & Commerce Committee released a reckless spending plan that cuts essential, life-saving programs to fund a multi-trillion-dollar tax giveaway for billionaires, polluters, and big corporations.We read through dozens of pages of bill text, [_summarized and analyzed the impacts_](https://evergreenaction.com/press/rapid-analysis-house-gops-proposed-clean-energy-repeal-and-what-it-means-for-the-affordability-crisis?utm_medium=email) , and have created a way for you to take action to defend these critical programs. |
---
[TAKE ACTION NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3579926/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| So, what’s on the line?In addition to their shameful cuts to critical health programs like Medicaid, Republicans are going after at least $6.5 billion in climate and clean energy funding. They’re also abusing the rules of reconciliation by attempting to:

* Repeal Clean Air Act standards that limit the amount of pollution cars and trucks can spew
* Allow gas pipeline projects to bribe their way out of the normal permitting process with a $10 million payment
* Repeal cost-saving, pollution-reducing programs like the Greenhouse Gas Reduction Fund, Environmental Justice Community Change Grants, Climate Pollution Reduction Grants, and more

The House is expected to vote on this **NEXT WEEK** so there is still a small window of time to act, and**we need everyone stepping up.**

Our families and communities deserve clean air, affordable energy, and a safer climate future. We’ve been warning for months that this Republican Congress would try to destroy so much of the progress we’ve made to tackle climate pollution, reduce toxic air pollution, and rising energy costs—well, **now they are** and **now we must act**.

[**_Call your representatives today and tell them they cannot vote for a budget bill that repeals climate and clean energy programs, which protect our health, our pocketbooks, and our communities._**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/page/83031/call/1?ea.tracking.id=email) |
---
[CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3579926/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thank you for taking action today and for being with us in the fight ahead.Onward, |
---
| | |
---
### Dani Hupper
Campaigns Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3579927/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3579928/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3579929/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**
---

body:

| **_OFFICIAL CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR_**
---
Peter,
---
The Democrats’ plot to **BUY** the midterms runs much deeper than their reported fundraising hauls.

**These Far Left extremists also have _hundreds_ of dark money groups with _BILLIONS OF DOLLARS_ from George Soros and other Democrat megadonors at their disposal! **

In the 2024 election, Democrat dark money groups spent a record **$1.2 BILLION** in support of their radical, liberal candidates.
---
That’s about twice as much as Republican groups – _a difference of nearly_ **_$600 MILLION!_**
---
__This__ is how the Democrats are able to elect Far Left radicals with such unpopular, extremist positions, Peter.
---
They know they can’t win a free and fair election on the issues, so they rely on their dark money groups to spend BILLIONS to **BUY** key races.
---
That brings me to the troubling reason I’m writing this report...
---
**I just got word that Democrat dark money groups are planning to SHATTER that $1.2 BILLION record in order to BUY the House majority for Democrats in the midterms.**
---
_Massively outspending us is the only strategy that works for them, so they’re fully intending to make 2026 _the most expensive election in history!_ _

I don’t want to sound alarmist, but unless we start ramping up our fundraising **RIGHT NOW** , we are going to **LOSE** winnable seats...

name: Adam Schiff
subject: One thing we know about Trump?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

If there’s one thing we know about Donald Trump, it’s that he loves to
post on social media. A lot.

And one of his favorite topics to post about? Me. He’s been posting about
me kinda nonstop. It’s weird:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]Trump on Truth Social: The Democrats are really out of control. They
have lost everything, especially their minds! These Radical Left Lunatics
are into the Impeachment thing again. They have already got two No Name,
little respected Congressmen, total Whackjobs both, throwing the
Impeachment of DONALD J. TRUMP around, for about the 20th time, even
though they have no idea for what I would be Impeached. Maybe it should be
for cleaning up the MESS that they left us on the Border, or the Highest
Inflation in our Countrys History or, perhaps, it should be the
incompetent Withdrawal from Afghanistan, or Russia, Russia,
Russia/Ukraine, Ukraine, Ukraine, or the Attack of Israel on October 7th
that only proceeded because they allowed Iran to regain Great Wealth.
These Congressmen stated that, they didn't know why they would Impeach me
but, We just want to do it. The Republicans should start to think about
expelling them from Congress for all of the crimes that they have
committed, especially around Election time(s). These are very dishonest
people that won't let our Country heal! Why do we allow them to
continuously use Impeachment as a weapon against the President of the
United States who, by all accounts, is working hard to SAVE OUR COUNTRY.
It's the same playbook that they used in my First Term, and Republicans
are not going to allow them to get away with it again. These are total
LOWLIFES, who hate our Country, and everything it stands for. Perhaps we
should start playing this game on them, and expel Democrats for the many
crimes that they have committed — And these are REAL crimes. Remember,
Shifty Adam Schiff demanded a Pardon, and they had to use the power of the
Auto Pen, and a Full Pardon, for him and the Unselect Committee of
Political Thugs, to save them from Expulsion, and probably worse!

Derek, Trump
might think that whatever he posts becomes a formal directive. Governing
by tweet, some might call it.

But when he posts, the results are...

❌ No concrete action to address the main concerns of the American people.
❌ No thoughtful debate over his destructive tariff policy.
❌ No progress whatsoever.

Derek, the
only real result from Trump’s Twitter screeds is usually something like
this:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]Arrest Adam Schiff trending on Twitter

This is not how we’re going to lower costs, reestablish strong
relationships with democracies worldwide, or protect our planet. We must
push back against a president who thinks that governing and tweeting are
the same thing.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]Derek, I am
doing all I can to provide relief to our families, defend our democracy,
and stand up to Trump. His attacks are relentless, but they will not stop
me from doing my job and working for you, the people. Please chip in to
help me in the many fights ahead.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=q22025_abs_em.efKol3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q22025_abs_em.t0y3Np&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q22025_abs_em.AXrWKq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q22025_abs_em.9qgQdN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q22025_abs_em.D7tjFE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q22025_abs_em.kWZd31&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=8570%2E5257348%2EMgemaR ]Privacy Policy

Glenn Beck:“I urge you to understand the poison that [leftist indoctrination] is and PLEASE make a donation to the 1776 Project PAC” Matt Gaetz:“Would you PLEASE consider making a donation of $17.76 or more to help take back our school boards from the radical left?” THIS YEAR, we’re launching a COUNTER REVOLUTION to destroy the Soros-funded chokehold over our nation's schools. But we’re 100% funded by grassroots patriots like you... and we’re falling FAR behind our fundraising goals this year. **With Soros weakened by D.O.G.E and the Trump administration, NOW is the time to STRIKE! | | | Paid for by 1776 Project PAC PO Box 2891 Springfield, VA 22152 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee |

By wearing it loud and proud The Gulf of America isn’t just a place — it’s a mindset. It’s where you go when you stop asking permission from people who hate this country, and start fearlessly loving our great country! Sun... Palm trees... Freedom... No DEI officers, no drag brunches... Just America as it was meant to be! This is the gear that they don’t want you to wear! ✔️ Crisp white hat with patriotic palms and an American flag! ✔️ Guaranteed to get looks around town! Sincerely, Marjorie Taylor Greene _

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Their 2026 revenge plan.
body:
Fellow American, I didn’t fight every day of 2024 to Secure the Senate to turn around and lose it next year. I traveled to battleground states, rallied voters, and, with your generous support, raised critical funds for exceptional candidates. Together, we built a U.S. Senate majority to last. |
---
Fellow American,

I didn't fight every day of 2024 to Secure the Senate to turn around and lose it next year.

I traveled to battleground states, rallied voters, and, with your generous support, raised critical funds for exceptional candidates. **Together, we built a U.S. Senate majority to last.**

**But now, the Democrats are gearing up for the fight of their lives.** After a terrible 2024 for the Left, they are doubling down and raising more money than I ever thought was possible to defeat us in the midterms. They are already mobilizing for 2026 with a fierce determination to undo our victories.

**They're coming for us, Fellow American, and this time, it's personal.**

**[I'm up for re-election in 2026, and there is no doubt my seat will be the Left's #1 target for standing with President Trump.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d696da9a7fda48239512a0a1af619c90&_e=SEQbm8ppaJ34fERut-SQzEzaFoz8Rv0C0fvTmtSbcsBHnpsCQhIt6SBVG1cLkgEqJs1V_FVTXhblNOwzx-CSCLsyM17nOPOWzTaMhcyZ4aPBshyEKyVclBc81A7bDgSVPIjAdrgY6OTvVv1mSz1OaYI7OHMuZVlNZdcW8_w9cEay7OeRM6jUywHVevGh-C_5WaOiAUT_qRgXcFgY7J2PsLtgV-guNbUh7rHwqIhs4sXHlvEIHOczVDpajqS7IYa0rK8O2As0u3ruMmXRBhS8tYI1FgX8dEsEhrgZekNjYIsppKXNxiA02NPNvGT33x7HjrGWcXZVTu5z7l16nOPOHfLz2E6yWljLHU46GKwztSvq-DQHcgBIG_oYWs5HmhglrRI3eLve5njxje-9zuJI4ttleRQ5rwBYQ1D8zmdCdTs%3D)**

They want to flip South Carolina **Blue,** end my work alongside President Trump, and dismantle everything we've achieved together.

**We cannot let the Democrats succeed.**

| [**KEEP SOUTH CAROLINA RED**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d696da9a7fda48239512a0a1af619c90&_e=SEQbm8ppaJ34fERut-SQzEzaFoz8Rv0C0fvTmtSbcsBHnpsCQhIt6SBVG1cLkgEqJs1V_FVTXhblNOwzx-CSCLsyM17nOPOWzTaMhcyZ4aPBshyEKyVclBc81A7bDgSVPIjAdrgY6OTvVv1mSz1OaYI7OHMuZVlNZdcW8_w9cEay7OeRM6jUywHVevGh-C_5WaOiAUT_qRgXcFgY7J2PsLtgV-guNbUh7rHwqIhs4sXHlvEIHOczVDpajqS7IYa0rK8O2As0u3ruMmXRBhS8taiBzD-sI-1MD5GHvd-FNmIoMpggGjolaaxVdT6UZWk-ge4VQVpCgZXmYyWZVMQ1-5skHzg1Gmimg5ttHZTH2aeEUDaVNKD4A5X7_tkKPmCuVpqqvANNAdegaF9E14Ir48eisD2LS8tsfRVCEXc3BCY%3D)
---

Our 2024 success came from starting early, uniting, and acting decisively. We must do it again. By replicating our winning strategy now, we can build a campaign strong enough to stop the Left and keep America winning.

**[Fellow American, if you don't want to sit back and watch the Left ruin our momentum and achievements, will you chip in right now?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d696da9a7fda48239512a0a1af619c90&_e=SEQbm8ppaJ34fERut-SQzEzaFoz8Rv0C0fvTmtSbcsBHnpsCQhIt6SBVG1cLkgEqJs1V_FVTXhblNOwzx-CSCLsyM17nOPOWzTaMhcyZ4aPBshyEKyVclBc81A7bDgSVPIjAdrgY6OTvVv1mSz1OaYI7OHMuZVlNZdcW8_w9cEay7OeRM6jUywHVevGh-C_5WaOiAUT_qRgXcFgY7J2PsLtgV-guNbUh7rHwqIhs4sXHlvEIHOczVDpajqS7IYa0rK8O2As0u3ruMmXRBhS8tRllnbnfl9naMRArl0LfEP52-fYxS-rGIlHslZIufCoQ8xtPS7LpezKT5ZJ8hzc0wzTLJ_S9JjoTAaWp-bOsPASYhbtLptEeEpKc93N-Ss0cEZDVsZ6L-DoxpfexajjZyrNtBBi58yBAmtcd0PUdyes%3D)** Any amount you can spare will help me build a strong campaign and ensure we stop the Left early.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Republicans are happy to kick millions of Americans off their healthcare plans to pay for tax-cuts for the super-rich.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1632%2E791427%2E_t-T3J)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-medicaid/?source=em250512-1-180&akid=1632%2E791427%2E_t-T3J)
Friend — I believe healthcare is a human right.
Republicans, however, are happy to kick millions of Americans off their healthcare plans to pay for tax-cuts for the super-rich.
It’s going to be an intense week in Congress as the GOP works to push through their bill that would cut hundreds of millions of dollars from Medicaid.
Their plan would be a disaster that would worsen income inequality in America and take us even farther from the goal of universal healthcare coverage. Hospitals could shut down, families will go broke, and people will almost certainly die without their coverage.
I’m opposing these cruel attacks on Medicaid with everything I’ve got. But I need your help.
In order to block these cuts, we need just a handful of Republican members of Congress in swing districts to feel the pressure and vote against them. Remember, Speaker Johnson currently controls one of the slimmest House majorities in modern history.
So I’m asking you: **[Can you sign my petition today calling on Congress to do the right thing and save the Medicaid plans that millions of Americans depend on? Add your name and help us put pressure on key House members who will decide whether Medicaid is protected or slashed.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-medicaid/?source=em250512-1-180&akid=1632%2E791427%2E_t-T3J)
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-medicaid/?source=em250512-1-180&akid=1632%2E791427%2E_t-T3J)**
Help us show that a vast majority of Americans want to protect Medicaid, and that those who vote to kick millions off their healthcare plans will be held accountable by the voters.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1632%2E791427%2E_t-T3J)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1632%2E791427%2E_t-T3J)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1632%2E791427%2E_t-T3J)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1632_791427__t-T3J&akid=1632%2E791427%2E_t-T3J)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

But I need your help. In order to block these cuts, we need just a handful of Republican members of Congress in swing districts to feel the pressure and vote against them. Remember, Speaker Johnson currently controls one of the slimmest House majorities in modern history. So I’m asking you: Help us show that a vast majority of Americans want to protect Medicaid, and that those who vote to kick millions off their healthcare plans will be held accountable by the voters. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Empowering Congress to overrule Trump’s cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Trump is cruelly shifting resources away from those who need them most to the very richest among us.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107563014/545082982/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTNhZGE2Yy01NzJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7bkX2kn19aYmsDlBJRxC_pzzQxEQY9CqLvjVEQDLEM=&emci=fb9dd4ae-552f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=aa3ada6c-572f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Trump and his unelected billionaire accomplice Elon Musk's reckless decision to fire tens of thousands of federal employees threatens the critical services that families, veterans, seniors, and children rely on. **This has nothing to do with fiscal responsibility — it's about cruelly shifting resources away from those who need them most to the very richest among us.** Gutting resources and staff from vital programs is sabotaging services, causing pain for folks in Oregon and across the country. Congress must act now and exercise its oversight of the executive branch. **That's why I introduced the Reduction in Force (RIF) Review Act to empower Congress to overrule workforce cuts at federal agencies.** The RIF Review Act puts a critical safeguard in place: if an agency wants to gut its staff, the reduction in force plan is subject to a vote in both houses of Congress. This way, we can create another important check on Trump's power grabs and protect the public from harm. **Congress needs to hold the executive branch accountable.** We must protect the programs — and their workers — Americans need to thrive. Let's get it done! Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

| | Friends,

The far left has once again filed an extreme candidate against me. If they are successful in their efforts, the Council will have nobody left to speak and fight against the unfettered increases to taxes and fees that the King County Council has become famous for in recent years.

We must have someone on the Council who can hold the line against the ever-increasing costs of living.

In a time when all of us are paying more in taxes, food, housing, gas and other services, we must have someone to hold the line against the most extreme Seattle politicians.

I**' m will continue to fight for you but I need have your help to do it. Could you please [make a contribution right now](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=26d19a283e&e=77eef70c61) to my campaign for the King County Council? ** Businesses and individuals can give up to $1200 each. subject: Gov. Mills saw Trump in court — and she WON.
body:
This is what true leadership looks like |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107563832/545085542/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE526_20250512_QuotesKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056075&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjBkMWUzMS01YTJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHUh0O4hodiaocnXYPUOUo5vWhjFb27usYzupK_7eMk=) Peter,

Maine Gov. Janet Mills didn't lie — she saw Donald Trump in court and she WON.

Gov. Mills refused to comply with Trump's order barring Maine trans kids from playing sports. Consequently, the U.S. Department of Agriculture suspended all funding for a child nutrition program in Maine. It was petty, political revenge.

So, Gov. Mills took the Trump administration to court — ultimately securing a huge victory earlier this month when the Trump administration backed down and stopped cutting off funding for Maine's nutrition program.

**We need more leaders like Gov. Mills. Mills refused to comply with Trump's order barring Maine trans kids from playing sports. Consequently, the U.S. Department of Agriculture suspended all funding for a child nutrition program in Maine. It was petty, political revenge. So, Gov. Mills took the Trump administration to court — ultimately securing a huge victory earlier this month when the Trump administration backed down and stopped cutting off funding for Maine's nutrition program. We need more leaders like Gov. Mills.
