* * *
### The Billionaire-Owned Banana Republic: Trump in Five Acts of Fuck You America
What's most *impressive* about Trump is how he fits so much Cowardly, [Cruel, Cantankerous](https://substack.com/redirect/cbecd169-a1f0-4c8f-be0b-52b85bbd35ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Crazy](https://substack.com/redirect/2cbb81bf-05ef-4358-8643-8c264dc6999e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and, [of course, Corrupt](https://substack.com/redirect/3c452571-8144-4ca9-a2bd-4341522cbc18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), into one simple-sugars bloated body. What's least impressive are the ways [America allowed him to get to a point](https://substack.com/redirect/a3a74f91-68fd-4dcb-a283-6ffc20847408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) where he could brazenly, publicly accept a $400MM luxury jet from Qatar.
It reminds me of something my pal [Tony Michaels wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/f39966db-07ab-4c1e-8257-d51f0e66a4e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before most recent monstrosity--in fact, on inauguration day:
> Let's talk about what this really means. Trump has essentially turned the presidency into a private equity fund, and now anyone in the world can "invest." You've got geopolitical players, corporate lobbyists, and power-hungry billionaires all lining up to buy a piece of the Trump brand--and, by extension, America.
There's even some poetry to the fact The Qataris are bribing Trump--yep, bribing--with the same amount of money daddy left him, that he managed to piss away faster than a 90-year old man on a caffeine-moonshine drip. But, for it to happen, we needed four things a) A man who breaks through all restraints due to a sick mind as everyone watches him do it; b) A corporate media that's failed our Constitution & republic in every way; c) Democrats' lack of indy media support, coherent messaging and instinct for the jugular; 4) A GOP Congress that's a political party..in Brezhnev's USSR.
**1\. The Emoluments Clause is Dead: Trump Strangled to Eat Caviar on a Qatari Jet**
Trump is a caricature of unchecked greed in cheap suits, Saddam Hussein home decor chic and the morals of a gutter rat eating another, injured gutter rat. Generalissimo didn't just violate the Emoluments Clause from the moment the he took office in 2017, he used it as a welcome mat. Foreign governments funneled money into his properties like they were Marjorie Taylor Greene wiring funds to Palantir just after a market dip with totes zero inside info!
What happened then? Zip. No indictments, no crisis, just another Tuesday. As many of us said, allow this jack-a-lantern--[and many other corrupt Republicans in really high places](https://substack.com/redirect/b0d3e3d8-5d95-4ac0-89d4-3e5d762cc399?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--to blatantly ignore a law, especially one as crucial as banning foreign governments from buying our President, you'll never get enforcement of that law back. That's what the whole boiling frog parable is about--how cultural change happens slowly, under your nose, and before you know it, everything's changed. When we let Saudis--& Qataris--rent whole, empty floors in Trump's shitty, bed-bug-bungalow of a DC hotel, we ensured this'd happen if he got reelected (but, not to worry, Merrick Garland was gonna take care of it).
Now Trump will literally be flying around in a private jet from Qatar like the low-rent mobster he is--Bugsy, but with piss-cotton candy for hair and a tie hanging below his nuts. Again, it's simple: When you don't stop a criminal in Act I, by Act V he's taking kickbacks to fit the Lincoln Bedroom with golden toilets and calling it a jobs plan.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a7d5283-157f-4404-9bc9-028eda7aabba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**2\. The Media 's Context-Free Collapse: Jared, Qatar and the Art of the Shrug.**
While Trump cashes in with Qatari planes and just the biggest tidal wave of corruption any White House has even seen, our bullshit corporate media is busy breathlessly covering "horse races" and personality cults and offering "balance" while gaining "access." They're as worthless as a Trump meme coin the minute all his investor buddies have safely gotten out.
And of course there's plenty our media could do here to educate the public, specifically on past corruption with Qatar. Maybe, [mention the name Kusner?](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe588ba-eea9-4fc2-809b-2f81f264e2ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) But that would take connecting dots and explaining Trump's a globe-humping kleptocrat, not just a "former president." ABC News didn't even _mention_ Trump's name in its segment on the Qatari jet. The only thing missing was [Terry Moran saying "let's move on."](https://substack.com/redirect/71a3c75b-9693-433b-80ff-138f36f3ab43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Here's[ Just Security](https://substack.com/redirect/8f2d0f35-fc34-47b2-8ed3-1289846a7ca9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a publication not of the corporate media, providing a refresher:
> When the Kushner Companies purchased 666 5 Avenue in midtown Manhattan in early 2007 for a record-breaking price of $1.8 billion, it was supposed to be a center of their real estate portfolio. Instead, the Kushners struggled to cover their debt..shortly after its purchase on the eve of the financial crisis. As Jared Kushner's father-in-law Donald Trump was running for President, the Kushners pitched Qatari investors to help bail out the building.
> And just weeks after his father Charles failed to reach a deal with Qatar's minister of finance, **Jared Kushner, as senior adviser to President Trump, reportedly played a central role in supporting a blockade of Qatar by Saudi Arabia and the UAE.** Kushner never disclosed his meeting with Saudi Arabia and the UAE on the blockade..**Later, a financial company tied to Qatar brokered..deal to rescue the Kushner Companies ' property at 666 Fifth Avenue.**
I dunno, I'm no genius reporter like monopoly-media, but you think the fact this SOB, Kushner, upended our foreign policy and likely got people killed, all to escape his fucked-up, Boebert-like business skills is kinda important context here, no? [You think if they properly covered this 8 years ago](https://substack.com/redirect/f5a03997-9a72-4ea2-8fcf-ca7d61c55d23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this month we'd be here? We'll never know, because our for-a-huge-profit-media sucks harder than an E5 tornado.
**3\. Democrats, You Have One Job. Do It.**
Trump's so cartoonishly corrupt Bernie Madoff may have to sue for copyright infringement. Yet somehow, Democrats, my party, can't seem to hammer that point daily, with a coherent narrative and compelling examples ([this was part of our discussion on our first "Amped Up" when we spoke to Never-Trumper Joe Walsh](https://substack.com/redirect/c8fb2e2b-fdaf-46d9-892e-24ebf3de3fca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Trump's in bed with Russian oligarchs, Middle Eastern monarchs, various ganger-states & American plutocrats, the last group trying to torch the middle class for a new wing on their yachts. Trump hates immigrants, but, damn, does he love him elites if they'll love him back. Even foreigners, so long as they dump a ton of cash in his diaper.
[He has back room meetings with Elon, the world's richest idiot](https://substack.com/redirect/9a2d2e05-c531-4f82-a0fa-1cbe3e6aa3cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to plan how to destroy people's economic livelihoods--or the exact right-wing conspiracy theory about Soros. There are simple narrative frames to make it easily understandable to all Americans. To render it cohesive...I dunno, how about *corrupt, cruel & incompetent* (alliteration!) Yet, instead of tattooing _this_ message on every podium, briefings with MAGA families he's hurt many times each week in DC and around the country...
Instead of creating an online influencer army--supporting indy media with 1/10th the funds The Right's plowed into propaganda--and especially in cultural areas outside of politics...we just, don't. Nobody's ever given me a convincing explanation why that is. We also need more spectacle--tours across the country for more town halls in GOP districts where local reps are hiding.
Instead, we often just issue polite press releases like it's fucking 2009. Trump's a national security threat trapped in a grimy, cholesterol shell & golf cleats. The message writes itself--but we must deliver it early & often with more urgency than an NPR tote bag drive.
**Don 't get me wrong**--[I highlight Democrats who fight these fights everday](https://substack.com/redirect/7ccaadff-6256-410d-bf75-48507a6a5eb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--_and every day_ there are more. Your Beshears, AOCs, Swalwells, Stansburys, Murphys, Pritzkers, Crocketts, Whitmers, Duckworths, Raskins...but with respect to a tight narrative, coordinated, multi-media-campaign, driven home by myriad of different events, hearings, platforms, press conferences & spectacle...our leadership is still in the dark. How about[ following the lead of the Dems listed above?](https://substack.com/redirect/ce764107-35c7-46b5-8a3b-ca2b6f263080?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**4\. Congress: A Spineless Blob of Bought Cowards.**
Mike Johnson governs like a youth pastor with a persecution complex and the courage of a damp sponge. The only kind of real oversight Johnson engages in all day is monitoring his son's porn.
The rest of the GOP? Utterly compromised or refusing to fight _constantly_. Don Bacon? He knows better, but speaks only now and again. Brian Fitzpatrick? Hiding behind centrist cosplay. S[usan Collins? ](https://substack.com/redirect/a0cca92d-a9c5-40ba-8286-c49eb19ca1de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Still concerned](https://substack.com/redirect/a0cca92d-a9c5-40ba-8286-c49eb19ca1de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , likely from the safety of her fainting couch, while Murkowski says she's "scared." Well, Senator, welcome to the America the rest of us are fucking living in, because you all didn't stop this ill-tempered, crack-brained, blubberwocky from reentering our lives. WTF are all of you on Trump's corruption? Worried about the next election--or the damn republic?
Just, remember, i[f Hunter Biden took so much as a Qatari paperweight, Republicans would've held 46 hearings and a seance](https://substack.com/redirect/d523101e-6528-4fa8-bf6d-9834c41eaf32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and of course included pictures just so Marge Greene could stare at his penis again in the hope it'd become her third regular shack-up since she ditched the ex...Sure, Mike Johnson's a lost cause. The others I named--not to mention Mike Turner, Thom Tillis and others who've shown an ounce of integrity--these are the moments for which history eventually judge you.
If you're not sure about that, look up the names "Quisling" or "Petain."

And to think I met him when he was still a Dem in good standing nearly a decade ago and he at least appeared relatively normal. Someone needs to get on what happened there...
* So Trump won't shut up about tariffs, threatening China constantly, wrecking our markets, getting some companies to either refuse to hire new workers or even fire them, in preparation for Trump's coming shitstorm...then as always, like the weakest, most cowardly chode, he caves. EVERY. TIME. And then takes credit when the markets make up for some of the destruction he caused.
It's like shooting yourself in the leg, bandaging it up and saying "see, all better! Look how great I am at fixing my leg! And our media goes with it. Incredible.

body:

| | Dear Peter,
---
Back in 2022, we had already held multiple revivals on the National Mall, and people were asking us to make them an annual celebration. But we felt God had MORE for D.C.—even though we didn’t yet know what. Fast forward to now— _THIS THURSDAY, we’re celebrating the 3-year anniversary of planting roots and investing in our nation’s capital!_ Can you believe it?! It feels like just yesterday that we were praying into the vision God put on our hearts: America’s leaders turning away from worldly pursuits and seeking the Kingdom first. God has answered that prayer and opened unbelievable doors through our D.C. headquarters, Camp Elah. He has already used CAMP ELAH in mighty ways, allowing us to minister in the Rotunda of the U.S. Capitol, the West Wing of the White House, on the National Mall, outside the Supreme Court, and so much more!
---

name: Zee
subject: high risk, higher rewards
body:
| |
---
The risks have never been higher but the rewards for being bold and fighting back are immense. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTU0MjIyMTA3OTM1Mzc2NzIzLFwiclwiOjE1NDIyMjE0ODM2OTUxNTg1OH0iLCJzIjoiNmFlZGZiYzY4MzRhNjFkZiJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTU0MjIyMTA3OTQyNzE2NzU4LFwiclwiOjE1NDIyMjE0ODM2OTUxNTg1OH0iLCJzIjoiZjdkZjYwY2UyNTg1MTMwMSJ9)
---
|
Team,

In contrast to some of the more pessimistic takes out there saying it's over for Democrats and that we may as well call it off and go home, the situation in Washington is extremely fluid and things could rapidly shift to favor either party.

Take for instance the news cycle from the past three days:

---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTU0MjIyMTA3OTQ3OTU5NjQyLFwiclwiOjE1NDIyMjE0ODM2OTUxNTg1OH0iLCJzIjoiYmRmODgwM2U4YmMzMDZjMCJ9)
---
| **** On one hand, the suspension of habeas corpus and steps to cosplay as a dictator by imprisoning elected officials will help Trump consolidate power and entrench the fascist movement he is working hard to cement.

On the other hand, these risky moves greatly overextend him and run a massive risk of alienating independent voters. If properly capitalized upon, these gross overreaches stand to yield unheard of gains for Democrats in the upcoming 2026 midterms.

This past Spring, National Ground Game put ourselves on the map as the biggest outside player in the Florida Special elections. In fact we played a bigger role, spending more and sending more people to these races, _than the National Democratic party and Florida Democratic Party combined (check their FEC reports)_.**We refuse to leave any district, no matter how red, uncontested.

** Come hell or high water we will be ensuring that voters in swing districts know about Trump’s fascist overreach. And we won’t be getting this info to voters via digital-ad money pits either... we’ll be relaying this critical information to voters at their doors with real life human canvassers.

The risks have never been higher but the rewards for being bold and fighting back now are immense.

[The time to build the wave is now. Can you make a donation of whatever you can spare to help us capitalize on Trump’s fascist overreach and ensure that we can use this moment to propel a historic blue wave in 2026?](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTU0MjIyMTA3OTUzMjAyNTIzLFwiclwiOjE1NDIyMjE0ODM2OTUxNTg1OH0iLCJzIjoiNzc0ODVhNzExMGY5ZDczZSJ9)

---

subject: News Flash: I have an opponent for King County Council and I need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
We need a line of defense against extremism. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=c83a25489e&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/642eb276e0c0/news-flash-i-have-an-opponent-for-king-county-council-and-i-need-your-help?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=1ec49d4942&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friends,

The far left has once again filed an extreme candidate against me. If they are successful in their efforts, the Council will have nobody left to speak and fight against the unfettered increases to taxes and fees that the King County Council has become famous for in recent years.

We must have someone on the Council who can hold the line against the ever-increasing costs of living.

In a time when all of us are paying more in taxes, food, housing, gas and other services, we must have someone to hold the line against the most extreme Seattle politicians.

**I will continue to fight for you but I need your help to do it. Could you please [make a contribution right now](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=e231e7b980&e=77eef70c61) to my campaign for the King County Council? ** Businesses and individuals can give up to $1200 each. I am the last line of defense for responsible government.
**\---------------
[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=7bb3fbf1d6&e=77eef70c61)
\----------------** Thank you for your support!
Reagan Dunn

If they are successful in their efforts, the Council will have nobody left to speak and fight against the unfettered increases to taxes and fees that the King County Council has become famous for in recent years. We must have someone on the Council who can hold the line against the ever-increasing costs of living. In a time when all of us are paying more in taxes, food, housing, gas and other services, we must have someone to hold the line against the most extreme Seattle politicians. I will continue to fight for you but I need your help to do it. Could you please to my campaign for the King County Council? Businesses and individuals can give up to $1200 each. I am the last line of defense for responsible government. \--------------- \---------------- Thank you for your support! Reagan Dunn | | | | Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn P.O. [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qOfuBe3ZFjb_5ehJxdcM_D3TUM3H9F0EFS4AJQk59kKq7YDQhHESBowzbWsmBCJh-eMANzzlZXxFCIyjCGI1SCqxe6xpY4ZeSD__tLZNaHrTO8i9cyGe9KbsERO-_2vqNOnkPEm9HAoH4JiTfCRRbksE1XcTUpyrnRCxt1YWp_ZaU%3D)

Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qO36raw0xN5nPteCiV3CrCUgqjFXCbz4nGOXJlzNZZ-ymFrb7vGdYkaiEYDA-YSg10WzNZ5EL6LVBo_TP7an8Fva9eJx_WOAk6gAQ2Zg2EAiekTyPPgQEUo25t-0KN7SJqHb70HtIibl1Vt-zJFi1gNKLudD94PbRL_aZSnIYqR6U%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qOQkE0Vdj2d8RKACtenD4PLzBu0ukkFh5uXPFmzAkL-5LC6eYA0KzI2Iyhrcrr8vvqQY_MH0ZcyDl1_XNcwjtKFdASDjjnkFdKtkfe7Nrh2e6qMNf5qhehUXPde_u-HEfGtIOin09GQtvtl3U3RcNj97JCd23Plq49Iu2Vn8RjBr4%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qOQZBaWVN9qb-b-YVxrLWUGCD5AQ7DG7VzKy1k-uC5LuRTZ3BLGxzfw2x71BQrweaMUvkLOTDvE-xIRE1TnObnECM1QSRt3pXQd_J9BuKjDRGwp9jLc_kPIF5lQcr-GEKb3QspaNyVM9m1Ryqw54KyKH78ywfwXWLSslkPzjmJHeg%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qOPb8bU8cdoCgtxLf7RTHo46ukRFdoeOknNseNjI26gQnHcTlE7FIOEN-UZXqJq1rTpKaQyqIftPNl6Pa-sIjJMA_koXNXCOMveKDaBtCZsSyFcQK-XY6Ev0Skx_rkX2Mm52nT43j_hDTenXIjo54VSvP9d1EGrUwAzQ3ux46Jj-g%3D)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. Can you pitch in any amount?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qODfHDMzQ_QzGfryGxqSil1onp2vQ4vAmTMy2ymqVBSPosvRZN10AFrZn6xBaWk45QJcUxVJgyat9QDlZBPHyl4U00e_sA8G0_W_QpLW3RrntItMTOFSN4vKYZdVBsY_Ig5UBbqfGxg7_GaL9-PpLOtKlLwljqBsBqC599guORZlM%3D)

[**DONATE NOW**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qOzZwFg5g0PngbaeTdkmpkrkyjPK1ns11crUOqlnhYygbKFAnxhn3FbX0oxNWz0FLeBw0BOH9OBtdezxFoqZpcN7tqDKTkYz7SaLu2ffATHvw34UbrqZ6vYWZ9A4ADh8QveheXpiomaqtuuplG1iGvrbzBgP7likp9alJfNJmgwFs%3D)
I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last.

[**If you agree, I hope you’ll stand with me on the front lines as we start this journey.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qO_D5WOVmTGU48a_WiZh8FZV1ScvUNefDWRYqymhefWHNB9tb5WfXfMGiajb_YHZ51KBKyeqHw7-CYRDz5Q8k62XxupXKq4WlihFVRm4MEUGpe6ukfhiPuxdwdyxKhddfzsLZerWa4SgNfPzu-sajxNOVj28RtD-bfS1iGRecJxlw%3D)

Thanks,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=328b4ef9d52a4bf8b0fd48a86f99bbf4&_e=-BeR2YuYg0sD4ebae0wZf_FMiHO2a2ljwEq_pLPWMB1XWh6CUEMNbKao6vkxnglXDDINFT-SFcWJIEFwpbV2aB3KgqPxqsGFAlcD-gh9OaVG-wGH3F3XKol5I_QYYa2pppECmeKKIxp0Lqa1EpbvldjZy54oX-rIfd6Xi5RNjlqaeDn8bG2IfMaiZDpx_o7hBxsd9C0VwOkfMk8C-njZW2ikNHHjdjPnUjlNm2G1-MjoYj04gr99wBaKDJUsD1qOfXkHO5_JO7IupcJYHhFBvKxghG36QTWK1N-Oihku9wbOKn7fjNOBTjbqofGG9ukDnkCvFTCznqcwos6FQLkzBBGNeYJHDjC-trB6ZRD8YzzsMDPWW1QgK7Q7euhs93ReOM4nhpnhiGz2XCeZdcGZm2RKfYm2wFmQQUeOXXv_AeM%3D)

General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. I’ve heard from parents worried about the quality of education their children will receive. I’ve heard from young people worried about student loans and about the future of our planet. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Join the fight for LGBTQ+ equality
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This issue is personal to me.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4713%2E35263%2E8j624u)
Peter, As the first openly gay Senator in United States history, my commitment to equality isn’t just political — it’s personal. From Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill to laws in Iowa and Mississippi that target medical professionals who provide gender-affirming care to minors, LGBTQ+ Americans’ fundamental freedoms and civil rights are under attack by extremist Republicans across the country. And since the Trump administration is actively working to unravel all the progress we’ve made in recent years, it’s time to pass federal legislation that affirms that every American should be treated equally under the law. **That’s why I joined my Democratic colleagues in reintroducing the _Equality Act_ to guarantee every LGBTQ+ American the full freedom of equality and protection under federal law.** We’ve made incredible advances in equality for LGBTQ+ Americans in recent years, like passing my _Respect for Marriage Act_ to protect same-sex and interracial marriages, but our work is far from over. **[No LGBTQ+ American should face discrimination and unjust treatment simply because of who they are and who they love. If you agree, sign on to show your support for passing the _Equality Act_ >> ](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/equality-act-2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4713%2E35263%2E8j624u)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/equality-act-2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4713%2E35263%2E8j624u)
---
I’m so grateful for your support, Peter. Thanks for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4713%2E35263%2E8j624u) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4713%2E35263%2E8j624u)**

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/structural-eugenics-part-ii-trumps?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In April, I wrote about how [MAGA Republicans are enacting ](https://substack.com/redirect/0ad695b8-86c1-48e1-8fbd-f908d765fd89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Structural Eugenics](https://substack.com/redirect/0ad695b8-86c1-48e1-8fbd-f908d765fd89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ by weaponizing surveillance and censorship to target marginalized communities while ignoring real public health crises. Now, just weeks later, the Trump regime has escalated its campaign of structural eugenics--this time through the federal budget. These are not just policy shifts; they are deliberate acts of cruelty designed to eliminate the most vulnerable among us, and it is critical we remain aware of these serious harms to our health. **Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..IfSMbIj9-wYOhIyIjyUiPPrH9JDEQ43JR7XBbRXL9dA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162732542)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/76a992f7-b689-4d6e-acb8-8e8d4bbbc389?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **1\. Cutting Narcan: A Death Sentence for Those Suffering From Addiction**
[The Trump regime is proposing cuts to federal programs that provide naloxone](https://substack.com/redirect/98c2d5f3-85e1-4328-94e7-d90fb879eb2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Narcan), a medication that reverses opioid overdoses. This move comes despite naloxone being widely credited for saving tens of thousands of lives during the nationwide opioid epidemic, particularly amid the rise of fentanyl. Public health officials warn that such cuts could reverse years of progress and lead to increased overdose deaths, especially among vulnerable populations, including teens and first-time users.
### **2\. Slashing $1 Billion in School Mental Health Grants**
The Trump regime has likewise announced the [cancellation of $1 billion in federal grants designated for school mental health programs](https://substack.com/redirect/391f1351-752a-47c8-ac9b-ce866aa4b8d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), originally funded through a 2022 bill signed by President Joe Biden. These grants aimed to help schools hire psychologists, counselors, and other mental health professionals. You'll note how every time we suffer through yet another mass shooting, MAGA Republicans claim "It's not the guns, it's the mental illness." Notwithstanding that it is in fact the guns, now we have yet more proof of MAGA hypocrisy, as they cut critical mental health treatment for vulnerable communities. The cruelty, it appears, is the point.
**If you 're finding value in this analysis, support our efforts and subscribe here:**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..IfSMbIj9-wYOhIyIjyUiPPrH9JDEQ43JR7XBbRXL9dA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162732542)
### **3\. Gutting Cancer Research, Including Pediatric Studies**
The Trump administration has [proposed](https://substack.com/redirect/3d33045b-2701-42f2-9689-6ae058fe1307?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) significant cuts to [childhood cancer research funding](https://substack.com/redirect/31c47f65-0a62-4c8c-8971-ee1432f22b32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including nearly $1 billion from the National Institutes of Health (NIH). These cuts threaten to halt progress in developing life-saving treatments, particularly for children, as pediatric cancer research already receives a small fraction of federal cancer research funding. Advocates warn that reducing resources jeopardizes the future of clinical trials, new therapies, and equitable care for all children facing cancer.
A government that cuts funding to research ways to prevent childhood cancer is not a government serving the American people.
### **4\. Slashing $880 Billion from Medicaid**
The Trump administration's budget proposal includes [cutting $880 billion from Medicaid](https://substack.com/redirect/e6bb0aff-0d6e-4b5e-9141-6177f6d20e29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the next decade. This move would significantly impact low-income individuals, particularly Black and brown communities, by reducing access to essential healthcare services. The proposed cuts are part of a broader effort to allegedly reduce federal spending, but fact checkers point out this is simply not the case. Instead, it's a rouse to give billionaires a bigger tax cut, and increase military spending by $119B to a shocking $1.01T--the most in world history.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e3377dd9-5180-46b5-818f-fa139fc5ca12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I met with Congressman Jamie Raskin last week on the Capitol steps to speak out against these draconian and deadly cuts. I asked him what we can and should be doing to fight back? Be sure to listen to his answer and take action.
### **5\. Lifting the Federal Moratorium on the Death Penalty**
President Trump has signed an executive order to [restore the federal death penalty](https://substack.com/redirect/39e9cdf2-719a-4a2b-b56e-451107f3d6d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), lifting the moratorium implemented in 2021. In doing so he wholly ignores the massive injustices inherent in our nation's criminal prosecution system.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ec53487e-f0ad-4967-ac78-b286ccc8ad7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Department of Justice is now directed to seek the death penalty in applicable federal cases. This move is rightly raising concerns about the fairness and application of capital punishment, especially given its disproportionate impact on marginalized communities.
### **Conclusion: This Is Structural Eugenics**
These policy changes are not isolated decisions; they represent a systematic approach to governance that devalues and endangers the lives of marginalized communities. By cutting essential health services, mental health support, and research funding, while simultaneously reinstating the death penalty, the Trump administration is enacting a form of structural eugenics--policies that disproportionately harm specific populations under the guise of fiscal responsibility or law and order.
We must recognize and challenge these actions for what they are: deliberate strategies that threaten the health, safety, and lives of the most vulnerable among us. It's imperative to stay informed, hold our leaders accountable, and advocate for policies that uphold the dignity and rights of all individuals.

body:
Prove you are a starter, not a saboteur
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=5c3abf7b01834d8bb846c3df86aeb94c&_e=DgPpXC_PxhfenpXyzRl97eMZmKRa_g5-peD73xbaimedAe3AMaItLHtrSj88GHhQNlk5wAWUl4G9IofQoWlw-IQVyNiSO4WBvq6UiGm_2RJz4uEBe6GBGUxXqU59WQOz3-5_Ll9gIQ9HklPnmj0IN0tpujZrWCVDAQPEo_YIvZXC0GAhLDRHOlah5nI1rF4ltKw4wxrGW3tXtMPu-DgSSnwemG2t_3w8PHBPUcIfUUDAaVoUBZ1-ykiPUHZP-6npI57vxzptrqtTXs7kykH3JmiUyuypbMX-ExOE2MsYQ_wBQCqQhy61m35l9cBUPt5oPG-ntq0-tkjbSoGfnmPFjg%3D%3D)

Peter,

Now listen--if you know anything about me, you know I spent years on the sidelines, calling plays and building teams that didn't give up a single inch without a fight. I was once Coach Tuberville, and I will always be Coach Tuberville. Once a coach, ALWAYS a coach.

_That 's exactly how I approach my job in Washington. But lately, I've heard some chatter about the Radical Left trying to pull a trick play--sneaking onto our roster and trying to tear the team apart from the inside._

So I've put together the **Official Playbook** --my way of checking who's truly playing for our side. And Peter, I'm 99% sure you're a starter, not a saboteur--but I still need you to run this play and confirm it.

| [ **TAKE THE OFFICIAL PLAYBOOK SURVEY** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=5c3abf7b01834d8bb846c3df86aeb94c&_e=DgPpXC_PxhfenpXyzRl97eMZmKRa_g5-peD73xbaimedAe3AMaItLHtrSj88GHhQNlk5wAWUl4G9IofQoWlw-IQVyNiSO4WBvq6UiGm_2RJz4uEBe6GBGUxXqU59WQOz3-5_Ll9gIQ9HklPnmj0IN0tpujZrWCVDAQPEo_YIvZXC0GAhLDRHOlah5nI1rF4l6MQOePA8k-1b2YV6sogdlvTxoyRhAAzOqb9uaKfT8NJ2kIEny12C-72JMHPonr_938OOm-MYwifNvAAxTiYJneabqeZn5MUu1BkmSlFWlk4ochTuJ3RSsOD3OKP9H_UH_14JmrKySZcSXevFAUEgpw%3D%3D)

[**Let 's keep the team strong and keep the Left out of our locker room!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=5c3abf7b01834d8bb846c3df86aeb94c&_e=DgPpXC_PxhfenpXyzRl97eMZmKRa_g5-peD73xbaimedAe3AMaItLHtrSj88GHhQNlk5wAWUl4G9IofQoWlw-IQVyNiSO4WBvq6UiGm_2RJz4uEBe6GBGUxXqU59WQOz3-5_Ll9gIQ9HklPnmj0IN0tpujZrWCVDAQPEo_YIvZXC0GAhLDRHOlah5nI1rF4l5f7Wsp4QoUyZN4b46wBvZm4GiY5wL7_2Xk5nOsGEcu8O9B-tz6tP_GbunmvtA4xxcu6wSs-Xdlsp_kuxYMzMwH-tKe2TnJSIpy6jXaMKCILnu_5R890W-Ynw_dM1rW9Db1RyVEYXOplDsZ3G7NOdTg%3D%3D)

Thanks,
Coach Tommy Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=5c3abf7b01834d8bb846c3df86aeb94c&_e=DgPpXC_PxhfenpXyzRl97eMZmKRa_g5-peD73xbaimedAe3AMaItLHtrSj88GHhQNlk5wAWUl4G9IofQoWlw-IQVyNiSO4WBvq6UiGm_2RJz4uEBe6GBGUxXqU59WQOz3-5_Ll9gIQ9HklPnmj0IN0tpujZrWCVDAQPEo_YIvZXC0GAhLDRHOlah5nI1rF4l0Z6hJivQ5msgPwsZIJ082shS5wif_clCf2u8qlyraRnR5v0QIb7S9TdwClRK9Vh03gabmmAk82HKeGjsK4h_nmhCe2XPWolZW_j1ihaPPuA66ffzoddI63DAgAy20IhIZAubpMdcpsobRY_OJ-Zhbw%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=5c3abf7b01834d8bb846c3df86aeb94c&_e=DgPpXC_PxhfenpXyzRl97eMZmKRa_g5-peD73xbaimedAe3AMaItLHtrSj88GHhQNlk5wAWUl4G9IofQoWlw-IQVyNiSO4WBvq6UiGm_2RJz4uEBe6GBGUxXqU59WQOz3-5_Ll9gIQ9HklPnmj0IN0tpujZrWCVDAQPEo_YIvZXC0GAhLDRHOlah5nI1rF4lqDzhPog80Q-5e2QnfV59NOsvXhxg8EUTxm6ihhs_MQGa70BhQ92MtewGJVJLjOi_RS5frSwrYZcyLERjE3RPCWKpmbSNdPjEvYxhI6cyfjbL6jiKHn5cMROVRxaAQ2YNMPhIBCKZs-bpjfEaaWbEFw%3D%3D)

Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND PO Box 590012, Birmingham, Alabama 35259 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville Victory Fund, All rights reserved.

Friend, I’m honored to endorse Donavan McKinney, who’s running to represent my neighboring congressional district in Congress. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ5jaT84RMjQmXQez5eyhs1ZvK-L_ZQ2M8wifHJYUrEBMycoZiKjBlZSnVkzTXbc83mJYXp8Q4qiY8zMJ3St7jLNRuDAdZV4jpDwKM_ev5WtOjSjatBw7bZWbC6HQYH9YC7EbW9RZ1oPsOkHVhfw_Acu1Y7xhKfb4_HIjZ0nHMYcVb2InCD06kaBKccjhhMSvvpILTHc-YVkrbEEysjDOR6alyrhdq9q86B6kla0ApHJi1Ds7hUhehhKcrSKJBKcrZzvqmT-vwpQxctrPRWQYBeeZuuWACmZWsAiq7kvsSkbI0tTIUOtEkWRSF28RYEo7FKMBJW24OrIsoUfB3W0YJqaHL0CWvu1d-q7KEOAK075rXAJM21yue1RfyVPKW6wiN/4gf/-qgzNfVFQIqVyqM3mU19tw/h1/h001.G_Q1Su1f5dl9SBQCa-T-Rpym1UaYl2gm9p8kMQ2RjtU) _Here’s Donavan at home with his two young sons and dog_ **Donavan knows our communities’ struggles because he has lived them.** Having grown up with housing and food insecurity, he worked with our state’s largest healthcare union to advocate for living wages. While serving in the State House, Donavan has led fights for workers’ rights, economic security, and clean air and water. **This working class champion is running against an incumbent who: spent over $17 million of his own wealth to bankroll his own Congressional campaigns** , spent more taxpayer money than any other member of Congress last year on ads to promote himself, and takes money from corporate PACs. Meanwhile, Donavan is pushing to get big money out of politics, and has led policies to challenge corporate PACs and lobbyists. Donavan just launched his people-powered, grassroots campaign—so now is a crucial time to demonstrate early support. [**I’m all in for Donavan McKinney. Will you join me in supporting this future Congressman by splitting a contribution between his campaign and mine, so together we can push for bold progressive policies and fight back against fascism and oligarchy?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ5jaT84RMjQmXQez5eyhs1ZvK-L_ZQ2M8wifHJYUrEBMN8z_MS-jOYB2M5FaIB_MXHmxdoUV3bzWOdiwInhJ-X1lA5BOJjpLunvGU9XKzw9EimFlkspZiGS6MH0Si7UqwQ2pWjI-1hcihQc7m9_TXZfv72d8HKJ__wuu8PNt9arYPUSWNcxA-hZrVasTajzv-odiEeHeA0PxDgImkvKBY0fpTKxp5_g_b63TULfVn1r06qs77NCZTZADcDoAHcmlqjFz5aGarLhY92MnmE1LAmrxPiSaXSa91prfv1vX7eS388FaZ2DeylzwNil2XDrdCNgnY2YHeN7C7N7uB3zdJVOzlFvgHVCpbTfPUjAdusTdYpbtnUjUH8v2P_kEwpsak/4gf/-qgzNfVFQIqVyqM3mU19tw/h2/h001.6JxdIdQvFQJD3z5DFgAnY9N7xdLggVA-p0y4NZeh1y8) | [SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ5jaT84RMjQmXQez5eyhs1ZvK-L_ZQ2M8wifHJYUrEBM4HQN3u99_0Nv90feSrA4TQFX-6vr9l5wLQ0gRFVWhG9rhfrTCwPETVvYWaelzUFDq2bIhWNozV0RD9bAAXePkhX3u3-JvLU4wl1wNdFFyqSdWIKpzD-Aahy-asFDPkEm7GWTovIonCIGDzMd5Mdyw6jRrcXHgIeboU9UFvNgD8ASSwSeMDaBbOJhC1jAUoBBsZj7ranl8y6ZXC2wCqkphywZJ3Rqg4dQVKGWKkHI8Jm8Hd9zhBYZT08bs8D85KtwmZj3by6ibm5rATNQWtDHwtraKhwT9kh4K2y7C8ScAeJH55EgnZYHyFUTh8fAQAK6H6tqDZ6KISOvysc7JlrAU/4gf/-qgzNfVFQIqVyqM3mU19tw/h3/h001.sv4s5PojInjI_4ZID4hktO4xRv1X1_x9JwCH5_Uebb4)

I’ve known Donavan since before he served in public office, and he always puts community at the center of his work. **He’s a true public servant who puts the people first.**
Like me, Donavan grew up in the shadow of corporate polluters in Detroit. After he and his family developed an asthmatic cough, he began advocating for environmental justice.
He said, _“Raising my two young boys in the same polluted air that I grew up in means that if I know one thing, it’s this: our kids deserve better.”_
Our kids **do** deserve better, and Donavan has fought hard in the State House to ensure families can breathe clean air and drink clean water—including funding over $600 million to replace lead pipes in Detroit and its suburbs.
I know he’ll join me in the crucial fight for environmental justice in Congress. And I know that if he makes it to Congress, Donavan McKinney will be a partner who will act with the urgency we need to meet this moment. **Can you chip in today?**
Donavan has also led fights for public education and public transit, as well as much-needed changes to transform our racist criminal legal system. He delivered more than $10 million in community violence intervention programs to our region. He’s also fighting for Black maternal health, housing protections, and universal healthcare. This is what true public safety looks like.
We need Donavan in Congress serving the people. His self-funded opponent doesn’t have to raise money for his election campaigns. But Donavan does.

clean_body: Donavan McKinney is running to represent my neighboring congressional district. | | | Friend, I’m honored to endorse Donavan McKinney, who’s running to represent my neighboring congressional district in Congress. Here’s Donavan at home with his two young sons and dog Donavan knows our communities’ struggles because he has lived them. Having grown up with housing and food insecurity, he worked with our state’s largest healthcare union to advocate for living wages. While serving in the State House, Donavan has led fights for workers’ rights, economic security, and clean air and water. This working class champion is running against an incumbent who: spent over $17 million of his own wealth to bankroll his own Congressional campaigns , spent more taxpayer money than any other member of Congress last year on ads to promote himself, and takes money from corporate PACs. Meanwhile, Donavan is pushing to get big money out of politics, and has led policies to challenge corporate PACs and lobbyists. Donavan just launched his people-powered, grassroots campaign—so now is a crucial time to demonstrate early support. | I’ve known Donavan since before he served in public office, and he always puts community at the center of his work. He’s a true public servant who puts the people first. Like me, Donavan grew up in the shadow of corporate polluters in Detroit. After he and his family developed an asthmatic cough, he began advocating for environmental justice. He said, “Raising my two young boys in the same polluted air that I grew up in means that if I know one thing, it’s this: our kids deserve better.” Our kids do deserve better, and Donavan has fought hard in the State House to ensure families can breathe clean air and drink clean water—including funding over $600 million to replace lead pipes in Detroit and its suburbs. I know he’ll join me in the crucial fight for environmental justice in Congress. And I know that if he makes it to Congress, Donavan McKinney will be a partner who will act with the urgency we need to meet this moment. Can you chip in today? Donavan has also led fights for public education and public transit, as well as much-needed changes to transform our racist criminal legal system. He delivered more than $10 million in community violence intervention programs to our region. He’s also fighting for Black maternal health, housing protections, and universal healthcare. This is what true public safety looks like. We need Donavan in Congress serving the people. His self-funded opponent doesn’t have to raise money for his election campaigns. But Donavan does. name: Byron Donalds
subject: My mother would’ve ripped DEI to shreds
body:
She always taught me our country was built on hard work
| | | | |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4a9b714cbc414e76a71b3ff77494b189&_e=qic5w83APjwY_oieIm34aqgpVUZo86DUCW4aQD7Y375wXcGeM_uPAw7d-Hg2jScteVKw6R_Cp1gsu-bPWBtQKACSK-XB-HTPIgPvVX0oo3XydWpIPz2sX6a_dtiv-rmL5p7fmmeplfy73aRW_exXz778TW0mU_ZcQo7SCFaUCdV9Unsb0sO3YZtec8brDd5X5FPtPXPWkOSd8yQHlYMuHOxVxPSLwR90o0FI1qMPrYd9Y4nhOd5ugKrH1NtAuooHYTu8g_GfZBLt2zmdCceb3G_ZK2oQeHeOM3eH1D9cRWhb1bvbQzcEnQFUcPHpPjTRSSZhtmv3GtTMNHzmgHna4XBg3QMHx_tbyUDTWPcWqB4mzs-7vbSZUdHNlUp1PwsTUzua0n-XcmXISSOjFDvpQpmxLGgz1ZnkZRNJX4dqSrTmtPMr2qv8MmMxqlcPYc1q)

I was raised by a single mother.
I learned to fight with my back against the wall with no way out but through.
So when the radical left Democrats get up in my face & call me a “race-traitor” after I applauded Trump for abolishing DEI, I’m left speechless.
My mom _**never**_ taught me to hate my fellow Americans.
She always instilled in me the values of _hard work_ and _merit._
**If I told her I was a _victim_ like someone in the Woke Mob, she’d probably just laugh like it’s some kind of joke.**
**That’s the America I believe in**. And that’s why I’m a MAGA Patriot who loves President Trump and the America First Movement.
But after I stood with President Trump as he abolished DEI, the attacks against me have been horrendous.
The race-obsessed left just sees me as another Black Man who should sit down, shut up, and vote blue for the rest of my life.
Their hypocrisy _disgusts_ me, and I can brush off most of their attacks, but here’s the _**[real problem](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4a9b714cbc414e76a71b3ff77494b189&_e=qic5w83APjwY_oieIm34aqgpVUZo86DUCW4aQD7Y375wXcGeM_uPAw7d-Hg2jScteVKw6R_Cp1gsu-bPWBtQKACSK-XB-HTPIgPvVX0oo3XydWpIPz2sX6a_dtiv-rmL5p7fmmeplfy73aRW_exXz778TW0mU_ZcQo7SCFaUCdV9Unsb0sO3YZtec8brDd5X5FPtPXPWkOSd8yQHlYMuHOxVxPSLwR90o0FI1qMPrYd9Y4nhOd5ugKrH1NtAuooHYTu8g_GfZBLt2zmdCceb3G_ZK2oQeHeOM3eH1D9cRWj14epoaFUEstoUSAPTbnEEhudcwVoIx37B6CFO--nqr1-z0bTx3Ed_FLVVuL5FvQbkTjPHsfFquzKtXYYt2ftv5i8bYfMXwRi2jMnPScFNFd1ImTquj6qEucgYQH0vGpvwTiFg9Xp-JlIByvteMILj)**_ that I can’t solve on my own.
Right now I’m running for Governor in Florida, and truth be told the radical-left is dropping the hammer on me. They’re prepared to spend **millions of dollars** to prop-up a Democrat that could flip MAGA’s hometurf **BLUE**.
I’m committed to being President Trump’s STRONGEST Governor ally in the nation. But I can’t do this alone.
_**[So before the day is over, can I count on your support to keep me in the fight?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4a9b714cbc414e76a71b3ff77494b189&_e=qic5w83APjwY_oieIm34aqgpVUZo86DUCW4aQD7Y375wXcGeM_uPAw7d-Hg2jScteVKw6R_Cp1gsu-bPWBtQKACSK-XB-HTPIgPvVX0oo3XydWpIPz2sX6a_dtiv-rmL5p7fmmeplfy73aRW_exXz778TW0mU_ZcQo7SCFaUCdV9Unsb0sO3YZtec8brDd5X5FPtPXPWkOSd8yQHlYMuHOxVxPSLwR90o0FI1qMPrYd9Y4nhOd5ugKrH1NtAuooHYTu8g_GfZBLt2zmdCceb3G_ZK2oQeHeOM3eH1D9cRWiHVr8uCDU1Ywn-hsJJcMC7K53IRPVOGD5AaI4s-Z9cZKrSk_7V1u33UGi2MCVYEDDqk447x_xHEUni-oYKYmi4yEFp_eYM_3HBfDdOuAhx-QWEATJ1bRVTSywR1-isUayk2gwaA1jyk04kZtsXH5Hk)**_

clean_body: She always taught me our country was built on hard work | | | | | | I was raised by a single mother. I learned to fight with my back against the wall with no way out but through. So when the radical left Democrats get up in my face & call me a “race-traitor” after I applauded Trump for abolishing DEI, I’m left speechless. My mom never taught me to hate my fellow Americans. She always instilled in me the values of hard work and merit. If I told her I was a victim like someone in the Woke Mob, she’d probably just laugh like it’s some kind of joke. That’s the America I believe in. And that’s why I’m a MAGA Patriot who loves President Trump and the America First Movement. But after I stood with President Trump as he abolished DEI, the attacks against me have been horrendous. The race-obsessed left just sees me as another Black Man who should sit down, shut up, and vote blue for the rest of my life. Their hypocrisy disgusts me, and I can brush off most of their attacks, but here’s the that I can’t solve on my own. Right now I’m running for Governor in Florida, and truth be told the radical-left is dropping the hammer on me. They’re prepared to spend millions of dollars to prop-up a Democrat that could flip MAGA’s hometurf BLUE. I’m committed to being President Trump’s STRONGEST Governor ally in the nation. But I can’t do this alone. | | God bless you, Byron Donalds | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid by Byron Donalds, Republican, for Governor 10941 Harmony Park Drive, Suite 4 Bonita Springs, FL 34135 %

Texas Republican Rep. Brandon Gill **[fired back at Democrat Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb9695d-b906-46b4-9a8d-5226631e58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after her outburst raging against Elon Musk and his efforts to reduce the unacceptable wastefulness in the federal government.
**[He didn't hold back...](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb9695d-b906-46b4-9a8d-5226631e58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb9695d-b906-46b4-9a8d-5226631e58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb9695d-b906-46b4-9a8d-5226631e58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**["I don't like Elon Musk, I'm gonna say it 50,000 times!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb9695d-b906-46b4-9a8d-5226631e58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Crockett said. "I don't like him! I don't like that he's going out there and firing people. I think that he's a crook!"
"The rest of us can't sit around and get whatever federal contracts we want! The rest of us can't sit around and get law enforcement somehow ordained as federal law enforcement to protect him,... that is someone who is operating above the law!" she continued.
Crockett finished by stating that the reason that America is "torn apart is that we can't even agree on right vs wrong!!"
Gill was recognized by the chair and **[didn't waste a second in responding to Crockett's outburst. ](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb9695d-b906-46b4-9a8d-5226631e58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"Our colleagues on the other side want to encourage us to move on from a federal government that was weaponized against the American people that they are supposed to represent and protect!" Gill started. "Move on after our FBI was targeting parents that were concerned that their children were people indoctrinated into radical transgender ideologies in their public schools!"
"We're supposed to move on after they targeted catholic Americans, and **[labeled them violent extremists!"](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb9695d-b906-46b4-9a8d-5226631e58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Gill added. "We're told that there's a problem that we can't agree on what's right and wrong and I agree, there's a huge problem that the other side of the aisle can't agree that censorship is wrong! It's a problem that the other side of the aisle can't recognize that it's wrong for the FBI to target parents concerned about what their learning in their schools!"
Watch Gill go off at Crockett here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb9695d-b906-46b4-9a8d-5226631e58cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Democrat Sen. Chris Van Hollen lashes out after Trump admits white South African refugees to U.S.
Sen. Chris Van Hollen, notorious for visiting deported illegal immigrant Kilmar Abrego Garcia in El Salvador, lashed out at President Trump on social media for admitting 60 white South African refugees to the U.S. who he says "do not need" protection.
"Trump and Musk are about to give refugee status to 60 white South Africans -- who do not need it -- while Trump locks up and deports refugees here who face genuine dangers in other countries. This is the sick global apartheid policy being adopted by this lawless administration," Van Hollen wrote on X.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62bba5ae-c091-49ee-bb28-41544ac2fe53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
49 white South African refugees arrived in Washington D.C., Monday, fleeing racial persecution in their home country where radical black nationalist leaders have targeted white "Afrikaners", decedents of Dutch settlers in the region, seizing their property and enabling violence against them. The status of 11 other refugees is reportedly still pending.
The White House in February acknowledge the human rights atrocities that are occurring, presenting it's plan to resettle refugees from the African nation to the United States.
"The Secretary of State and the Secretary of Homeland Security shall take appropriate steps, consistent with law, to prioritize humanitarian relief, including admission and resettlement through the United States Refugee Admissions Program, for Afrikaners in South Africa who are victims of unjust racial discrimination," the White House **[said in a statement.](https://substack.com/redirect/4152c34d-c426-4306-98fc-2b4560710173?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
In March, President Trump announced that the U.S. would stop sending federal aid to South Africa.
"South Africa is being terrible, plus, to long time Farmers in the country," Trump wrote. They are confiscating their LAND and FARMS, and MUCH WORSE THAN THAT. A bad place to be right now, and we are stopping all Federal Funding. To go a step further, any Farmer (with family!) from South Africa, seeking to flee that country for reasons of safety, will be invited into the United States of America with a rapid pathway to Citizenship. This process will begin immediately!"
* * *

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues IRS to Uncover Potential Targeting of January 6 Protesters and Supporters
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) to obtain records related to possible improper targeting of January 6, 2021, Capitol protesters, their supporters, and related nonprofits

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | May 12, 2025
---|---|---
| [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73945&L=32849&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d4ef7f355a4ae58114b59484ce7da67eecb4a6531f3b54561a26a85955f8099) | |

---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73945&L=35153&F=H&&hash=10e92ed0dd416dbd6d7b67bf20411f2ab0d94c70f453cc570cd4fd1cdcdcd77a) | **[Judicial Watch: Biden Administration Detail Mandate of Covid-19 Vaccinations for 17 Million Health Care Workers](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73945&L=35153&F=H&&hash=10e92ed0dd416dbd6d7b67bf20411f2ab0d94c70f453cc570cd4fd1cdcdcd77a)** Judicial Watch announced it received 91 pages of records from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that reveal its plans to mandate Covid-19 vaccinations for 17 million health care employees and that only one of 4,682 claims for injuries and deaths due to Covid-19 “countermeasures” at the time was compensated. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73945&L=35153&F=H&&hash=10e92ed0dd416dbd6d7b67bf20411f2ab0d94c70f453cc570cd4fd1cdcdcd77a)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73945&L=35133&F=H&&hash=527febb7244622a54159ba8809ac05c8c3710614c951891977094f6e06ff7eb9) | **[Amid Spike in Detainers ICE Takes Custody of Only 14% of Illegal Immigrants in Local Jails](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73945&L=35133&F=H&&hash=527febb7244622a54159ba8809ac05c8c3710614c951891977094f6e06ff7eb9)** Inconsistent with the Trump administration’s actions of securing the southwest border and mass deportations to crack down on illegal immigration is a strange failure to take custody of illegal aliens arrested by local police under a federal-local partnership known as 287(g). Under the policy local and state law enforcement agencies notify Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) of jail inmates in the country illegally and honor ICE requests—detainers—to hold undocumented migrants for up to 48 hours beyond the time they would ordinarily release them so the agency can take custody and deport them. subject: Summer is on the way, friend
body:
There's a lot to look forward to — the lake in the summer, long days, ice cream and cookouts, Mud Hens games. But summer also means the heat is on in our race.

| |
---
Friend, summer is on the way, and I love summer in Toledo. There's so much to look forward to — the lake in the summer, the long sunny days, ice cream and cookouts with family, going to Mud Hens games and more. And of course, all the gardening you could imagine. **But the weather isn't the only thing that's getting hotter, friend. The NRCC and their special interest allies are already turning up the heat on our race.** They spent more than _**$20 million**_ to try to buy this seat last year, and their dark-money attacks have already started again. They've launched not one, but two smear campaigns targeting me here in OH-09. Every time we beat them back, all they do is raise the stakes. But I'll never back down from fighting for the community that raised me. **[Friend, Northwest Ohio is not for sale. Can I count on you to help me defend our district?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107572190/545114479/1039792322?refcode=250512_mk_summer_l1&ms=250512_mk_summer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQzNWY2NC03MjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tSshmiHKIzGsSVCcqGs7wRXmysbCoF11ktlmmGy6nsg=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107572197/545114486/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250512_mk_summer&ms=250512_mk_summer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQzNWY2NC03MjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tSshmiHKIzGsSVCcqGs7wRXmysbCoF11ktlmmGy6nsg=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107572198/545114487/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250512_mk_summer&ms=250512_mk_summer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQzNWY2NC03MjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tSshmiHKIzGsSVCcqGs7wRXmysbCoF11ktlmmGy6nsg=)

clean_body: Between now and Election Day 2026, we need to develop a winning strategy to defeat Chuck Schumer and his army of paid D.C. activists and megadonors. | Fellow American, Between now and Election Day 2026, we need to develop a winning strategy to defeat Chuck Schumer and his army of paid D.C. activists and megadonors. Where that starts is with critical Republican influencers like you Fellow American. I was informed that you are one of the top Republican supporters in your area. That’s why I’m providing you with an exclusive, secure link to answer our Republican Insider Survey: If we’re going to win and keep Montana in Republican hands, we need every Republican on the same page as we take on the millions Democrats are about to throw at us. That’s where your input today comes into play. I know your insights and advice today will give us the tools to focus our message and reach the voters we need to secure victory in 2026. Our path to victory starts with you responding to our secure Republican Insider Survey. You have 48 hours to respond. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Donald Trump and Ohio Republicans want to slash Medicaid to fund tax breaks for billionaires like Elon Musk on the backs of working families.

[_**If that’s all you need to hear, we’re asking if you can sign our petition right now to demand congressional Republicans protect Medicaid >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107572292/545114697/-347717079?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_PT_Medicaid_250512_T1_1&ms=ODP_ATA_EM_PT_Medicaid_250512_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDNhMTI5NS03MjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnSfWpEwg5cbAlkj0iMpK1E0tXBXy-IopTM1qxUM1sw=&emci=84e32138-6c2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=e43a1295-722f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=25291327) **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107572293/545114698/-347717079?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_PT_Medicaid_250512_T1_1&ms=ODP_ATA_EM_PT_Medicaid_250512_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDNhMTI5NS03MjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnSfWpEwg5cbAlkj0iMpK1E0tXBXy-IopTM1qxUM1sw=&emci=84e32138-6c2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=e43a1295-722f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=25291327)** Ohioans can’t afford the GOP’s plans to gut our healthcare to pay for Trump’s tax scam:
* Over 1.2 million Ohio kids rely on Medicaid for healthcare
* Medicaid supports 2 in 3 nursing home residents
* Rural hospitals are already struggling, and Medicaid cuts could force closures, reduce emergency care, and leave thousands of families without access to treatment
* Medicaid covers more than 50% of all Ohio births

**But none of this matters to Ohio Republicans. They’d rather rip healthcare away from millions of Americans to give tax cuts to their rich special interest allies.**

We’re not going to sit back quietly while they cut Medicaid and cut Ohioans’ lives short. But we need your voice in this fight.

[_**Tell Ohio Republicans: don’t choose corporate wealth over mothers, newborns, children, seniors, people with disabilities, and folks needing mental healthcare. name: Jason Crow
subject: I’m with Michael
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hi friend,

It’s Congressman Jason Crow.

My colleague and friend Senator Michael Bennet just announced that he’s running to be our next governor—and I wanted to reach out and share with you why I’m thrilled to support his campaign.

I have seen firsthand how Michael fights for Colorado in the U.S. Senate.

He has fought to expand access to healthcare, protect our environment, ensure future generations receive a high-quality education, and has the backs of Colorado workers.

Together, we’ve led countless efforts to prioritize this beautiful state we call home. We’ve worked on bills like the SMART Community Policing Act , which would protect our communities by supporting law enforcement and connecting Coloradans in crisis with mental health support, and the Protect the West Act, which would make critical investments in our forests to protect Colorado from the worst effects of climate change.

We have also worked together to make Colorado the best place for veterans, service members, and their families to live. We stood up to President Trump during his first term when he tried to rip Space Command out of Colorado, and we will continue to hold him accountable as he cozies up to dictators like Vladimir Putin, and his national security advisors, like Pete Hegseth and Tulsi Gabbard, put our troops at risk with their carelessness.

During these challenging times, Colorado needs a proven leader with Michael’s experience, values, and perseverance—that’s why I’m proud to endorse him for Governor.

I know Michael’s team is counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign moving forward. Friend, join me in supporting their early momentum by splitting a donation between my campaign and Michael’s today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-bennet]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jason Crow and Michael Bennet will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-bennet?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-bennet?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-bennet?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-bennet?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-bennet?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-bennet]

Together, we can show why Colorado is the best state in the country and provide the hopeful, optimistic vision we need.

Thank you,

Jason Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] Hi friend, It’s Congressman Jason Crow. My colleague and friend Senator Michael Bennet just announced that he’s running to be our next governor—and I wanted to reach out and share with you why I’m thrilled to support his campaign. I have seen firsthand how Michael fights for Colorado in the U.S. Senate. He has fought to expand access to healthcare, protect our environment, ensure future generations receive a high-quality education, and has the backs of Colorado workers. Together, we’ve led countless efforts to prioritize this beautiful state we call home. We’ve worked on bills like the SMART Community Policing Act , which would protect our communities by supporting law enforcement and connecting Coloradans in crisis with mental health support, and the Protect the West Act, which would make critical investments in our forests to protect Colorado from the worst effects of climate change. We have also worked together to make Colorado the best place for veterans, service members, and their families to live. We stood up to President Trump during his first term when he tried to rip Space Command out of Colorado, and we will continue to hold him accountable as he cozies up to dictators like Vladimir Putin, and his national security advisors, like Pete Hegseth and Tulsi Gabbard, put our troops at risk with their carelessness. During these challenging times, Colorado needs a proven leader with Michael’s experience, values, and perseverance—that’s why I’m proud to endorse him for Governor. I know Michael’s team is counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign moving forward. Friend, join me in supporting their early momentum by splitting a donation between my campaign and Michael’s today. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jason Crow and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Together, we can show why Colorado is the best state in the country and provide the hopeful, optimistic vision we need. Thank you, Jason Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Painful news about the National Park Service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
My tenure as Interior Secretary may be over, but my sense of duty to protect our public lands has never left me.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1902%2E400544%2E1p7W2t)
I won’t lie. This is painful news for me to share.
Donald Trump unveiled a budget plan that cuts $5 billion from the Department of the Interior, including over $1 billion from the National Park Service.
If enacted, this would represent the largest cut in the Park Service’s 109-year history.
It’s tough to wrap your head around the scale of these cuts. But I can tell you from my time at Interior that this would cause a ripple effect – one that endangers our beloved public lands, the dedicated public servants who steward them, and the millions of Americans who visit our national parks each year.
**My tenure as Interior Secretary may be over, but my sense of duty to protect our public lands has never left me.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250512_1_parkservice?amount=5&refcode=em20250512-1902&refcode2=1902_400544_1p7W2t&akid=1902%2E400544%2E1p7W2t)_Somáh and I taking in the breathtaking landscapes of Canyon de Chelly National Park._
I had so many opportunities to be on our public lands when I was growing up, and I will fight like hell to protect that same possibility for every child.
When Somáh was 10 years old, we hiked Canyon de Chelly National Monument together. Identifying the trees, flowers, and animals brought our spirits closer to that beautiful landscape. Looking out over the towering sandstone mesas and lush green blanket of desert shrubs, we imagined that we stood where our ancestors had.
Our public lands embody who we are as a country. They belong to every American. They represent freedom and openness, deliver fresh air to breathe, and help us connect with the lands and waters that give us everything. **As Donald Trump and Elon Musk prepare to exploit our lands, waters, and forests and the people who care for them, it’s up to each of us to make sure these irreplaceable wonders stay protected.**
**[Governors across the country will be the first line of defense against these brazen attacks on our public lands. Will you rush a $5 donation to our campaign so we can win this race and protect our beloved public lands for future generations?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250512_1_parkservice?amount=5&refcode=em20250512-1902&refcode2=1902_400544_1p7W2t&akid=1902%2E400544%2E1p7W2t)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250512_1_parkservice?amount=5&refcode=em20250512-1902&refcode2=1902_400544_1p7W2t&akid=1902%2E400544%2E1p7W2t)**
Trump’s announcement has come at the exact moment that families across our country prepare to take trips to visit our national parks, wildlife refuges, and public lands. We’re entering peak visitation season, which begs the question:
* Who will be around to manage our national parks?
* Who will empty the trash cans and make sure that trails are safe?
* Who will track the wildlife, test our waters, and do all the things that we know are so important to our public lands?

Our public lands belong to all of us. We must treat this moment as an urgent call to action to stand up for the landscapes and future our children will inherit.
**[Will you make your first-ever $5 contribution to our campaign so we can win this race and protect our public lands? As governor, I’ll be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests, but I can’t win without your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250512_1_parkservice?amount=5&refcode=em20250512-1902&refcode2=1902_400544_1p7W2t&akid=1902%2E400544%2E1p7W2t)**
Yours in the fight,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250512-1&t=2&refcode2=1902_400544_1p7W2t&akid=1902%2E400544%2E1p7W2t)**
