clean_body: My tenure as Interior Secretary may be over, but my sense of duty to protect our public lands has never left me. I won’t lie. This is painful news for me to share. Donald Trump unveiled a budget plan that cuts $5 billion from the Department of the Interior, including over $1 billion from the National Park Service. If enacted, this would represent the largest cut in the Park Service’s 109-year history. It’s tough to wrap your head around the scale of these cuts. But I can tell you from my time at Interior that this would cause a ripple effect – one that endangers our beloved public lands, the dedicated public servants who steward them, and the millions of Americans who visit our national parks each year. My tenure as Interior Secretary may be over, but my sense of duty to protect our public lands has never left me. áh and I taking in the breathtaking landscapes of Canyon de Chelly National Park. I had so many opportunities to be on our public lands when I was growing up, and I will fight like hell to protect that same possibility for every child. When Somáh was 10 years old, we hiked Canyon de Chelly National Monument together. Identifying the trees, flowers, and animals brought our spirits closer to that beautiful landscape. Looking out over the towering sandstone mesas and lush green blanket of desert shrubs, we imagined that we stood where our ancestors had. Our public lands embody who we are as a country. They belong to every American. They represent freedom and openness, deliver fresh air to breathe, and help us connect with the lands and waters that give us everything. As Donald Trump and Elon Musk prepare to exploit our lands, waters, and forests and the people who care for them, it’s up to each of us to make sure these irreplaceable wonders stay protected. Trump’s announcement has come at the exact moment that families across our country prepare to take trips to visit our national parks, wildlife refuges, and public lands. We’re entering peak visitation season, which begs the question: Who will be around to manage our national parks? Who will empty the trash cans and make sure that trails are safe? Who will track the wildlife, test our waters, and do all the things that we know are so important to our public lands? Our public lands belong to all of us. We must treat this moment as an urgent call to action to stand up for the landscapes and future our children will inherit. Yours in the fight, Deb

> * * *
> Imagine this: A fossil fuel corporation files a permit to drill near a protected wetland. Instead of undergoing a full environmental review process that the law requires — _typically lasting one to two years_ — they get rubber-stamped in as little as two weeks.
> No public input. No accountability.
> That’s exactly what the Trump administration just set into motion. Under the cover of an “energy emergency,” they’re gutting the rules to fast-track coal, oil, gas, and mining projects on public lands across the country. They’ve even cut safeguards for endangered species to make it easier to break ground on these dirty energy projects.
> They’re calling it energy security. But let’s be clear: This is about profit. It’s about billionaires and oil lobbyists cashing in while protected lands are destroyed and vital ecosystems are thrown into chaos — all so corporate polluters can drill and dig with no questions asked.
> **They plan to start drilling NOW. So our resistance needs to move just as fast. Once the land is torn up and the pollution begins, there’s no undoing it. But right now, your signature isn’t on our list.**
> **[Add your name to call on Congress to stop this fossil fuel land grab. Public lands are not corporate playgrounds. They belong to the people, and we’re NOT backing down.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107573284/545118411/1935321436?source=direct_link&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja&refcode=ea.cdbac7ff-742f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.cdbac7ff-742f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkYmFjN2ZmLTc0MmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=STNAkygml3wDx4283x7sWIZEmP9CO8tIh01E-VrRotM=&emci=cabac7ff-742f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cdbac7ff-742f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: Did you miss our email? | We had to make sure you saw this email. Donald Trump is using emergency powers to fast-track fossil fuel and mining projects on public lands, and we’re running out of time to speak out before irreversible damage is done. Thousands of people have already stepped up to send our emergency letter to their representatives. We’re hoping to send 500 more letters before the end of today to keep the momentum going and pressure Congress to act. | Thank you for speaking out. Team JanePAC \----Original Message---- From: Signature Requested (via JanePAC.com) Date: May 3, 2025 Subject: Trump is letting oil companies destroy what belongs to all of us. BREAKING: The Trump administration invokes emergency powers to fast-track fossil fuel and mining projects on public lands --- Imagine this: A fossil fuel corporation files a permit to drill near a protected wetland. Instead of undergoing a full environmental review process that the law requires — typically lasting one to two years — they get rubber-stamped in as little as two weeks. No public input. No accountability. That’s exactly what the Trump administration just set into motion. Under the cover of an “energy emergency,” they’re gutting the rules to fast-track coal, oil, gas, and mining projects on public lands across the country. They’ve even cut safeguards for endangered species to make it easier to break ground on these dirty energy projects. They’re calling it energy security. But let’s be clear: This is about profit. It’s about billionaires and oil lobbyists cashing in while protected lands are destroyed and vital ecosystems are thrown into chaos — all so corporate polluters can drill and dig with no questions asked. They plan to start drilling NOW. So our resistance needs to move just as fast. Once the land is torn up and the pollution begins, there’s no undoing it. But right now, your signature isn’t on our list. --- Thank you for speaking out, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Bryan
subject: May 12 Campaign Update
body:
I'm working to put America first. Here is some of the work I've been doing to get our nation back on track.

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=686d3ff302&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **May 12, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | |
# Advancing Election Integrity
---
| Last week, I [**joined**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c5cd9fa8d4&e=e907534017) the Republican Party of Wisconsin’s new Battleground Podcast to discuss my work advancing strong election integrity reforms like the SAVE Act and my ongoing investigation into potential fraud on the left-wing fundraising platform, ActBlue.
We’ve made a lot of progress on these issues, but there is still more to do. I look forward to continuing my work alongside **President Trump** and **Attorney General Bondi** to increase trust and security in our elections.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=4ed16281ff&e=e907534017)
| Listen to our discussion at the link [**here.**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=e07a2520d8&e=e907534017)

# Protecting Public Safety.
In 2024, [**147 law enforcement officers**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=20c0112f4f&e=e907534017) died in the line of duty, an increase of 25% over the previous year. This week, as we commemorate National Police Week, Congress will vote on a number of important public safety initiatives to support the men and women of law enforcement.
---
|
---
| While many on the Left continue to [**undermine**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=a9d0a2bc0b&e=e907534017) our law enforcement officers and put public safety at risk, conservatives will continue to support law enforcement and remember those who paid the ultimate sacrifice protecting and serving our community.
Thank you to all the men and women of law enforcement who protect us each and every day.

# State Convention This Week
We’ve seen year after year that national Democrats and dark money groups see Wisconsin as their top target and will stop at nothing to take control of our state.
Beginning Friday, the Republican Party of Wisconsin will hold our annual state convention in Wausau. Be sure to join us this weekend to hear about the ways we can fight back and ensure **Wisconsin remains Red!**
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ba608031e2&e=e907534017)
| There will be a number of great discussions, breakout sessions, and events throughout the weekend. Advance registration closes on Thursday the 15th - for more information check out the event page [**here.**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=245b3e04ae&e=e907534017)****
# I hope to see you there!
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=cab068f0b6&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=e907534017&u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f0fdec3eff)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=f0fdec3eff) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=f0fdec3eff)
---
|

name: New PA Project Education Fund
subject: Who’s Running for Common Pleas Judge in Allegheny County?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
In our previous edition we warned about the slippery slope we were in when it came to deportations.
Since, the Trump regime has wrongly detained dozens of U.S. citizens — including a ten-year-old Texas girl [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-citizen-child-recovering-brain-cancer-deported-mexico-undocumented-rcna196049] recovering from brain cancer, a 19-year-old U.S. citizen with learning disabilities who was [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/?fbclid=IwY2xjawJ2Qi9leHRuA2FlbQIxMQBicmlkETFPbU5wOTFVREhWYktoNnc5AR7Fe9oVKjamHuG3WmhfyvfnCRNedF3MORvKe81-https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/] wrongfully incarcerated [https://popular.info/p/federal-immigration-authorities-wrongfully] for 10 days in a privately run immigration detention facility in Arizona or a 20-year-old born in Georgia [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-born-citizen-detained-ice-immigration-florida-rcna201800] , and arrested in Florida.
All mistakes, that cause fear in the American population. The deportation of Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, who, due to an “administrative error,” was sent to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador, does not help ease the fear.
The Fifth and Fourteenth Amendments to the Constitution [https://www.law.cornell.edu/wex/due_process] establish the right to due process — the Fifth Amendment says that “[n]o person shall ... be deprived of life, liberty, or property, without due process of law.” The Fourteenth Amendment extends this obligation to the states.
No PERSON. This is true even for the undocumented, even if someone is here without authorization.
Due process for Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, should have included notice of deportation and the opportunity to contest it before it happened. Now even as the Supreme Court has ruled for his return, he has yet to be returned home
We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever.
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
Social Media of the Week
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202025-04-24%20110558.png] "I'll tell you what freedom is to me: no fear." – Nina Simone
Nina Simone was a classically trained pianist (not common for a young Black woman in the 1950s) who fused her foundation with jazz, gospel, blues, and folk to create a sound entirely her own, defying all genres.
She didn’t fit into a box or label, nor did she try to.
Simone was denied entry to a prestigious music school, the Curtis Institute of Music in Philadelphia, because of her race. This moment fueled her lifelong work in civil rights.
Her songs like “Mississippi Goddam” became an anthem for civil rights and Black empowerment nationally.
"An artist's duty is to reflect the times." – Nina Simone
#NinaSimone [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/ninasimone?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #BlackHistory [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/blackhistory?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #CivilRights [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/civilrights?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R]
SHARE ON FACEBOOK [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
Let's save our planet by saving our democracy.

Happy #EarthDay [https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/earthday/] from NPPEF - remember you have the choice to voice your vote for leaders and legislations that protect our only home, planet Earth.
SHARE ON INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7237344C447445787878394747342B75584E47375A57552F745265427662334B544A4A36505A58657A5871474B7A5A6E53705571424758325657365969365747/editor_images/WCM%20logo.JPG] #CourtsMatter
The U.S. Justice Department withdrew its lawsuit [https://triblive.com/news/pennsylvania/justice-department-drops-lawsuit-accusing-pennsylvania-city-of-diluting-power-of-hispanic-voters/] that accused the heavily Hispanic city of Hazleton in Pennsylvania of illegally diluting the political power of its growing Hispanic population. The department’s initial lawsuit, filed in January, said the “at-large” system of electing city council members, as opposed to electing them by district, was unfair to Hispanic voters and prevented them from getting elected to city council. Hazleton’s 30,000 residents are about two-thirds Hispanic, according to U.S. Census figures. One-third is non-Hispanic white.
Closer to Philadelphia, the largest health system in Delaware County began closing two hospitals [https://6abc.com/post/crozer-health-hospital-emergency-rooms-stop-accepting-patients/16228691/] Wednesday after a federal judge in Texas approved their bankruptcy proceedings. The emergency rooms of Taylor Hospital in Ridley Park and Crozer-Chester Medical Center in Upland are expected to close today, Friday, April 25th. Emergency medical services will end next Friday, on May 2. Crozer's ambulatory centers at Brinton Lakes, Broomall, Haverford, and Media are expected to remain open.
This November, voters will have the power to retain or vacate three seats of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
The votes cast by powerful Pennsylvania voters in November will impact our lives for years to come, as Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court will make decisions about our election administration, immigrant rights. access to abortion, the safety of our workplaces, how bankruptcies are handled, and the right to unionize. Make sure you can voice your vote!
CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/DelCo_2.png] We are hiring!
Let's provide civic education together!
We're looking for people passionate about voting rights in Erie, Lawrence, Lehigh Valley, Bucks, Montgomery, Chester, and Delaware County to help us shape the future of Pennsylvania.
Join our team and help us provide civic education in our communities and register folks to vote!
Positions start at $20 an hour.
Interested? Contact jobs@nppef.org
EMAIL US [jobs@nppef.org]
News You Can Use
State Rep. David Rowe (R-Union) wants to introduce a bill to make it easier for hunters and fishermen to get registered to vote [https://www.palegis.us/house/co-sponsorship/memo?memoID=46210] . He represents a lot of sportsmen in the rural 85th state House District, which includes parts of Union, Juniata, and Mifflin counties and all of Snyder County.
“The bill will not complicate the process of getting a license. The bill will not add another step to the hunting license process,” Rowe told Capital-Star [https://penncapital-star.com/government-politics/general-assembly/state-rep-david-rowe-wants-to-make-it-easier-for-sportsmen-to-register-to-vote/] . “Rather, it will simply make it more accessible. So, for sportsmen that are going to a state office, there will be paper registration forms available for them to simply grab.”
As a voting rights organization, we applaud all legislation that would make it easier for people to register to vote, and make our voices to be heard at the ballot box.
Meanwhile, Pennsylvania’s first two openly autistic legislators, State Reps. Jessica Behnam (D-Allegheny) and Abigail Sailsbury (D-Allegheny), condemned the comments made by the Department of Health Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., attacking autistic people [https://www.witf.org/2025/04/23/pa-lawmakers-some-on-the-autism-spectrum-denounce-rfk-jr-comments/] . They are also opposed to his plan to collect private medical records from US citizens to research autism. Remember that slippery slope regarding immigrant deportations?
And if you are waiting for a tax return but have defaulted student loans, there is a chance the government will garnish your return and even your wages. The Department of Education announced Monday it will restart collections on defaulted federal student loans on May 5 [https://thehill.com/homenews/education/5259465-education-department-defaulted-federal-student-loans-debt-collection-trump-mcmahon] , including potentially garnishing wages for millions of workers. The Treasury Offset Program allows the government to withhold federal payments such as tax returns for individuals in default. After a 30-day notice, the federal government could also begin garnishing a borrower’s wages. So make sure to check your statement.
NPPEF on the Ground
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/IMG_2941.jpg] Engaging the young
Regional Organizing Director, Daniel Levin providing civil education to students. Did you know that as long as a student is 18 years of age on or before the day of the next election - they can register to vote?
Many 17 year old students don't know this and might pass up the opportunity to register to vote, thinking they have to be 18 at time of registering.
It's our passion to bridge the gap here on civic education.

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter! In our previous edition we warned about the slippery slope we were in when it came to deportations. Since, the Trump regime has wrongly detained dozens of U.S. citizens — including a ten-year-old Texas girl [] recovering from brain cancer, a 19-year-old U.S. citizen with learning disabilities who was [] wrongfully incarcerated [] for 10 days in a privately run immigration detention facility in Arizona or a 20-year-old born in Georgia [] , and arrested in Florida. All mistakes, that cause fear in the American population. The deportation of Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, who, due to an “administrative error,” was sent to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador, does not help ease the fear. The Fifth and Fourteenth Amendments to the Constitution [] establish the right to due process — the Fifth Amendment says that “[n]o person shall ... be deprived of life, liberty, or property, without due process of law.” The Fourteenth Amendment extends this obligation to the states. No PERSON. This is true even for the undocumented, even if someone is here without authorization. Due process for Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, should have included notice of deportation and the opportunity to contest it before it happened. Now even as the Supreme Court has ruled for his return, he has yet to be returned home We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever. REGISTER TO VOTE [] Social Media of the Week [] "I'll tell you what freedom is to me: no fear." – Nina Simone Nina Simone was a classically trained pianist (not common for a young Black woman in the 1950s) who fused her foundation with jazz, gospel, blues, and folk to create a sound entirely her own, defying all genres. She didn’t fit into a box or label, nor did she try to. Simone was denied entry to a prestigious music school, the Curtis Institute of Music in Philadelphia, because of her race. This moment fueled her lifelong work in civil rights. Her songs like “Mississippi Goddam” became an anthem for civil rights and Black empowerment nationally. "An artist's duty is to reflect the times." – Nina Simone #NinaSimone [] #BlackHistory [] #CivilRights [] SHARE ON FACEBOOK [] [] Let's save our planet by saving our democracy. Happy #EarthDay [] from NPPEF - remember you have the choice to voice your vote for leaders and legislations that protect our only home, planet Earth. Folks, it’s Charlie Bailey, newly elected chair of the Democratic Party of Georgia. There couldn’t be a more exciting week to get to work as your new DPG Chair. As y’all have seen, the 2026 election cycle is kicking into higher gear with Brian Kemp passing on running for Senate and self-proclaimed “MAGA warrior” Buddy Carter jumping into the race. For the next year, GOP Senate hopefuls will grovel for Trump’s favor as they seek the honor of losing decisively to the strongest incumbent swing state Democrat up for re-election to the Senate. We’ve been on the airwaves all over the state this week, from Atlanta to Columbus to Savannah, making sure Georgians know that the same Republicans who have hiked their bills, let their hospitals close, and threatened their benefits are now asking them for a promotion. The Senate race kicking into gear is just the beginning. We’ve got a lot of hard work ahead, and I’m deeply honored to be your Chair and to lead this fight. [If you’re able, will you chip in $10 right now to fuel our fight to keep Georgia’s Senate seat blue next year and elect Democrats up and down the ballot, across the state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107573724/545119891/-40001252?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_051225_CHAIRLETTER_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY5Njg2NS03NjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHc1qY4gL1PeBqyXo0YiC_dl6B1Abe-liY41P-jw4xk=) | | **[DONATE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107573725/545119892/-40001252?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_051225_CHAIRLETTER_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY5Njg2NS03NjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHc1qY4gL1PeBqyXo0YiC_dl6B1Abe-liY41P-jw4xk=)**
---
I believe in my soul that the Democratic Party of Georgia is the last line of defense between the people of this state and Republican politicians who are backed by mega-corporations and working to make the American Dream less attainable.
**Lives literally depend on our ability to run Democrats in every corner of this state, and to win.**
We’ve already hit the ground running, and we’ll keep going.
We are going to hold elected Republicans accountable for looking out for themselves and for big corporations while ignoring the real needs of working Georgians.
[But none of that works without you. I’m personally asking you to make a donation of $10 or any amount to the Democratic Party of Georgia today — because the future of the Peach State depends on folks like you stepping up and chipping in what they can, when they can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107573726/545119893/-40001252?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_051225_CHAIRLETTER_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY5Njg2NS03NjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHc1qY4gL1PeBqyXo0YiC_dl6B1Abe-liY41P-jw4xk=)

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Everyone deserves to get paid enough to eat.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250512-1352-foote&t=1001&akid=1352%2E342411%2EhQ1lZE ]Squad Victory Fund

1 in 4 Americans now rely on short-term loans just to buy
groceries, Peter.

We should all be able to afford essentials like housing, healthcare, and
food. And Congress can ensure that we do! Right now, when more people are
struggling to put food on the table, [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/em20250512-em-raise-minimum-wage-signon/?source=em20250512-1352&akid=1352%2E342411%2EhQ1lZE ]take a moment to tell Congress
that we all deserve a living wage!

Our only strength is our willingness to take action on behalf of each
other, Peter.

And right now, as the uncertainty from Trump’s tariffs bears down on a
working class already hurting from inflation and decades of stagnant
wages, this is the time to push back.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/em20250512-em-raise-minimum-wage-signon/?source=em20250512-1352&akid=1352%2E342411%2EhQ1lZE ]Take a moment to add your voice and tell Congress: raise the minimum
wage!

We’re in this together.

In Solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1352%2E342411%2EhQ1lZE

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| | Peter – Just days ago, Trump said he didn't know if it's his job as president to uphold the Constitution or follow due process of law. We can't count on him or his band of congressional Republicans to do the right thing. That means it's up to us to fight the tough fights and get through to the other side with a stronger system of checks and balances. Flipping the House has probably never been more important at any time in my life. And we're well within striking distance of being able to do it. [**So, I'm asking you to support this campaign and our efforts to retake the majority and put a stop to President Trump's corrupt actions. _Write this down and take it home to Mama:_

**No matter how bad the shellacking was in November ... the Democrat Party will NEVER go quietly into the night. Nor will they ever change. They're throwing everything they've got at us right now, including schemes to:**
* _' Trump-proof'_ blue states to hamstring Trump in court
* _Bombard_ battleground states with Fake News attack ads
* _File lawsuits_ to block and delay Trump's agenda
* And even _impeach_ your President within months of taking office

Folks, it's John Kennedy.

These soy latte-drinking, tree-hugging Liberals have learned nothing after getting walloped at the ballot box. And let me just be the first to say that they are COMPLETELY off their rockers if they think we won't fight back to stop them.

_**[In fact, that's why I'm partnering up with my buddy from Louisiana, Leader Steve Scalise, to help make sure these Trump-deranged radicals NEVER hold power ever again.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Yvg_uqrIjO_nOW1TQyNlJdJlD8jj2j3E2rgcjFgxE6t3GiC7Fsz8B2OwVkfazmLDzrJ68IKI477qWARXR_xBb44gLS_XCeWZ88GPMurPndoJjkc_NugLQ_Oaj_qG078FJsVkVhSwOqJnbJmtPpUbcnH55B0uCf9aqnCeKaXOMwJnP7nVKvd1KjVMQEMZtBiDRbBsQGzAAWP87QXyY6HPoReMcFmEhtuJj6hYAmODBubBzX6v2_SIviMqLBOUeLjf5Sto3VoOFqpEEt3_1f_44zgW1P-o4-z3GRoWXVs-N21s1UY3lDqEdL2E-PC8poO10bYB8GqMBl-E7nulXNEp8cna2abZFj8Hgln8s7gQrAA76m3Z8VCgApYv8IWdEQeQKeKOt7FAEcPaO6rYtxvZE3y5GG6VXecg7vMeWB3PC5k8VgLXj2xECBMUK1s_UimU6EUjpJ93HwCT6UHu-RMmiRfluGBFm22R3juX_Yx8DOGhhXDK/Iu8P_Io0y5KuRx2oeM7Z-Q3J7x9nPtAw/8 "In fact, that’s why I’m partnering up with my buddy from Louisiana, Leader Steve Scalise, to help make sure these Trump-deranged radicals NEVER hold power ever again.")**_

We've seen how low they're willing to stoop despite being rejected by voters...

Just imagine what they'd be capable of if we fail to raise the resources we need to stop them. If there was ever a time to invest early so we can win, that moment is here and now.

MS-13 thugs, cartel traffickers, and foreign terrorists are now roaming free in our country — on YOUR dime — waiting MONTHS to YEARS for their court dates. This isn’t a serious reading into constitutional law... This is left-wing activism taking over our highest court. Here at Pathway to Victory, we understand that a nation with NO border is NO nation at all. That’s why we’re demanding SCOTUS to resume all deportations. We need YOU to to have the maximum impact. Will you sign our petition right away? This isn’t just about collecting signatures. This is about showing SCOTUS that We The PeopleDO NOT APPROVE of dangerous illegal aliens staying in our country. They DO NOT have the “right” to due process. They DO NOT have the “right” to live off our tax dollars. They DO NOT have the “right” to live in America! SCOTUS must be held accountable. President Trump must be empowered. And our nation must be defended. | | |

| Before we kick things back into high gear this week, I wanted to make sure I reached out to thank you for all your support this weekend! I’m beyond grateful for all the Mother’s Day love you and my family sent my way.

subject: Fighting for real solutions 💪

body:
As I travel across the district and hear from constituents, it’s clear that many people are fed up with Donald Trump’s reckless policies, and they’re tired of House Republicans sitting by and enabling his extreme agenda.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107574411/545122463/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2UzZjg2ZS03ODJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h5JrSL3hOkmGS65BzDxUA0W95FHBowPIwq1LTvv7zSI=)

| Peter,

Representing NY-04 is one of the greatest honors of my lifetime, and I am committed to showing up for our community to promote greater transparency and accountability in public office.

As I travel across the district and hear from constituents, it’s clear that many people are fed up with Donald Trump’s reckless policies, and they’re tired of House Republicans sitting by and enabling his extreme agenda.

Right now, House Republicans are pushing for cuts to critical programs like Social Security. That’s why I joined Rep. Tom Suozzi to address constituents' concerns and discuss the impact these cuts will have on American families.

Social Security is a compact between the American people and the government that serves as a lifeline for millions of seniors and retirees. The premise is that if you work hard and pay into the system, you will be able to retire with dignity.

I’m in the halls of Congress every day working to find real solutions that will lower the cost of living, uplift working families, and ensure that our seniors and retirees receive the support they deserve.

[_**If you’re with me, I hope I can count on you to chip in anything you can today so we can defend this seat and fight to ensure Social Security remains fully funded for generations to come.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107574412/545122464/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2UzZjg2ZS03ODJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h5JrSL3hOkmGS65BzDxUA0W95FHBowPIwq1LTvv7zSI=)

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107574446/545122558/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRjMTlmNjctNzgyZi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-8YyBA0lB2tq_2VIAhv_8eRpaRVlMNqQjtqlWktNN9U=) | Peter, wanted to fill you in on a new exciting project we just launched! You can read more about it [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107574447/545122559/636247295?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRjMTlmNjctNzgyZi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-8YyBA0lB2tq_2VIAhv_8eRpaRVlMNqQjtqlWktNN9U=&emci=bd450401-522f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=54c19f67-782f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6455652) in the SF Chronicle. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107574448/545122560/636247295?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRjMTlmNjctNzgyZi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-8YyBA0lB2tq_2VIAhv_8eRpaRVlMNqQjtqlWktNN9U=&emci=bd450401-522f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=54c19f67-782f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6455652)** Last week, I officially launched the Build America Caucus, Congress’s first bipartisan, pro-growth caucus focused on building the housing, infrastructure, energy, and innovation we need. There’s been a lot of discussion recently about how we’ve lost our ability to do big things in America, including in Ezra Klein and Derek Thompson’s new book _Abundance._ **I believe that for too long, government has been bogged down by process instead of focused on results.** I’m excited to help lead an effort to reimagine what government, and our party, can be: a builder of big, bold projects that actually improve people’s lives. Over the past few months, I’ve worked to build a coalition of nearly 30 Members from across the ideological spectrum, and I’m excited to push forward legislation to build more housing, tackle energy permitting reform and speed up infrastructure projects. I know we have a lot of chaos going on right now, and I believe it’s vital that we put out a forward looking vision of what government can, and should, be. I hope you’ll let me know your thoughts! \- Josh

We simply do not have enough time to discuss all the accomplishments President Trump and his administration achieved last week and over the weekend. In Geneva, along with Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent and U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer, President Trump was able to reach a trade agreement with China. By May 14th, the United States and China will lower tariffs by 115 percent. Both countries will suspend the 34 percent reciprocal tariffs, while the U.S. will retain its 10 percent fair-trade tariff. This is a huge step in rebalancing the massive trade deficit the Biden administration allowed to take place. In 2020, President Trump put in place an excellent trade agreement with China that Biden did not enforce. President Trump was able to negotiate a ceasefire between two nuclear armed countries, Pakistan and India over the weekend. The president was able to negotiate with trade deals in mind when bringing the immediate ceasefire to the two countries. At home, President Trump reduced drug prices by 30 - 80 percent. By creating a "most favored nation" policy, President Trump is ensuring that Americans will pay the same price as the nation that pays the lowest price in the world. President Trump also secured the return of the last remaining American hostage in Gaza, Edan Alexander. Just as the historic trade deal with the U.K. and the surrender of the Houthis last week, the Trump administration steamrolls an incredible amount of accomplishments over the weekend. Meanwhile, lunatic Democrats stormed an ICE facility because they were concerned about the safety of the precious gang members and criminals they love so much. Buckle up and enjoy as we upack it all right here on the Sean Spicer Show!

**Below is a note from Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. Please read and sign your name by hers to protect NPR and PBS — vital public broadcasting stations.**

I’m writing to you directly because a moment like this demands we stand together.

Donald Trump is once again attempting to slash funding for essential public broadcasting stations: NPR and PBS.

Let’s be clear what this move is about: **It’s about censorship and control.**

Public media is not a partisan issue. It’s how millions of Americans access free educational programming, emergency alerts and fact-based news.

[**_We’re running out of time to stop these cuts, so please: Add your name to defend public media against Trump’s censorship agenda._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107575487/545126293/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.12_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC-NS_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGFkNTZkZC03YzJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bMa3NJ2oBZVjfnQOSv5Cj4cg--QabAbAT2MBPRAM_9Y=&emci=4d635479-5f2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=48ad56dd-7c2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029)

A free press is critical to any democracy — whether it’s a positive or a negative story. We have to take a stand.

So please, I’ll be checking in with my team to make sure we hit 25,000 signatures by tonight. body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=jvG%2B2%2FBVtL8w%2FI9DnE3a0GDp8Mie1wExhnFCV%2FahVvR0deeeafwUMk0HAnhCZ4OX4VFE75kw09ddnyhOCrqM7nXLaRjbrbYgG1oGAyAiazkDs6AxZsy%2FsQ5OEQ1h3wXX26YuDiagtigmn7XigAbSftLvwa3KWbq3MJAKeBWhSYa1Z%2FPovrjVp6kyBPF5PVA5rCbT9NP%2BWp6MEmbb98dg2naO58Z4ZHO5%2FGE3S5Ul3%2FgcHtMOAPtWWYNRtvOLXh05TFFZC%2FBtW9kaIzluTYM%2FwIuBBX3cFMCuO8FtTytXj0hAm6aWSgPJJZ%2FdujDYIs1I8%2BqDBjmxed239YFJ9q3I%2Fzc3K9GdNmliGshMPrsYnKbw4tcPqKzSDBThQyMch8eYeRHK%2BUTTXudSGxFgSAW9e41haoA3%2B1LYo%2FjcfSjLVI41QuVoJRa%2Bb9CmHtQlIBC2)
---
| |
---
Peter,

The American people are demanding an end to Congressional stock trading. This is not a partisan issue: Democrats, Republicans, and Independents all agree — it is long past time to ban Members of Congress from trading stock.

That’s why I’ve taken a stand. I’m proud to be the lead sponsor of the main bipartisan bill to ban Members of Congress from trading individual stocks. And our momentum to get this done is picking up.

The incentives to cheat the system are too strong. And unless we end these insider deals — once and for all — we’ll never have a Congress that truly works for the people who sent us here.

I didn’t run for office to protect the portfolios of the powerful. I ran to fight for the people who power this country — teachers, nurses, grocery clerks, postal workers, parents doing everything they can to build a better future for their kids.

Every Rhode Islander should be able to walk into a grocery store without checking their bank account first. They should be able to pay rent without skipping meals. They should be able to raise a family, save for the future, and live with dignity.

If you’re with me in this fight for fairness — for dignity, for accountability — I hope you’ll consider chipping in to help fuel this work.

[If you’re able, please consider making a contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107575718/545127309/2041901197?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250512_FR_StockTrading_0_1MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODlmMGVhOS03ZDJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHGXiuO-Ei6JR2Td1TXzvF62-oRdIcd6Z_LHWJdiYbg=)

Thank you for standing with me,

Seth

name: Alea Nadeem
subject: From being kidnapped to Iraq to the U.S. Air Force
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alea for Congress
body:
Being kidnapped changed my life.
| | | |

---
|
---
|

---
| | Patriot,
**I was just 8 years old when a trip to Iraq to visit family ended with me being held captive for years under Saddam Hussein’s regime.**
My name is Alea Nadeem. I’m a Lieutenant Colonel in the U.S. Air National Guard, and I’m running for the U.S. Congress.

body:
I’m sorry to bother you, Peter, but if you’ll give me just a few minutes of your time, I’ll explain why.

| I’m sorry to bother you, Peter, but if you’ll give me just a few minutes of your time, I’ll explain why.

As you know, Abigail Spanberger’s historic race for Governor is not just critically important to the future of our state, it’s important for the future of our country too. Every Democratic Governor in office is a vital line of defense against the reckless Trump administration – that’s exactly why Republicans are working so hard to defeat Abigail.

And I’m a top GOP target next year. The Republican Senate campaign arm is targeting Virginia – they think they can defeat me to expand their Senate majority in Washington.

To make matters worse, we need to be prepared for Elon Musk and his allies to target both of us, too.

That means we have a lot of work to do if we want to keep up with the millions of dollars they’re going to spend in Virginia – this year and next. **And that work starts now. Not next month. Not next week. If we want to flip the Governor’s office and hold my seat in the Senate, we need to act now.**

clean_body: I’m sorry to bother you, Peter, but if you’ll give me just a few minutes of your time, I’ll explain why. | I’m sorry to bother you, Peter, but if you’ll give me just a few minutes of your time, I’ll explain why. As you know, Abigail Spanberger’s historic race for Governor is not just critically important to the future of our state, it’s important for the future of our country too. Every Democratic Governor in office is a vital line of defense against the reckless Trump administration – that’s exactly why Republicans are working so hard to defeat Abigail. And I’m a top GOP target next year. The Republican Senate campaign arm is targeting Virginia – they think they can defeat me to expand their Senate majority in Washington. To make matters worse, we need to be prepared for Elon Musk and his allies to target both of us, too. That means we have a lot of work to do if we want to keep up with the millions of dollars they’re going to spend in Virginia – this year and next. And that work starts now. Not next month. Not next week. If we want to flip the Governor’s office and hold my seat in the Senate, we need to act now. = | = | = | = | = | = The fight continues, Mark Warner = * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Carolina at United We Dream
subject: There’s still time to support DACArecipients—here’s how
body:
We have a growing waitlist of DACA recipients who need help covering the $555 renewal fee. | | | Peter, Anti-immigrant politicians have attacked DACA recipients in the courts since 2017. But our team has fought these attacks and defended our communities at every turn. _And we’re not planning on stopping anytime soon._ This team has helped immigrant youth fund DACA applications and renewals — because their home is here, and they deserve protections. But the **cost of renewing DACA has increased** to **$555 online** , and even more for paper applications. And our **DACA Renewal Fund is nearly depleted because DACA recipients need support right now!** We have a growing waitlist of DACA recipients who need financial assistance, but we can’t say yes to everyone without your help. We’re powered by people like you, which is why we are asking: **********[Will you chip in right now to help cover the $555 DACA renewal fee for an immigrant youth who can’t afford it?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ54evdMD8bDqyGoWQeMUZVGTJ6iIi4JI6atf_UWVrLiC9lX7oKJxBmuMCE7-ZUaJjLax7OQ3H3yjTqIw7MZ54lNT8ziq79cHI_9h1dcaxcerErxntv2ZmTRJ6eIkX9zgrfiXnsNvgbDqxAGyvz3O1aC2x2w4MsZqeg-296x4Mnd7NH1LW_PwC0IXHCF9NPc9to7ISDrKm1ixip_jIBbbLE3ctO87_EiAO5ib0pPMg-y5rAJ0nhVoXhao4lMYhFtE8BMc4kwgSM2vYiwuY9g2n2ODHxhdFxerbC932W2TIOQAzBxPt_qKhoAx7Bl0Xa_-AN-naQ72RPQxT8eWQHDPal1fuQFTZTzwwBsaAm_cNRJTYqOug4K3Ff4HPyeCS78mt2HjqcaZgDEDTjTCYwOmVJvGjW-WyzUM3b_63-ZVeNN8A/4gf/MPNtXktETxe4ZcSLb2sBbA/h0/h001.zbJg1qiCvrscQngjKVyCFn7jJb7ek9E3frfkjsGJolg)** | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ54evdMD8bDqyGoWQeMUZVGTJ6iIi4JI6atf_UWVrLiC9lX7oKJxBmuMCE7-ZUaJjLax7OQ3H3yjTqIw7MZ54lNea7Skz5yGtWHZx01_sH8DKhqEywwVW1fbSlwJiI0YPIi0Uj0nRZxb0RFXOwbwK5FILXJgp_8wVLbn9wDQGOrHvXqQad30tony-1bCZOlsXqx3aelu2vVg1rPX8-n4SAcLoQt3IPqhFgshQ37CA_vTHudNySMJZX1rAFLUabUOF-JZy1lUeV1UoHZOnZPyyISc1IBKyWjDT--p_bVRvYkyptn2wwvVdmKDVL1h-ZbEUXj-9-9PTAV_oyXXV0PG9CLuvi7o0P12248HnH-JlJqPWGDleV-4fP3Gw7ZmHjZ4A0FvG4nI-Ncs7yR-WdZHKiGvm65NUDJ210NoOH7jD3NFs/4gf/MPNtXktETxe4ZcSLb2sBbA/h1/h001.bkgWe-eyJuOx2lgVd0LS-vEj8fe4ISiyjnTENWM1PI0)

We know many in our community are already working two jobs, helping their families stay afloat, and trying to build a future — and a $555 fee is simply out of reach. That’s why your donation today is so powerful: **your gift goes directly to DACA recipients** who need to renew their protections.
This program has changed lives for 12 years — and as we face another court decision in the near future, we’re urging DACA recipients to renew their protections _while they still can_. **[If you’re able to help today, please do.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkqBZ6VW_VFbtBGGVx_RZ54evdMD8bDqyGoWQeMUZVGTJ6iIi4JI6atf_UWVrLiC9lX7oKJxBmuMCE7-ZUaJjLax7OQ3H3yjTqIw7MZ54lNVu1JlGuqbprmrZL2s1c8rg-jo2ecPAkgg2Eu0JdcxVPWWHB4sVgUqmXbtUmxjmx6W7jnuqGY5QC9GeL7zx6SIru2xxk2TpZI1up-OTb3NkHg1lAd7Xl1LS9rKUsmslXsj6vRtPTM_emZMgaBnTPm6LPf3XEdROQAg20sTVJHRBcs9gFLizzrTIH3xnhK_zPuBMLyLGHdR-e4V2GcxWwnHbIednyKaLZdQmUaxbyTHbduJvvOXyQQ_P93NDkJx3APBcqAlildnG93AE9wLZ8pAx_-vRl7KmE9zKvFscM3QuN2P28hxPosaIacLlhgXstHAZdlaQB96lusvwsRLrmMwA/4gf/MPNtXktETxe4ZcSLb2sBbA/h2/h001.0KLXhCyHzPWu2uMQqLKEzYzgWnTsGz-Iaj-ZJxOFpc4)**

clean_body: We have a growing waitlist of DACA recipients who need help covering the $555 renewal fee. | | | Peter, Anti-immigrant politicians have attacked DACA recipients in the courts since 2017. But our team has fought these attacks and defended our communities at every turn. And we’re not planning on stopping anytime soon. This team has helped immigrant youth fund DACA applications and renewals — because their home is here, and they deserve protections. But the cost of renewing DACA has increased to $555 online , and even more for paper applications. And our DACA Renewal Fund is nearly depleted because DACA recipients need support right now! We have a growing waitlist of DACA recipients who need financial assistance, but we can’t say yes to everyone without your help. We’re powered by people like you, which is why we are asking: ******** | | We know many in our community are already working two jobs, helping their families stay afloat, and trying to build a future — and a $555 fee is simply out of reach. That’s why your donation today is so powerful: your gift goes directly to DACA recipients who need to renew their protections. This program has changed lives for 12 years — and as we face another court decision in the near future, we’re urging DACA recipients to renew their protections while they still can. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you for your support, Carolina, United We Dream | Our most dedicated supporters chip in monthly to ensure we never have to turn down a DACA recipient who asks for help. Join them and maximize your support for immigrant youth by making your donation recurring:** | | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: Did you catch Katie on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
She clearly outlined how Trump’s tariffs are hurting consumers and workers
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39717%2E3422442%2ErZeDLx)
Dear Derek,
While her kids were making pancakes yesterday for Mother’s Day, Katie took some time to join MSNBC’s Alex Witt to make clear how Trump’s tariffs are hurting all of us. Check it out >>
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250512_1_ak?refcode=em20250512-39717&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39717_3422442_rZeDLx&akid=39717%2E3422442%2ErZeDLx)
Katie knows that the stories about empty California ports are not just numbers. They represent real economic harm for consumers and workers. She brings her own personal experience as a single mom, who has to think about her family’s budget as her kids outgrow their shoes or need new school supplies.
On TV, Katie shared the story of a Californian who’s run a small business importing Christmas items since 1983. Thanks to Donald Trump, that business owner could have to pay a 145% tariff. That means he’s probably going to have to lay off some or all of his 53 employees, and Americans are going to have to pay more for their holiday decorations.
That’s why Katie is running for governor—to call out Trump’s crazy, out-of-touch policies and to strengthen California’s economy.
Now more than ever, Democrats need leaders who can skillfully communicate with the American people about economic issues.
Katie is a single mom, commercial law professor, and former member of Congress. **[Can you chip in $10 today to support her work to make clear for Americans what’s at stake with Donald Trump’s disastrous economic agenda?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250512_1_ak?refcode=em20250512-39717&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39717_3422442_rZeDLx&akid=39717%2E3422442%2ErZeDLx)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250512_1_ak?refcode=em20250512-39717&refcode2=39717_3422442_rZeDLx&akid=39717%2E3422442%2ErZeDLx)
—Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250512-39717&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39717_3422442_rZeDLx&akid=39717%2E3422442%2ErZeDLx)**

name: PA Dems HQ
subject: what’s on our ballot in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

In November, candidates for retention in our state Supreme, Superior, and Commonwealth Courts will be on the ballot.

That means redistricting, voting rights, worker rights, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and so much more are on the ballot here in Pennsylvania.

Our State Courts are the firewall between Pennsylvanians and Trump’s extremism. We have to do everything we can to protect and strengthen that firewall — [**which means doing everything we can to make sure our Courts go blue in November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107576306/545129117/-1402533371?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250512_FR_Firewall_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdlMTU2My03ZjJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrR-s8p7v-WdRDHo6FDfl-ET5ISEj2xsvx1uGtwU7AM=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

body:
Last week, supporters and alums from across the country came together to celebrate all of the incredible progress we’ve accomplished at our 20th Anniversary Gala. Here’s a quick recap if you were unable to join:

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107576674/545130411/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMTIzMGQ0LTgwMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ErbL2rRDmMV-BKSatX2N_cL1olkQ3KeCxB7DFGNCVM=)
---
| Peter,

Last week, supporters and alums from across the country came together to celebrate all of the incredible progress we’ve accomplished at our 20th Anniversary Gala. **Here’s a quick recap if you were unable to join:

Rep. Abigail Spanberger** sat down with us to discuss her run for Governor of Virginia, joining Emerge alums, Sec. Deb Haaland, Lt. Gov. Eleni Kounalakis, and Sec. of State Shenna Bellows, who are running for Governor in their states of New Mexico, California, and Maine.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107576675/545130412/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMTIzMGQ0LTgwMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ErbL2rRDmMV-BKSatX2N_cL1olkQ3KeCxB7DFGNCVM=)
Emerge gave **Michigan State Sen. Mallory McMorrow** the **Cecile Richards Impact Award** for her leadership in passing the Reproductive Health Act to make reproductive choice possible and abortion care accessible. **Now, she is stepping up to run for U.S. Senate in Michigan!**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107576676/545130413/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMTIzMGQ0LTgwMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ErbL2rRDmMV-BKSatX2N_cL1olkQ3KeCxB7DFGNCVM=)
The ORIGINAL Emerge Woman, **VP Kamala Harris** , spoke out about the erosion of our democracy and our rights during the first 100 days of Trump. It was a powerful reminder of the importance of bridging engagement with meaningful action.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107576677/545130414/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMTIzMGQ0LTgwMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ErbL2rRDmMV-BKSatX2N_cL1olkQ3KeCxB7DFGNCVM=)
**New Mexico State Sen. Cindy Nava** was awarded the very first **Kamala Harris Trailblazer Award** after making history as the first Dreamer elected to office. When women lead, it inspires others to follow — creating a ripple effect for progress and change.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107576678/545130415/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMTIzMGQ0LTgwMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ErbL2rRDmMV-BKSatX2N_cL1olkQ3KeCxB7DFGNCVM=)
Emerge alum **Former Houston City Council Member Amanda Edwards** and Emerge Boot Camp cohort member **Deja Foxx** spoke on a panel to discuss running for Congress in special elections to represent TX-18 and AZ-07. With a new generation of leaders, these women are continuing to break down barriers in politics.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107576679/545130416/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMTIzMGQ0LTgwMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ErbL2rRDmMV-BKSatX2N_cL1olkQ3KeCxB7DFGNCVM=)
Thank you to all of our alums, speakers, and supporters who joined (in-person or virtually!) and helped us celebrate over 20 years of empowering women across the country to run, win, and lead. As we reflect on the work we’ve done, we must continue to look forward and build up a robust network of support.

We’re transforming the face of government, _one candidate, one race, and one election at a time!_

[_**Your support today will allow us to continue building the bench so we can make the greatest impact in elections up and down the ballot in 2025 and beyond. Can I count on you to make an investment in Emerge today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107576680/545130417/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMTIzMGQ0LTgwMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ErbL2rRDmMV-BKSatX2N_cL1olkQ3KeCxB7DFGNCVM=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107576681/545130418/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxMTIzMGQ0LTgwMmYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5ErbL2rRDmMV-BKSatX2N_cL1olkQ3KeCxB7DFGNCVM=)

Thank you for standing with us,

A’shanti F. Gholar
President and CEO, Emerge

name: Team Gottheimer
subject: vote-by-mail ballots are out!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Team,

Vote-by-mail ballots are officially landing in mailboxes across Jersey.

With only 29 days to go until Election Day, it’s so important for everyone to make a plan to vote!

* The voter registration deadline in New Jersey is May 20! You can register to vote or update your voter registration here! [https://nj.gov/state/elections/voter-registration.shtml]
* Are you planning to vote by mail? Click here for information on how to request, complete, and turn in your mail-in ballot! [https://www.nj.gov/state/elections/vote-by-mail.shtml]

For more information on ways to vote in New Jersey, click here! [https://www.nj.gov/state/elections/vote.shtml]

Together, we can lower taxes and costs and stand up to Trump’s chaos!

Thank you,

Team Gottheimer
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zwqVCKyxzki-GzysVtmLBA2] , or to unsubscribe click here. name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: An update on our town halls
body:
---
Derek, We’ve said it over and over again: **If Republicans won’t talk to their own voters, then Democrats will.** So far, we’ve held over 100 town halls in 48 states, featuring local and national Democratic officials. From Arizona to Pennsylvania, we’ve talked to tens of thousands of voters about their concerns and what’s at stake — including in districts where Republican representatives have refused to show up to talk to their own constituents. Here are some of the leaders who have joined town halls across the country so far: _Sen. Cory Booker
Sen. Elizabeth Warren
Rep. Maxwell Frost
Rep. Melanie Stansbury
Rep. Jill Tokuda
Rep. Greg Casar
Rep. Greg Stanton
Sen. Chris Murphy
Rep. Madeleine Dean
Rep. Joyce Beatty
Gov. Tim Walz_
And so many more local and national leaders! And we’re still going. Our team is working to hold People’s Town Halls in all 50 states and continue giving working families across the country a chance to be heard, even if Republicans ignore them. [Donate now to our continuing efforts:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250512_3417_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3417_22930333_47LlgZ&akid=3417%2E22930333%2E47LlgZ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250512_3417_fr&refcode2=3417_22930333_47LlgZ&akid=3417%2E22930333%2E47LlgZ)**
---

Together, we’ll continue to hold Republicans accountable and lay the groundwork for electing Democrats up and down the ballot who will act as a check against Trump’s extreme agenda.
Thank you,
The Democrats

name: AOC
subject: This country belongs to no one person.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Representative Byron Donalds made a fool of himself on national television, saying that constitutional rights are only for US citizens. **That is incorrect**.
Constitutional rights are about the soil of the United States of America.
This is the land of the free. It's not that there are some people that have rights and other people that don't have rights.
We are a nation of due process. The _government_ is required to conduct itself along the standards of due process.
It is the _government_ that is required to uphold standards of respecting free speech.
It is the _government_ that is required to honor and respect the requirements around illegal search and seizure.
Don't let them think that it's on you. **It's on them**.
They're going on television trying to rip the Constitution apart, trying to tell people that America is not America — that it is the United States of Trump.
**This country belongs to no one person**. Millions of Americans have not been deployed, have not died in the streets, have not sacrificed everything to have our nation made a mockery of right now.
Absolutely not.
I say all of this because they want us to give up. They think if you can arrest one mayor, then all the other mayors will stop enforcing our rights.
They think if you can just make an example of one member of Congress, all 434 other ones will stand back.
One of our biggest obligations is to continue to say no. **And to not be afraid**.
We will not comply in advance with illegal activity — **even if that illegal activity is coming from the President and his cronies**.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250512.uBrvM2&refcode=em20250512-8819-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8819%2E2526796%2EqawCST)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250512.uBrvM2&refcode=em20250512-8819-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8819%2E2526796%2EqawCST)**
More soon,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250512?refcode=em20250512-8819-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8819_2526796_qawCST&akid=8819%2E2526796%2EqawCST)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250512-8819-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8819%2E2526796%2EqawCST)**

name: Angie Craig
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I wanted you to hear it from me personally.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250512-1?refcode=em20250512-1989&amount=5&refcode2=1989_21716_M45xw4&akid=1989%2E21716%2EM45xw4)
It's official: I’m launching my campaign to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate.
[**In a moment, I’ll share more about why I’m running. But if you’re ready to help power my campaign to take on the toughest fights in Washington, will you split a donation of $5 between Congresswoman Sarah McBride and me toward my $1 million Launch Week Goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250512-1?refcode=em20250512-1989&amount=5&refcode2=1989_21716_M45xw4&akid=1989%2E21716%2EM45xw4)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250512-1?refcode=em20250512-1989&refcode2=1989_21716_M45xw4&akid=1989%2E21716%2EM45xw4)**
Growing up, I never even dreamed I’d get into politics. I was raised by a single mom in a mobile home park. I watched my mom work hard and complete her teaching degree over nine years while raising us kids.
We lived just a few doors down from my grandmother, who worked into her 70s. I’ll never forget her advice:
**“No matter what work you do, always do more than what they ask of you.”**
I looked to those words as my guide as I worked my way through college and to help lead a major Minnesota manufacturing company.
And I’ve kept that advice in mind during my six plus years in the House representing Minnesota’s 2nd District — successfully capping the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare.
I’m proud of my record in Congress. But now, I’m ready to take my fight to the Senate, where I can give _all_ Minnesotans a voice.
**It’s never been more important to hold the powerful accountable.**
The Trump administration is running roughshod over the middle class — **working overtime for the drug companies, billionaires and Washington special interests.**
And out-of-control, unelected billionaire Elon Musk is trying to take over our government — and **burn it to the ground.**
Donald Trump is trampling on our rights and freedoms — **as he profits for personal gain.**
And a cowardly Republican Party is rolling over and letting it all happen.
I know I can win this race and help Democrats take back the Senate — but I’ll need your grassroots support. This Senate race could be the most expensive in Minnesota history — and I already hold that record in the House — and **Elon Musk has already pledged a massive $100 million to flip seats like this one.** Election experts are even calling this race a toss-up.
[**We can’t afford for a Republican to win this seat and be a rubber stamp for the destructive MAGA agenda. I’m asking you personally: Can you split a donation of $5 between Congresswoman Sarah McBride and my campaign to help build a strong foundation for the race ahead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250512-1?refcode=em20250512-1989&amount=5&refcode2=1989_21716_M45xw4&akid=1989%2E21716%2EM45xw4)

clean_body: I wanted you to hear it from me personally. It's official: I’m launching my campaign to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate. Growing up, I never even dreamed I’d get into politics. I was raised by a single mom in a mobile home park. I watched my mom work hard and complete her teaching degree over nine years while raising us kids. We lived just a few doors down from my grandmother, who worked into her 70s. I’ll never forget her advice: “No matter what work you do, always do more than what they ask of you.” I looked to those words as my guide as I worked my way through college and to help lead a major Minnesota manufacturing company. And I’ve kept that advice in mind during my six plus years in the House representing Minnesota’s 2nd District — successfully capping the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. I’m proud of my record in Congress. But now, I’m ready to take my fight to the Senate, where I can give all Minnesotans a voice. It’s never been more important to hold the powerful accountable. The Trump administration is running roughshod over the middle class — working overtime for the drug companies, billionaires and Washington special interests. And out-of-control, unelected billionaire Elon Musk is trying to take over our government — and burn it to the ground. Donald Trump is trampling on our rights and freedoms — as he profits for personal gain. And a cowardly Republican Party is rolling over and letting it all happen. I know I can win this race and help Democrats take back the Senate — but I’ll need your grassroots support. This Senate race could be the most expensive in Minnesota history — and I already hold that record in the House — and Elon Musk has already pledged a massive $100 million to flip seats like this one. Election experts are even calling this race a toss-up. Let’s win this, Angie Craig

**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s DOJ is turning its back on civil rights enforcement** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107577342/545132502/-209663064?refcode=em-5.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTlkODZjZi04NDJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Qn-SJjNRuk3jFGJ_-CFZNyrc510QvnZkSE2g6tPcS8=) Donald Trump’s Department of Justice is no longer focused on defending civil rights, and is instead being used to carry out his political agenda. According to new reporting, Trump’s DOJ has stripped down the division responsible for protecting voting rights. Longtime attorneys have resigned. Investigations into voter suppression have been stalled or shut down. Instead, Trump has directed the DOJ to go after college protests and immigrants and to ignore civil rights violations that don’t serve his interests. One former DOJ official put it bluntly: | **“This is what you do when you don’t really know what the section does and just want to create chaos in the simplest way possible that doesn’t involve you reading anything,”

“It is extremely clear that the intent is to get absolutely nothing done. And the effect will be that absolutely nothing gets done.” **
---
This isn’t a misunderstanding. _It’s the plan._ Trump wants to dismantle the very institutions that protect our rights and replace them with tools of control.
At DASS, we’re standing with Democratic Secretaries of State who are doing the work the DOJ has abandoned: protecting voters, enforcing election law, and defending democracy.
But we can’t do this without your help.
[**Will you chip in $3 to help us keep fighting for free and fair elections — even when Trump’s DOJ won’t?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107577343/545132503/-209663064?refcode=em-5.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTlkODZjZi04NDJmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Qn-SJjNRuk3jFGJ_-CFZNyrc510QvnZkSE2g6tPcS8=)

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s DOJ is turning its back on civil rights enforcement = Donald Trump’s Department of Justice is no longer focused on defending civil rights, and is instead being used to carry out his political agenda. According to new reporting, Trump’s DOJ has stripped down the division responsible for protecting voting rights. Longtime attorneys have resigned. Investigations into voter suppression have been stalled or shut down. Instead, Trump has directed the DOJ to go after college protests and immigrants and to ignore civil rights violations that don’t serve his interests. One former DOJ official put it bluntly: | “This is what you do when you don’t really know what the section does and just want to create chaos in the simplest way possible that doesn’t involve you reading anything,” “It is extremely clear that the intent is to get absolutely nothing done. And the effect will be that absolutely nothing gets done.” This isn’t a misunderstanding. It’s the plan. Trump wants to dismantle the very institutions that protect our rights and replace them with tools of control. At DASS, we’re standing with Democratic Secretaries of State who are doing the work the DOJ has abandoned: protecting voters, enforcing election law, and defending democracy. I’m worried. Medicaid, Social Security, basic infrastructure, job opportunities for New Mexicans, and our public lands have never been more at risk than they are now under the current administration.
The Trump administration hopes you’re not paying attention, but they just put forward a budget for our National Parks that is outright _hostile_ to our public lands – one of America’s greatest ideas. In all honesty, it’s probably the _worst_ park service budget I’ve ever seen.
I’m fighting every day to protect public lands, clean energy projects, and the job opportunities they create, as well as the earned benefits, programs, and places — like local libraries — that countless New Mexicans rely on. By helping us meet our fundraising goals, you’re ensuring my team can collect enough resources to beat back the attacks AND continue our fight for New Mexico.
**[So what do you say: Can you help us pull ahead by donating an amount that works for your budget today? clean_body: = Folks, we’re only a few days out from our mid-month fundraising deadline, so I had to reach out with a quick update. My finance team just told me we’re trailing a bit behind our internal goals for May. This is a problem because what we raise together now will determine my team’s ability to respond to MAGA attacks on our work down the line. I’ll explain more in a moment, but if that’s all you need to hear, = | = I’m worried. Medicaid, Social Security, basic infrastructure, job opportunities for New Mexicans, and our public lands have never been more at risk than they are now under the current administration. The Trump administration hopes you’re not paying attention, but they just put forward a budget for our National Parks that is outright hostile to our public lands – one of America’s greatest ideas. In all honesty, it’s probably the worst park service budget I’ve ever seen. I’m fighting every day to protect public lands, clean energy projects, and the job opportunities they create, as well as the earned benefits, programs, and places — like local libraries — that countless New Mexicans rely on. By helping us meet our fundraising goals, you’re ensuring my team can collect enough resources to beat back the attacks AND continue our fight for New Mexico. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner.
