name: David Hogg
subject: Transparent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is why we made this announcement when we did:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250512-1&t=1&akid=2118%2E587540%2EVF5yXf)
Peter,
Leaders We Deserve recently announced a $20 million effort to primary out-of-touch, ineffective incumbent House Democrats to replace them with generational young leaders. **[If you can, I’m asking you to chip in $5 to power this urgent work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250512_1_transparent?refcode=em20250512-2118&amount=5&refcode2=2118_587540_VF5yXf&akid=2118%2E587540%2EVF5yXf)**
I want to be transparent about why we made this announcement when we did – and why your support today will determine whether or not we can put young people on the ballot in 2026.
Right now, there are too many politicians occupying safe blue seats who aren’t putting up enough of a fight against Donald Trump. They’re failing to meet the moment, and it’s leaving more and more voters disillusioned about what Democrats even stand for.
**But as you read this, there are young, inspiring, and brave leaders out there who are in the process of deciding whether to run for office.** If we can demonstrate that there’s a loud, powerful, and well-funded movement who’s ready to support their campaigns with everything we’ve got, then maybe – _just maybe_ – they’ll decide to get into the arena and lead our party into the future. But if they decide their campaigns are over before they even begin, there won’t be any Gen Z leaders for us to vote for come Election Day in 2026.
**That’s why our work needs to happen now, Peter.** Next spring or next fall will be too little, too late. It’s why Leaders We Deserve just made our big announcement about supporting young progressives who decide to challenge asleep-at-the-wheel House Democrats in safe seats. And it’s why we’re counting on you to commit to this work today:
[**Will you donate $5 to elect the next generation of young leaders who will rebuild our party? What we do right now will determine whether Democrats are in a position to win back the House in 2026.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250512_1_transparent?refcode=em20250512-2118&amount=5&refcode2=2118_587540_VF5yXf&akid=2118%2E587540%2EVF5yXf)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250512_1_transparent?amount=5&refcode=em20250512-2118&refcode2=2118_587540_VF5yXf&akid=2118%2E587540%2EVF5yXf)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250512-1&t=2&refcode2=2118_587540_VF5yXf&akid=2118%2E587540%2EVF5yXf)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2118%2E587540%2EVF5yXf)

clean_body: This is why we made this announcement when we did: Peter, Leaders We Deserve recently announced a $20 million effort to primary out-of-touch, ineffective incumbent House Democrats to replace them with generational young leaders. I want to be transparent about why we made this announcement when we did – and why your support today will determine whether or not we can put young people on the ballot in 2026. Right now, there are too many politicians occupying safe blue seats who aren’t putting up enough of a fight against Donald Trump. They’re failing to meet the moment, and it’s leaving more and more voters disillusioned about what Democrats even stand for. But as you read this, there are young, inspiring, and brave leaders out there who are in the process of deciding whether to run for office. If we can demonstrate that there’s a loud, powerful, and well-funded movement who’s ready to support their campaigns with everything we’ve got, then maybe – just maybe – they’ll decide to get into the arena and lead our party into the future. But if they decide their campaigns are over before they even begin, there won’t be any Gen Z leaders for us to vote for come Election Day in 2026. That’s why our work needs to happen now, Peter. Next spring or next fall will be too little, too late. It’s why Leaders We Deserve just made our big announcement about supporting young progressives who decide to challenge asleep-at-the-wheel House Democrats in safe seats. And it’s why we’re counting on you to commit to this work today: Thanks for being a part of this, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

name: Rep. Victoria Spartz
subject: I grew up in socialist-controlled Ukraine. Here’s what I learned from it.

body:
I’m proud to be an American. Are you?

Friend,

I grew up in a socialist-controlled Ukraine.

I understand the importance of freedom because I know what it's like not to have it.

**[That's why I'm urging every person who reads my story to help me stand for freedom.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e5c7567d57c641cdb2073c1109971317&_e=Q_BloseFXolZ3TKLZJktgK28-Vp9QXp5a_lChFsIZphX0iebWlti8-yaNsG37YI47oB6TAvgCIryCFXKQtJALqVoA0Jv2uIgFEefL3ensh3etVqupKmn-FoZP2JHSqh7YhRjIpvLvtJMs9xqjr8NY1BkWh0WfJe3eIhqH_nvWZrDyLjzto17scCZFBf278sCEeC8nzgaBn_vMq1xY95_YRdkCLR-2rbSUFUeY_phC21ggwnyKc7-iIbQwBtSgjiwFkJnyA-sS04XbJKdn93Tekc6-RrH_iJTAmN5w9D29xL2uWASj5nnPH14sjh-nioXICRGOgO7xEBnT1uUKG0Yh_lmlGwprgSFDfmE-Cp1ATXHjOW1Az2cceL39cYyK5S4dB1ipc_h1uNkqrpqymX_Xw%3D%3D) **I rely on grassroots support to fuel my fight to advance conservative priorities in Congress, and your donation will go a long way.

Less government. More freedom. That's my motto.

**I immigrated to America more than 20 years ago with one suitcase and the chance to live the American Dream.** I married my husband--a born and raised Hoosier, became a U.S. citizen, settled down in Indiana, and was blessed with two wonderful daughters.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e5c7567d57c641cdb2073c1109971317&_e=Q_BloseFXolZ3TKLZJktgK28-Vp9QXp5a_lChFsIZphX0iebWlti8-yaNsG37YI47oB6TAvgCIryCFXKQtJALqVoA0Jv2uIgFEefL3ensh3etVqupKmn-FoZP2JHSqh7YhRjIpvLvtJMs9xqjr8NY1BkWh0WfJe3eIhqH_nvWZrDyLjzto17scCZFBf278sCEeC8nzgaBn_vMq1xY95_YRdkCLR-2rbSUFUeY_phC21ggwnyKc7-iIbQwBtSgjiwOZLFdhE3Yxt-LqaP9Yf8FimVc2HUK4fUwNCdWVopNcRrScslLbmDxQ5tFMZV_j5p0IAYfQ003URxynls2kGyLPHBjxpaQE9xogk5HuCLy3tTXKQCA2njjhCgHO4S6SQgsGYYRRa5nuHXjc8xtG7b0Q%3D%3D)

When I moved to America, I knew it wouldn't be easy. I worked my way up from bank teller to a CPA, finance executive and successful business owner.

Now, I have the privilege of serving Indiana's 5th Congressional district in Congress.

Growing up in a socialist-controlled country, I know first hand that limited government is always better. That's why I fight every single day to champion conservative principles in Congress. Our country must never go down the dark path of socialism.

[I am asking all strong, patriotic conservatives to help me keep up the fight. Can I count on you?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e5c7567d57c641cdb2073c1109971317&_e=Q_BloseFXolZ3TKLZJktgK28-Vp9QXp5a_lChFsIZphX0iebWlti8-yaNsG37YI47oB6TAvgCIryCFXKQtJALqVoA0Jv2uIgFEefL3ensh3etVqupKmn-FoZP2JHSqh7YhRjIpvLvtJMs9xqjr8NY1BkWh0WfJe3eIhqH_nvWZrDyLjzto17scCZFBf278sCEeC8nzgaBn_vMq1xY95_YRdkCLR-2rbSUFUeY_phC21ggwnyKc7-iIbQwBtSgjiwoe4eJXDYrqHQoaGM_4rr3Wzm08JNKfR55UnrkyHtRlEcqoJA4Q1Fv7x2RBsjYJFn5lMq84KVy3BoG6QESJl0kUqTjDwr4MayMStXf8vQCmkEo0HCw2D9dFd2FQctg8Q2644voRidJ3xgfVfZoNf_yw%3D%3D)

My friend, I grew up under the end-stage of Soviet Communism, so _I know firsthand_ what happens when a nation goes bankrupt...

...Money becomes practically worthless, sparking even worse inflation...

...Increased poverty and sky-high unemployment rates lead to civil unrest and rampant violent crime, and...

...Government officials try to snuff out remaining freedoms to assert total control!

That's why I'm fighting alongside President Trump to pull America out of the deep financial crisis the Biden-Harris Regime plunged us into -- before it's too late!

I'm in Congress to stop the waste, fraud and abuse, shrink the government and expand our freedoms. That's what I've been doing since day one, and it's what I'll continue doing.

|

Just a while ago, news broke that Donald Trump is once again eyeing cuts to Social Security:_the bedrock of retirement security for millions of Americans._

**Here’s the truth:**

These cuts are part of a cruel and calculated plan to gut the programs working families rely on, all while handing out more tax breaks to billionaires like Elon Musk.

_It’s a disgrace._

Social Security is a promise: one that Americans pay into their entire working lives, with the understanding that it will be there when they need it.

**We stopped him before. We can do it again, but only if we raise our voices now.** So here’s what we need you to do:

clean_body: The cost of tax cuts for the rich? Your retirement. | | Just a while ago, news broke that Donald Trump is once again eyeing cuts to Social Security:the bedrock of retirement security for millions of Americans. Here’s the truth: These cuts are part of a cruel and calculated plan to gut the programs working families rely on, all while handing out more tax breaks to billionaires like Elon Musk. It’s a disgrace. Social Security is a promise: one that Americans pay into their entire working lives, with the understanding that it will be there when they need it. We stopped him before. We can do it again, but only if we raise our voices now. So here’s what we need you to do: Millions of Americans, especially seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities, are counting on us to speak out. If we stay silent, Trump wins. If we speak up, we can stop him cold. Thank you for being part of this fight. -Team Democracy On The Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: I’m honored to endorse this working class champion for Congress:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I’m honored to endorse Donavan McKinney, who’s running to represent my
neighboring congressional district in Congress.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-rt-2?refcode=em20250512-36671&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36671_1203867_zcxsji&akid=36671%2E1203867%2Ezcxsji ]Donavan at home with his two young sons and dog. They're at home on the
living room floor, dressed casually in home clothes. One son is playing
with a large toy car while the other shows Donavan something in his hands.
Donavan faces the camera and is smiling.

Here’s Donavan at home with his two young sons and dog

Donavan knows our communities’ struggles because he has lived them. Having
grown up with housing and food insecurity, he worked with our state’s
largest healthcare union to advocate for living wages. While serving in
the State House, Donavan has led fights for workers’ rights, economic
security, and clean air and water.

This working class champion is running against an incumbent who: spent
over $17 million of his own wealth to bankroll his own Congressional
campaigns, spent more taxpayer money than any other member of Congress
last year on ads to promote himself, and takes money from corporate PACs.

Meanwhile, Donavan is pushing to get big money out of politics, and has
led policies to challenge corporate PACs and lobbyists. Donavan just
launched his people-powered, grassroots campaign—so now is a crucial time
to demonstrate early support.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-rt-2?refcode=em20250512-36671&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36671_1203867_zcxsji&akid=36671%2E1203867%2Ezcxsji ]I’m all in for Donavan McKinney. Will you join me in supporting this
future Congressman by splitting a contribution between his campaign and
mine and Justice Democrats, so together we can push for bold progressive
policies and fight back against fascism and oligarchy?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-rt-2?refcode=em20250512-36671&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36671_1203867_zcxsji&akid=36671%2E1203867%2Ezcxsji ]SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION TODAY

I’ve known Donavan since before he served in public office, and he always
puts community at the center of his work. He’s a true public servant who
puts the people first.

Like me, Donavan grew up in the shadow of corporate polluters in Detroit.
After he and his family developed an asthmatic cough, he began advocating
for environmental justice.

He said, “Raising my two young boys in the same polluted air that I grew
up in means that if I know one thing, it’s this: our kids deserve better.”

Our kids do deserve better, and Donavan has fought hard in the State House
to ensure families can breathe clean air and drink clean water—including
funding over $600 million to replace lead pipes in Detroit and its
suburbs.

I know he’ll join me in the crucial fight for environmental justice in
Congress. And I know that if he makes it to Congress, Donavan McKinney
will be a partner who will act with the urgency we need to meet this
moment. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-rt-2?refcode=em20250512-36671&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36671_1203867_zcxsji&akid=36671%2E1203867%2Ezcxsji ]Can you chip in today?

Donavan has also led fights for public education and public transit, as
well as much-needed changes to transform our racist criminal legal system.
He delivered more than $10 million in community violence intervention
programs to our region. He’s also fighting for Black maternal health,
housing protections, and universal healthcare. This is what true public
safety looks like.

We need Donavan in Congress serving the people. His self-funded opponent
doesn’t have to raise money for his election campaigns. But Donavan does.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-rt-2?refcode=em20250512-36671&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36671_1203867_zcxsji&akid=36671%2E1203867%2Ezcxsji ]Will you chip in today to support my and Donavan McKinney’s campaigns
for Congress and Justice Democrats?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250512-dm-rt-2?refcode=em20250512-36671&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36671_1203867_zcxsji&akid=36671%2E1203867%2Ezcxsji ]Contribute $5

Thank you so much for having our backs. Together, we’ll keep fighting for
a future where everyone can thrive.

In solidarity,

Rashida

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250512-36671-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36671_1203867_zcxsji&akid=36671%2E1203867%2Ezcxsji

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36671%2E1203867%2Ezcxsji

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:

Hi Peter, it’s Deb.
I’ll get right to the point: **[Today I’m asking you to make a split $10 contribution to support my campaign for Governor of New Mexico and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88515?refcode=em20250512-8934&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8934%2E614464%2EZBuoma)** And if you give me just a moment, I’ll explain why.
With our May mid-month fundraising deadline coming up quickly, here’s why your grassroots contribution is so critical:

Deb

name: Bonta HQ
subject: Rob is urging Trump to reverse course
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
The Trump Administration is cutting federal funding for lifesaving programs that heal and protect survivors of violence.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250512&t=1&akid=1784%2E1088799%2Ed05Nc5)
Americans have made it clear that public safety is a top concern. Instead of listening to the people, the Trump administration is slashing federal funding commitments to community violence intervention programs. Gutting proven programs that have successfully made our communities safer isn’t just dangerous, it will be deadly.
President Donald Trump and U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi have terminated $811 million in grants for victim services and crime prevention, cuts that will hinder initiatives to address gun violence, stop the vital support of at-risk youth, and prevent victims from obtaining necessary recovery support.
**This is a cruel and dangerous move that puts communities in California and across the country at risk and threatens public safety — so Rob is speaking out.**
Today, Rob joined GIFFORDS Center for Violence Intervention, California Assemblymember Mike Gipson, and State Senator Jesse Arreguín to urge the Trump administration to reverse course and reinstate these vital grants.
This isn’t the first time Trump has threatened public safety. On day one of his administration, he pardoned all of the January 6th rioters, including those convicted of assaulting police officers. He has cut more than $55 million meant to help first responders save people from overdosing on fentanyl. And he shuttered the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention. (You can be sure, under Rob’s watch, California DOJ’s Office of Gun Violence Prevention is here to stay.)
As Rob said, the White House is disregarding the safety of the people it is sworn to serve and protect, and turning its back on survivors of violence.
**[Will you join Rob in building public pressure on the Trump administration to restore community violence intervention funding by signing our petition today?](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-20250512-violence-intervention/?source=em20250512-1784&akid=1784%2E1088799%2Ed05Nc5)**
**[Add Your Name](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-20250512-violence-intervention/?source=em20250512-1784&akid=1784%2E1088799%2Ed05Nc5)**
The more we speak up, the better our chances of getting these lifesaving programs funded again.
— Bonta HQ

clean_body: The Trump Administration is cutting federal funding for lifesaving programs that heal and protect survivors of violence. Americans have made it clear that public safety is a top concern. Instead of listening to the people, the Trump administration is slashing federal funding commitments to community violence intervention programs. Gutting proven programs that have successfully made our communities safer isn’t just dangerous, it will be deadly. President Donald Trump and U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi have terminated $811 million in grants for victim services and crime prevention, cuts that will hinder initiatives to address gun violence, stop the vital support of at-risk youth, and prevent victims from obtaining necessary recovery support. This is a cruel and dangerous move that puts communities in California and across the country at risk and threatens public safety — so Rob is speaking out. Today, Rob joined GIFFORDS Center for Violence Intervention, California Assemblymember Mike Gipson, and State Senator Jesse Arreguín to urge the Trump administration to reverse course and reinstate these vital grants. This isn’t the first time Trump has threatened public safety. On day one of his administration, he pardoned all of the January 6th rioters, including those convicted of assaulting police officers. He has cut more than $55 million meant to help first responders save people from overdosing on fentanyl. And he shuttered the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention. (You can be sure, under Rob’s watch, California DOJ’s Office of Gun Violence Prevention is here to stay.) As Rob said, the White House is disregarding the safety of the people it is sworn to serve and protect, and turning its back on survivors of violence. The more we speak up, the better our chances of getting these lifesaving programs funded again. — Bonta HQ

| **_A SECURE REPORT FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR_**
---
Fellow Republican,
---
As I reported last fall, foreign money is allegedly being illegally funneled to Far Left Democrat candidates via the Democrats’ top donation platform to influence our elections.
---
**Now, the Department of Justice is taking action to** _STOP_** this Democrat cheating. **

“The presidential memorandum notes that a congressional investigation revealed significant fraud schemes using ActBlue and, over a 30-day period during the 2024 election cycle, hundreds of ActBlue donations from foreign IP addresses using prepaid cards, despite it being illegal for foreign nationals to contribute to U.S. elections.”
---
American citizens have also reported that contributions were made to Democrat candidates and committees in their name that they did not make themselves.

**This fraud would explain how Democrats like Kamala Harris – _running on one of the most extreme, unpopular platforms in history_ – were able to shatter fundraising records last year! **

name: With Honor Action
subject: Reaffirming Our Transatlantic Commitments - With Honor Goes to London 🇬🇧
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b39a489f09e5/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14052682?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=dc027d9dca&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | Friends,

This past weekend, With Honor and a dozen bipartisan For Country Caucus members had the honor of participating in the London Defence Conference—an essential gathering at a pivotal moment for international security. As we commemorated the 80th anniversary of Victory in Europe Day, we were reminded of what’s possible when the U.S. and its allies stand together. Our participation was a timely reaffirmation of America’s enduring commitment to its transatlantic partners.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=004f5ea16a&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
_Click on the image to hear from our Co-Founder and CEO, Rye Barcott, about the importance of this trip._
|
---
| **🇺🇸 🇬🇧 Veteran Leadership Across the Atlantic**
---
| Alliances are more than diplomatic arrangements. Alliances, like NATO and the Five Eyes, allow democracies to stand together against authoritarian regimes. Our alliances with democratic nations like Great Britain are vital because they can magnify our collective military strength, shared intelligence, and collaboration on economic and diplomatic efforts that stabilize regions and deter conflict. As part of panels, in the media, and with their veteran counterparts in the British Parliament, members of the For Country Caucus spent the weekend emphasizing and reaffirming their commitment to our democratic allies.
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
| **ICYMI: With Honor Action-endorsed ACES Act passes the U.S. House and heads to the Senate**
---
| Last week, the House of Representatives [overwhelmingly](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=f8a10f7537&e=33f53a5b1a) passed the [Aviator Cancer Examination Study (ACES) Act](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=28b4050fa4&e=33f53a5b1a), a bipartisan bill led by Rep. August Pfluger and Rep. Jimmy Panetta, veterans and members of the For Country Caucus. The bill calls for a comprehensive study on cancer rates among military aviators and aircrew, aiming to better understand potential long-term health risks faced by those who served in the skies. By directing the Department of Veterans Affairs to work with top scientific experts, the ACES Act takes a critical step toward ensuring veterans receive the care and answers they deserve. The legislation was endorsed by both With Honor Action and the For Country Caucus and is led in the Senate by With Honor Action ally Senator Mark Kelly.
---
|
---
| **With Honor Supports the Boulder Crest Foundation**
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=00d103b097&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| With Honor was proud to sponsor the Boulder Crest Foundation’s Second Annual Red, White, & Bluegrass event, held last weekend at Boulder Crest Virginia. This sold-out celebration brought together community members, veterans, and supporters to enjoy live music and raise over $100,000 for Boulder Crest’s transformative programs. The Boulder Crest Foundation is a national nonprofit dedicated to transforming the lives of combat veterans, first responders, and their families through Posttraumatic Growth (PTG) programs. Rather than focusing solely on coping with trauma, Boulder Crest helps participants turn their struggles into strength—empowering them to lead meaningful, purpose-driven lives after service.
---
|
---
| | | | Please follow With Honor Action on Twitter via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=9c9a627bb7&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.
---

name: Jocelyn Benson for Governor
subject: A Betsy DeVos favorite
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
John James, a close Betsy DeVos ally, is running for governor.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=299%2E181023%2E7bkUyb)
Here's the deal team,
We’re facing a critical fundraising deadline later this week — and it's one of our first since Republican Congressman John James launched his campaign against Jocelyn.
[**If that’s all you need to hear, please chip in to Jocelyn’s campaign today →**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=299%2E181023%2E7bkUyb)
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=299%2E181023%2E7bkUyb)
---
Michiganders have rejected John James _twice_ at the ballot box, and it’s no surprise why.
He’s an anti-abortion extremist who cheered on the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_. He supports ripping health care away from the more than one million Michiganders who rely on the _Affordable Care Act_ for coverage. And he has stood by Donald Trump’s side at every turn — regardless of how much harm Trump has caused Michiganders.
But John James isn’t _just_ an extreme candidate for governor. **_He’s an extreme,_well-funded_ candidate for governor. _**
John James is a favorite of Betsy DeVos and her ultra-wealthy, anti-public education family. A super PAC funded by the DeVos family spent more than $7 million to help James in 2020, and members of the DeVos family poured tens of thousands of dollars directly into his campaign.
The DeVos family could bankroll James’s campaign yet again, which means we need to start preparing _now_ for any attacks they throw Jocelyn’s way.
[**While the Michigan gubernatorial election is more than a year away, fundraising goals like the one we’re hoping to reach this week help ensure we have the resources to fight back against Republican attacks on Jocelyn and reach voters across the state with her message. So team, can you pitch in to Jocelyn’s campaign before our deadline?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250512_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=299%2E181023%2E7bkUyb)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
